agent.instance_template:
{{task}}

<instructions>
# Task Instructions

You're investigating a bug in a C/C++ program. Two tools are
available:

  bash   stateless shell — `ls`, `cat`, `grep`, `nl`, `file`, etc.
         Each call is a fresh subshell. Useful for source inspection.

  gdb    stateful gdb session pre-loaded with the buggy binary.
         The session persists across calls — `break`, `run`, `bt`,
         `print`, `step`, `continue`, `frame N`, etc. retain state
         from one call to the next. The binary and its argv are
         already configured; just `run` to start.

Use `gdb` for ANY debugger work — it's ~10x more useful than
`gdb -batch` from bash because state persists.

For each response:
1. Include reasoning text explaining your analysis.
2. Provide ONE OR MORE tool calls (`bash` and/or `gdb`).

## Workflow

1. `bash`: read the source (`nl -ba program.c`).
2. `gdb`: `run` to observe the crash; `bt` for backtrace.
3. `gdb`: `frame N` / `print VAR` / `info locals` to inspect state.
4. Iterate as needed — `gdb` keeps your breakpoints / current frame.
5. Form a diagnosis grounded in the evidence.

3-8 investigation steps is typical.

## CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Every response MUST include AT LEAST ONE tool call (`bash` or
  `gdb`). A response with no tool calls is rejected.
- Use non-interactive flags. No editors / pagers (`vi`, `less`).
- Each `bash` call is a fresh subshell; `cd` and `export` don't
  persist between bash calls. The `gdb` session, by contrast, IS
  stateful.

## Submission

When done investigating, your final response MUST include all three
labelled paragraphs in the THOUGHT text BEFORE the submit `bash` call:

  ROOT CAUSE: <file:line and what is wrong, in your own words.>
  LOCAL FIX:  <minimal code change that resolves the symptom.>
  GLOBAL FIX: <structural change preventing this CLASS of bug —
              type changes, API redesign, compile-time check, etc.>

Then submit using:

    bash tool: {"command": "echo COMPLETE_TASK_AND_SUBMIT_FINAL_OUTPUT"}

The judge reads your THOUGHT prose. If you submit without writing the
three labelled sections, your run scores 0.

<system_information>
{{system}} {{release}} {{machine}}
</system_information>
</instructions>

messages.content:
You are an expert software engineer debugging C/C++ programs. You
interact with a Unix shell via two tools — `bash` for general shell
commands and `gdb` for stateful debugger commands against the buggy
binary.

You're debugging a real-codebase bug in `berry-5` (project `berry`, an open-source C/C++ project from the BugsC++ corpus).

You have TWO tools available — `bash` and `gdb` — both pointed at the same Linux/amd64 container with the project's source tree at /work.

  bash : runs commands inside the container (cwd /work). Use it for cd, ls, grep, cat, find, etc.
  gdb  : a stateful gdb session pre-loaded with the buggy binary (`/work/berry tests/suffix.be`). The binary was compiled with debug symbols (-g), so gdb can show source-line frames. Set breakpoints in functions related to the failing test, run, step, and print variables to find where behavior diverges from expected.

## What we know
- Buggy binary: `/work/berry`
- Test invocation: `/work/berry tests/suffix.be`
- Observed: `exit_code:0`
- Bug type: `other`
- Language: `c`

## How to investigate
1. In gdb: set a breakpoint in a function the test exercises, run, step, print state at decision points.
2. In bash: list source files (`find /work -name '*.c' -not -path '*/test*' | head -30`), read the test driver to understand expected behavior, search the source for related symbols.
3. Cross-reference: what gdb shows the program doing vs. what the test asserts about it.

Investigate the failure, localize the defect in the source, and propose both a local fix and a structural global fix.

    75	void be_throw(bvm *vm, int errorcode)

    85	BERRY_API void be_exit(bvm *vm, int status)
    86	{
    87	    if (vm->errjmp) {
    88	        be_pushint(vm, status);
    89	        be_pop(vm, 1);

   101	
   102	int be_execprotected(bvm *vm, bpfunc f, void *data)
   103	{
   104	    struct blongjmp jmp;
   105	    jmp.status = 0;
   106	    jmp.prev = vm->errjmp; /* save long jump position */
   107	    vm->errjmp = &jmp;
   108	    exec_try(vm->errjmp) {
   109	        f(vm, data);
   110	    }
   111	    vm->errjmp = jmp.prev; /* restore long jump position */
   112	    return jmp.status;
   113	}
   114	
   115	static void vm_state_save(bvm *vm, struct vmstate *state)
   116	{
   117	    state->depth = be_stack_count(&vm->callstack);
   118	    state->top = cast_int(vm->top - vm->stack);
   119	    state->reg = cast_int(vm->reg - vm->stack);
   120	}
   121	
   122	static void copy_exception(bvm *vm, int res, int dstindex)
   123	{
   124	    bvalue *dst = vm->stack + dstindex;
   125	    if (res == BE_EXCEPTION || res == BE_EXIT) {
   126	        bvalue *src = vm->top;
   127	        *dst++ = *src++;
   128	        if (res == BE_EXCEPTION) {
   129	            *dst++ = *src++;
   130	        }
   131	    }
   132	    vm->top = dst;
   133	}
   134	
   135	static void vm_state_restore(bvm *vm, const struct vmstate *state, int res)
   136	{
   137	    vm->reg = vm->stack + state->reg;
   138	    /* copy exception information to top */
   139	    copy_exception(vm, res, state->top);
   140	    be_assert(be_stack_count(&vm->callstack) >= state->depth);
   141	    if (be_stack_count(&vm->callstack) > state->depth) {
   142	        be_vector_resize(vm, &vm->callstack, state->depth);
   143	        vm->cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   144	    }
   145	}
   146	
   147	#if BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER
   148	static void m_parser(bvm *vm, void *data)
   149	{
   150	    struct pparser *p = cast(struct pparser*, data);
   151	    bclosure *cl = be_parser_source(vm,
   152	        p->fname, p->reader, p->data, p->islocal);
   153	    var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
   154	    be_incrtop(vm);
   155	}
   156	
   157	int be_protectedparser(bvm *vm,
   158	    const char *fname, breader reader, void *data, bbool islocal)
   159	{
   160	    int res;
   161	    struct pparser s;
   162	    struct vmstate state;
   163	    s.fname = fname;
   164	    s.reader = reader;
   165	    s.data = data;
   166	    s.islocal = (bbyte)(islocal != 0);
   167	    vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   168	    res = be_execprotected(vm, m_parser, &s);
   169	    if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   170	        vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   171	    }
   172	    return res;
   173	}
   174	
   175	static const char* _sgets(void *data, size_t *size)
   176	{
   177	    struct strbuf *sb = data;
   178	    *size = sb->len;
   179	    if (sb->len) {
   180	        sb->len = 0;
   181	        return sb->s;
   182	    }
   183	    return NULL;
   184	}
   185	
   186	static const char* _fgets(void *data, size_t *size)
   187	{
   188	    struct filebuf *fb = data;
   189	    *size = be_fread(fb->fp, fb->buf, sizeof(fb->buf));
   190	    if (*size) {
   191	        return fb->buf;
   192	    }
   193	    return NULL;
   194	}
   195	
   196	BERRY_API int be_loadbuffer(bvm *vm,
   197	    const char *name, const char *buffer, size_t length)
   198	{
   199	    struct strbuf sbuf;
   200	    sbuf.s = buffer;
   201	    sbuf.len = length;
   202	    return be_protectedparser(vm, name, _sgets, &sbuf, bfalse);
   203	}
   204	
   205	static int fileparser(bvm *vm, const char *name, bbool islocal)
   206	{
   207	    int res = BE_IO_ERROR;
   208	    struct filebuf *fbuf = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(struct filebuf));
   209	    fbuf->fp = be_fopen(name, "r");
   210	    if (fbuf->fp) {
   211	        res = be_protectedparser(vm, name, _fgets, fbuf, islocal);
   212	        be_fclose(fbuf->fp);
   213	    }
   214	    be_free(vm, fbuf, sizeof(struct filebuf));
   215	    return res;
   216	}
   217	#endif /* BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER */

   219	#if BE_USE_BYTECODE_LOADER
   220	static void bytecode_loader(bvm *vm, void *data)
   221	{
   222	    bclosure *cl = be_bytecode_load(vm, (const char *)data);
   223	    if (cl != NULL) {
   224	        var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
   225	    } else {
   226	        var_setnil(vm->top);
   227	    }
   228	    be_incrtop(vm);
   229	}
   230	
   231	/* load bytecode file */
   232	static int load_bytecode(bvm *vm, const char *name)
   233	{
   234	    int res = BE_SYNTAX_ERROR;
   235	    if (be_bytecode_check(name)) {
   236	        struct vmstate state;
   237	        vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   238	        res = be_execprotected(vm, bytecode_loader, (void*)name);
   239	        if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   240	            vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   241	        }
   242	    }
   243	    return res;
   244	}
   245	
   246	#else
   247	#define load_bytecode(vm, name) BE_SYNTAX_ERROR
   248	#endif /* BE_USE_BYTECODE_LOADER */
   249	
   250	BERRY_API int be_loadmode(bvm *vm, const char *name, bbool islocal)
   251	{
   252	    int res = load_bytecode(vm, name);
   253	#if BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER
   254	    if (res && res != BE_IO_ERROR) {
   255	        res = fileparser(vm, name, islocal);
   256	    }
   257	#else
   258	    (void)islocal;
   259	#endif
   260	    if (res == BE_IO_ERROR) {
   261	        be_pushfstring(vm, "cannot open file '%s'.", name);
   262	    }
   263	    return res;
   264	}
   265	
   266	#if BE_USE_BYTECODE_SAVER
   267	static void _bytecode_save(bvm *vm, void *data)
   268	{
   269	    if (be_top(vm) > 0 && var_isclosure(vm->top - 1)) {
   270	        bclosure *cl = var_toobj(vm->top - 1);
   271	        be_bytecode_save(vm, (const char *)data, cl->proto);
   272	    }
   273	}
   274	
   275	/* save bytecode file */
   276	BERRY_API int be_savecode(bvm *vm, const char *name)
   277	{
   278	    int res;
   279	    struct vmstate state;
   280	    vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   281	    res = be_execprotected(vm, _bytecode_save, (void *)name);
   282	    if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   283	        vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   284	    }
   285	    return res;
   286	}
   287	#endif
   288	
   289	static void m_pcall(bvm *vm, void *data)
   290	{
   291	    struct pcall *p = cast(struct pcall*, data);
   292	    be_dofunc(vm, p->v, p->argc);
   293	}
   294	
   295	int be_protectedcall(bvm *vm, bvalue *v, int argc)
   296	{
   297	    int res;
   298	    struct pcall s;
   299	    struct vmstate state;
   300	    s.v = v;
   301	    s.argc = argc;
   302	    vm_state_save(vm, &state);
   303	    res = be_execprotected(vm, m_pcall, &s);
   304	    if (res) { /* restore call stack */
   305	        vm_state_restore(vm, &state, res);
   306	    }
   307	    return res;
   308	}
   309	
   310	#if BE_DEBUG && defined(be_assert)
   311	/* increase top register */
   312	bvalue* be_incrtop(bvm *vm)
   313	{
   314	    bvalue *top = vm->top++;
   315	    be_assert(top < vm->stacktop);
   316	    return top;
   317	}
   318	#endif
   319	
   320	void be_stackpush(bvm *vm)
   321	{
   322	    /* make sure there is enough stack space */
   323	    be_stack_require(vm, 1 + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN);
   324	    be_incrtop(vm);
   325	}
   326	
   327	void be_stack_require(bvm *vm, int count)
   328	{
   329	    if (vm->top + count >= vm->stacktop) {
   330	        be_stack_expansion(vm, count);
   331	    }
   332	}
   333	
   334	static void update_callstack(bvm *vm, intptr_t offset)
   335	{
   336	    bcallframe *cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   337	    bcallframe *base = be_stack_base(&vm->callstack);
   338	    for (; cf >= base; --cf) {
   339	        fixup_ptr(cf->func, offset);
   340	        fixup_ptr(cf->top, offset);
   341	        fixup_ptr(cf->reg, offset);
   342	    }
   343	    fixup_ptr(vm->top, offset);
   344	    fixup_ptr(vm->reg, offset);
   345	}
   346	
   347	static void update_upvalues(bvm *vm, intptr_t offset)
   348	{
   349	    bupval *node = vm->upvalist;
   350	    /* update the value referenced by open upvalues */
   351	    for (; node != NULL; node = node->u.next) {
   352	        fixup_ptr(node->value, offset);
   353	    }
   354	}
   355	
   356	static void stack_resize(bvm *vm, size_t size)
   357	{
   358	    intptr_t offset;
   359	    bvalue *old = vm->stack;
   360	    size_t os = (vm->stacktop - old) * sizeof(bvalue);
   361	    vm->stack = be_realloc(vm, old, os, sizeof(bvalue) * size);
   362	    vm->stacktop = vm->stack + size;
   363	    offset = ptr_offset(vm->stack, old);
   364	    /* update callframes */
   365	    update_callstack(vm, offset);
   366	    /* update open upvalues */
   367	    update_upvalues(vm, offset);
   368	}
   369	
   370	void be_stack_expansion(bvm *vm, int n)
   371	{
   372	    size_t size = vm->stacktop - vm->stack;
   373	    /* check new stack size */
   374	    if (size + n > BE_STACK_TOTAL_MAX) {
   375	        /* ensure the stack is enough when generating error messages. */
   376	        stack_resize(vm, size + 1);
   377	        be_raise(vm, "runtime_error", STACK_OVER_MSG(BE_STACK_TOTAL_MAX));
   378	    }
   379	    stack_resize(vm, size + n);
   380	}
   381	
   382	static void fixup_exceptstack(bvm* vm, struct bexecptframe* lbase)
   383	{
   384	    struct bexecptframe *base = be_stack_base(&vm->exceptstack);
   385	    if (lbase != base) { /* the address has changed when the stack is expanded */
   386	        struct bexecptframe *top = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   387	        bbyte *begin = (bbyte*)&lbase->errjmp;
   388	        bbyte *end = (bbyte*)&(lbase + (top - base))->errjmp;
   389	        intptr_t offset = ptr_offset(base, lbase);
   390	        struct blongjmp *errjmp = vm->errjmp;
   391	        while (errjmp) {
   392	            bbyte *prev = (bbyte*)errjmp->prev;
   393	            if (prev >= begin && prev < end) {
   394	                fixup_ptr(prev, offset); /* fixup the prev pointer */
   395	                errjmp->prev = (struct blongjmp*)prev;
   396	            }
   397	            errjmp = (struct blongjmp*)prev;
   398	        }
   399	    }
   400	}
   401	
   402	/* set an exception handling recovery point. To do this, we have to
   403	 * push some VM states into the exception stack. */
   404	void be_except_block_setup(bvm *vm)
   405	{
   406	    struct bexecptframe *frame;
   407	    struct bexecptframe *lbase = be_stack_base(&vm->exceptstack);
   408	    be_stack_push(vm, &vm->exceptstack, NULL);
   409	    frame = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   410	    frame->depth = be_stack_count(&vm->callstack); /* the call stack depth */
   411	    frame->ip = vm->ip; /* OP_EXBLK's next instruction pointer */
   412	    /* set longjmp() jump point */
   413	    frame->errjmp.status = 0;
   414	    frame->errjmp.prev = vm->errjmp; /* save long jump list */
   415	    vm->errjmp = &frame->errjmp;
   416	    fixup_exceptstack(vm, lbase);
   417	}
   418	
   419	/* resumes to the state of the previous frame when an exception occurs. */
   420	void be_except_block_resume(bvm *vm)
   421	{
   422	    int errorcode = vm->errjmp->status;
   423	    struct bexecptframe *frame = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   424	    if (errorcode == BE_EXCEPTION) {
   425	        vm->errjmp = vm->errjmp->prev;
   426	        /* jump to except instruction */
   427	        vm->ip = frame->ip + IGET_sBx(frame->ip[-1]);
   428	        if (be_stack_count(&vm->callstack) > frame->depth) {
   429	            bvalue *top = vm->top;
   430	            bcallframe *cf = be_vector_at(&vm->callstack, frame->depth);
   431	            vm->top = cf->top;
   432	            vm->reg = cf->reg;
   433	            vm->cf = frame->depth ? cf - 1 : NULL;
   434	            be_vector_resize(vm, &vm->callstack, frame->depth);
   435	            /* copy the exception value and argument to the top of
   436	             * the current function */
   437	            vm->top[0] = top[0]; /* exception value */
   438	            vm->top[1] = top[1]; /* exception argument */
   439	        }
   440	        be_stack_pop(&vm->exceptstack);
   441	    } else { /* other errors cannot be catch by the except block */
   442	        /* find the next error handling location */
   443	        while (vm->errjmp == &frame->errjmp) {
   444	            vm->errjmp = vm->errjmp->prev;
   445	            be_stack_pop(&vm->exceptstack);
   446	            frame = be_stack_top(&vm->exceptstack);
   447	        }
   448	        be_throw(vm, errorcode); /* rethrow this exception */
   449	    }
   450	}
   451	
   452	/* only close the except block, no other operations */
   453	void be_except_block_close(bvm *vm, int count)
   454	{
   455	    struct bexecptframe *frame;
   456	    int size = be_stack_count(&vm->exceptstack);
   457	    be_assert(count > 0 && count <= size);
   458	    frame = be_vector_at(&vm->exceptstack, size - count);
   459	    vm->errjmp = frame->errjmp.prev;
   460	    be_vector_resize(vm, &vm->exceptstack, size - count);
   461	}
   462	
   463	void be_save_stacktrace(bvm *vm)
   464	{
   465	    bstack *stack = &vm->tracestack;
   466	    be_stack_clear(stack);
   467	    if (be_stack_count(&vm->callstack)) {
   468	        bcallframe *cf;
   469	        bcallframe *base = be_stack_base(&vm->callstack);
   470	        bcallframe *top = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   471	        for (cf = base; cf <= top; ++cf) {
   472	            bcallsnapshot *st;
   473	            be_stack_push(vm, stack, NULL);
   474	            st = be_stack_top(stack);
   475	            st->func = *cf->func;
   476	            st->ip = cf == top ? vm->ip : cf[1].ip;
   477	        }
   478	    }
   479	}

    79	static void match_token(bparser *parser, btokentype type)
    80	{
    81	    if (next_type(parser) != type) { /* error when token is no match */
    82	        btoken *token = &next_token(parser);
    83	        const char *s1 = be_tokentype2str(type);
    84	        const char *s2 = be_token2str(parser->vm, token);
    85	        push_error(parser, "expected '%s' before '%s'", s1, s2);
    86	    }
    87	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip this token */
    88	}
    89	
    90	static void match_notoken(bparser *parser, btokentype type)
    91	{
    92	    if (next_type(parser) == type) { /* error when token is match */
    93	        push_error(parser,
    94	            "expected statement before '%s'", token2str(parser));
    95	    }
    96	}

    98	static void check_symbol(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
    99	{
   100	    if (e->type == ETVOID && e->v.s == NULL) { /* error when token is not a symbol */
   101	        push_error(parser,
   102	            "unexpected symbol near '%s'", token2str(parser));
   103	    }
   104	}
   105	
   106	static void check_var(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   107	{
   108	    check_symbol(parser, e); /* check the token is a symbol */
   109	    if (e->type == ETVOID) { /* error when symbol is undefined */
   110	        int line = parser->lexer.linenumber;
   111	        parser->lexer.linenumber = parser->lexer.lastline;
   112	        push_error(parser,
   113	            "'%s' undeclared (first use in this function)", str(e->v.s));
   114	        parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   115	    }
   116	}

   118	static int match_skip(bparser *parser, btokentype type)
   119	{
   120	    if (next_type(parser) == type) { /* match */
   121	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip this token */
   122	        return btrue;
   123	    }
   124	    return bfalse;
   125	}

   128	{
   129	    if (next_type(parser) == TokenId) {
   130	        bstring *str = next_token(parser).u.s;
   131	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip ID */
   132	        return str;
   133	    }
   134	    return NULL;

   139	void begin_varinfo(bparser *parser, bstring *name)
   140	{
   141	    bvarinfo *var;
   142	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   143	    be_vector_push_c(parser->vm, &finfo->varvec, NULL);
   144	    var = be_vector_end(&finfo->varvec);
   145	    var->name = name;
   146	    var->beginpc = finfo->pc;
   147	    var->endpc = 0; /*  */
   148	    finfo->proto->varinfo = be_vector_data(&finfo->varvec);
   149	    finfo->proto->nvarinfo = be_vector_capacity(&finfo->varvec);

   151	
   152	void end_varinfo(bparser *parser, int beginpc)
   153	{
   154	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   155	    bblockinfo *binfo = finfo->binfo;
   156	    bvarinfo *it = be_vector_data(&finfo->varvec);
   157	    bvarinfo *end = be_vector_end(&finfo->varvec);
   158	    if (beginpc == -1) /* use block->beginpc by default */
   159	        beginpc = binfo->beginpc;
   160	    /* skip the variable of the previous blocks */
   161	    for (; it->beginpc < beginpc; ++it);
   162	    for (; it <= end; ++it) {
   163	        if (!it->endpc) /* write to endpc only once */
   164	            it->endpc = finfo->pc;
   165	    }
   166	}

   175	static void begin_block(bfuncinfo *finfo, bblockinfo *binfo, int type)
   176	{
   177	    binfo->prev = finfo->binfo;
   178	    finfo->binfo = binfo;
   179	    binfo->type = (bbyte)type;
   180	    binfo->hasupval = 0;
   181	    binfo->beginpc = finfo->pc;
   182	    binfo->nactlocals = (bbyte)be_list_count(finfo->local);
   183	    if (type & BLOCK_LOOP) {
   184	        binfo->breaklist = NO_JUMP;
   185	        binfo->continuelist = NO_JUMP;
   186	    }
   187	}
   188	
   189	static void end_block_ex(bparser *parser, int beginpc)
   190	{
   191	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   192	    bblockinfo *binfo = finfo->binfo;
   193	    be_code_close(finfo, 0); /* close upvalues */
   194	    if (binfo->type & BLOCK_LOOP) {
   195	        be_code_jumpto(finfo, binfo->beginpc);
   196	        be_code_patchjump(finfo, binfo->breaklist);
   197	        be_code_patchlist(finfo, binfo->continuelist, binfo->beginpc);
   198	    }
   199	    end_varinfo(parser, beginpc);
   200	    be_list_resize(parser->vm, finfo->local, binfo->nactlocals);
   201	    finfo->freereg = binfo->nactlocals;
   202	    finfo->binfo = binfo->prev;
   203	}
   204	
   205	static void end_block(bparser *parser)
   206	{
   207	    end_block_ex(parser, -1);
   208	}

   219	{
   220	    bvm *vm = parser->vm;

   231	    proto->ptab = be_vector_data(&finfo->pvec);
   232	    proto->nproto = be_vector_capacity(&finfo->pvec);
   233	    proto->source = parser_source(parser);
   234	    finfo->local = be_list_new(vm);
   235	    var_setlist(vm->top, finfo->local);
   236	    be_stackpush(vm);
   237	    finfo->upval = be_map_new(vm);
   238	    var_setmap(vm->top, finfo->upval);
   239	    be_stackpush(vm);
   240	    finfo->prev = parser->finfo;
   241	    finfo->lexer = &parser->lexer;
   242	    finfo->proto = proto;
   243	    finfo->freereg = 0;

   250	    proto->lineinfo = be_vector_data(&finfo->linevec);
   251	    proto->nlineinfo = be_vector_capacity(&finfo->linevec);
   252	#endif
   253	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   254	    be_vector_init(vm, &finfo->varvec, sizeof(bvarinfo));
   255	    proto->varinfo = be_vector_data(&finfo->varvec);
   256	    proto->nvarinfo = be_vector_capacity(&finfo->varvec);
   257	#endif
   258	    begin_block(finfo, binfo, 0);

   260	
   261	static void setupvals(bfuncinfo *finfo)
   262	{
   263	    bproto *proto = finfo->proto;
   264	    int nupvals = be_map_count(finfo->upval);
   265	    if (nupvals) {
   266	        bmapnode *node;
   267	        bmap *map = finfo->upval;
   268	        bmapiter iter = be_map_iter();
   269	        bupvaldesc *upvals = be_malloc(
   270	                finfo->lexer->vm, sizeof(bupvaldesc) * nupvals);
   271	        while ((node = be_map_next(map, &iter)) != NULL) {
   272	            uint32_t v = (uint32_t)var_toint(&node->value);
   273	            bupvaldesc *uv = upvals + upval_index(v);
   274	            uv->idx = upval_target(v);
   275	            uv->instack = upval_instack(v);
   276	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   277	            uv->name = var_tostr(&node->key);
   278	#endif
   279	        }
   280	        proto->upvals = upvals;
   281	        proto->nupvals = (bbyte)nupvals;
   282	    }
   283	}

   286	{
   287	    bvm *vm = parser->vm;
   288	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;

   290	
   291	    be_code_ret(finfo, NULL); /* append a return to last code */
   292	    end_block(parser);
   293	    setupvals(finfo);
   294	    proto->code = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->code);
   295	    proto->codesize = finfo->pc;
   296	    proto->ktab = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->kvec);
   297	    proto->nconst = be_vector_count(&finfo->kvec);
   298	    proto->ptab = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->pvec);
   299	    proto->nproto = be_vector_count(&finfo->pvec);
   300	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   301	    proto->lineinfo = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->linevec);
   302	    proto->nlineinfo = be_vector_count(&finfo->linevec);
   303	#endif
   304	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   305	    proto->varinfo = be_vector_release(vm, &finfo->varvec);
   306	    proto->nvarinfo = be_vector_count(&finfo->varvec);
   307	#endif
   308	    parser->finfo = parser->finfo->prev;
   309	    be_stackpop(vm, 2); /* pop upval and local */

   312	static btokentype get_binop(bparser *parser)
   313	{
   314	    btokentype op = next_type(parser);
   315	    if (op >= OptAdd && op <= OptOr) {
   316	        return op;
   317	    }
   318	    return OP_NOT_BINARY;
   319	}
   320	
   321	static btokentype get_unary_op(bparser *parser)
   322	{
   323	    btokentype op = next_type(parser);
   324	    if (op == OptSub || op == OptNot || op == OptFlip) {
   325	        return op; /* operator 'negative' 'not' and 'flip' */
   326	    }
   327	    return OP_NOT_UNARY;
   328	}
   329	
   330	static btokentype get_assign_op(bparser *parser)
   331	{
   332	    btokentype op = next_type(parser);
   333	    if (op >= OptAssign && op <= OptRsfAssign) {
   334	        return op;
   335	    }
   336	    return OP_NOT_ASSIGN;
   337	}

   339	static void init_exp(bexpdesc *e, exptype_t type, bint i)
   340	{
   341	    e->type = (bbyte)type;
   342	    e->t = NO_JUMP;
   343	    e->f = NO_JUMP;
   344	    e->not = 0;
   345	    e->v.s = NULL;
   346	    e->v.i = i;
   347	}
   348	
   349	static int find_localvar(bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *s, int begin)
   350	{
   351	    int i, count = be_list_count(finfo->local);
   352	    bvalue *var = be_list_data(finfo->local);
   353	    for (i = count - 1; i >= begin; --i) {
   354	        if (be_eqstr(var[i].v.s, s)) {
   355	            return i;
   356	        }
   357	    }
   358	    return -1; /* not found */
   359	}
   360	
   361	static int new_localvar(bparser *parser, bstring *name)
   362	{
   363	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   364	    int reg = find_localvar(finfo, name, finfo->binfo->nactlocals);
   365	    if (reg == -1) {
   366	        bvalue *var;
   367	        reg = be_list_count(finfo->local); /* new local index */
   368	        var = be_list_push(parser->vm, finfo->local, NULL);
   369	        var_setstr(var, name);
   370	        if (reg >= finfo->freereg) {
   371	            be_code_allocregs(finfo, 1); /* use a register */
   372	        }
   373	        begin_varinfo(parser, name);
   374	    }
   375	    return reg;
   376	}
   377	
   378	static int find_upval(bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *s)
   379	{
   380	    bvm *vm = finfo->lexer->vm;
   381	    bvalue *desc = be_map_findstr(vm, finfo->upval, s);
   382	    if (desc) {
   383	        return upval_index(desc->v.i);
   384	    }
   385	    return -1;
   386	}
   387	
   388	static void mark_upval(bfuncinfo *finfo, int level)
   389	{
   390	    bblockinfo *binfo = finfo->prev->binfo;
   391	    while (binfo->nactlocals > level) {
   392	        binfo = binfo->prev;
   393	    }
   394	    binfo->hasupval = 1;
   395	}
   396	
   397	static int new_upval(bvm *vm, bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *name, bexpdesc *var)
   398	{
   399	    int index;
   400	    bvalue *desc;
   401	    int target = var->v.idx;
   402	    int instack = var->type == ETLOCAL;
   403	    if (instack) { /* mark upvalue's block */
   404	        mark_upval(finfo, target);
   405	    }
   406	    index = be_map_count(finfo->upval);
   407	    if (index >= 255) {
   408	        be_lexerror(finfo->lexer, be_pushfstring(vm,
   409	            "too many upvalues (in '%s')", str(name)));
   410	    }
   411	    desc = be_map_insertstr(vm, finfo->upval, name, NULL);
   412	    var_setint(desc, upval_desc(index, target, instack));
   413	    return index;
   414	}
   415	
   416	static void new_var(bparser *parser, bstring *name, bexpdesc *var)
   417	{
   418	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   419	    if (finfo->prev || finfo->binfo->prev || parser->islocal) {
   420	        init_exp(var, ETLOCAL, 0);
   421	        var->v.idx = new_localvar(parser, name);
   422	    } else {
   423	        init_exp(var, ETGLOBAL, 0);
   424	        var->v.idx = be_global_new(parser->vm, name);
   425	        if (var->v.idx > (int)IBx_MASK) {
   426	            push_error(parser,
   427	                "too many global variables (in '%s')", str(name));
   428	        }
   429	    }
   430	}
   431	
   432	static int singlevaraux(bvm *vm, bfuncinfo *finfo, bstring *s, bexpdesc *var)
   433	{
   434	    if (finfo == NULL) {
   435	        return ETVOID;
   436	    } else {
   437	        int idx = find_localvar(finfo, s, 0);
   438	        if (idx >= 0) { /* local variable */
   439	            init_exp(var, ETLOCAL, 0);
   440	            var->v.idx = idx;
   441	            return ETLOCAL;
   442	        } else {
   443	            idx = find_upval(finfo, s);
   444	            if (idx < 0) {
   445	                /* find the previous scope  */
   446	                int res = singlevaraux(vm, finfo->prev, s, var);
   447	                if (res == ETUPVAL || res == ETLOCAL) {
   448	                    idx = new_upval(vm, finfo, s, var); /* new upvalue */
   449	                } else if (be_global_find(vm, s) >= 0) {
   450	                    return ETGLOBAL; /* global variable */
   451	                } else {
   452	                    return ETVOID; /* unknow (new variable or error) */
   453	                }
   454	            }
   455	            init_exp(var, ETUPVAL, idx);
   456	            return ETUPVAL;
   457	        }
   458	    }
   459	}
   460	
   461	static void singlevar(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *var)
   462	{
   463	    bstring *varname = next_token(parser).u.s;
   464	    int type = singlevaraux(parser->vm, parser->finfo, varname, var);
   465	    switch (type) {
   466	    case ETVOID:
   467	        init_exp(var, ETVOID, 0);
   468	        var->v.s = varname;
   469	        break;
   470	    case ETGLOBAL:
   471	        init_exp(var, ETGLOBAL, 0);
   472	        var->v.idx = be_global_find(parser->vm, varname);
   473	        break;
   474	    default:
   475	        break;
   476	    }
   477	}
   478	
   479	static void func_varlist(bparser *parser)
   480	{
   481	    bexpdesc v;
   482	    bstring *str;
   483	    /* '(' [ID {',' ID}] ')' */
   484	    match_token(parser, OptLBK); /* skip '(' */
   485	    if (match_id(parser, str) != NULL) {
   486	        new_var(parser, str, &v); /* new variable */
   487	        while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   488	            str = next_token(parser).u.s;
   489	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
   490	            /* new local variable */
   491	            if (find_localvar(parser->finfo, str, 0) == -1) {
   492	                new_var(parser, str, &v);
   493	            } else {
   494	                push_error(parser, "redefinition of '%s'", str(str));
   495	            }
   496	        }
   497	    }
   498	    match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   499	    parser->finfo->proto->argc = parser->finfo->freereg;
   500	}
   501	
   502	static bproto* funcbody(bparser *parser, bstring *name, int type)
   503	{
   504	    bfuncinfo finfo;
   505	    bblockinfo binfo;
   506	
   507	    /* '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
   508	    begin_func(parser, &finfo, &binfo);
   509	    finfo.proto->name = name;
   510	    if (type & FUNC_METHOD) {
   511	        new_localvar(parser, parser_newstr(parser, "self"));
   512	    }
   513	    func_varlist(parser);
   514	    stmtlist(parser);
   515	    end_func(parser);
   516	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
   517	    return finfo.proto;
   518	}
   519	
   520	/* anonymous function */
   521	static void anon_func(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   522	{
   523	    bproto *proto;
   524	    bstring *name = parser_newstr(parser, "<anonymous>");
   525	    /* 'def' ID '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
   526	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'def' */
   527	    proto = funcbody(parser, name, FUNC_ANONYMOUS);
   528	    init_exp(e, ETPROTO, be_code_proto(parser->finfo, proto));
   529	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
   530	}
   531	
   532	static void lambda_varlist(bparser *parser)
   533	{
   534	    bexpdesc v;
   535	    bstring *str;
   536	    /* [ID {',' ID}] | {ID}] */
   537	    if (match_id(parser, str) != NULL) {
   538	        bbool comma;
   539	        new_var(parser, str, &v); /* new variable */
   540	        comma = next_type(parser) == OptComma;
   541	        while (next_type(parser) != OptArrow) {
   542	            if (comma) {
   543	                match_token(parser, OptComma); /* match and skip ',' */
   544	            }
   545	            str = next_token(parser).u.s;
   546	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
   547	            /* new local variable */
   548	            if (find_localvar(parser->finfo, str, 0) == -1) {
   549	                new_var(parser, str, &v);
   550	            } else {
   551	                push_error(parser, "redefinition of '%s'", str(str));
   552	            }
   553	        }
   554	    }
   555	    match_token(parser, OptArrow); /* skip '->' */
   556	    parser->finfo->proto->argc = parser->finfo->freereg;
   557	}
   558	
   559	/* lambda expression */
   560	static void lambda_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   561	{
   562	    bexpdesc e1;
   563	    bfuncinfo finfo;
   564	    bblockinfo binfo;
   565	    bstring *name = parser_newstr(parser, "<lambda>");
   566	    /* '/' ID {[',' ID]} '->' expr */
   567	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '/' */
   568	    begin_func(parser, &finfo, &binfo);
   569	    finfo.proto->name = name;
   570	    lambda_varlist(parser);
   571	    expr(parser, &e1);
   572	    check_var(parser, &e1);
   573	    be_code_ret(parser->finfo, &e1);
   574	    end_func(parser);
   575	    init_exp(e, ETPROTO, be_code_proto(parser->finfo, finfo.proto));
   576	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
   577	}
   578	
   579	static void new_primtype(bparser *parser, const char *type, bexpdesc *e)
   580	{
   581	    int idx;
   582	    bvm *vm = parser->vm;
   583	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   584	
   585	    scan_next_token(parser);
   586	    idx = be_builtin_find(vm, parser_newstr(parser, type));
   587	    init_exp(e, ETGLOBAL, idx);
   588	    idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   589	    be_code_call(finfo, idx, 0);
   590	    e->type = ETLOCAL;
   591	}
   592	
   593	static void list_nextmember(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *l)
   594	{
   595	    bexpdesc e, v = *l;
   596	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   597	    expr(parser, &e); /* value */
   598	    check_var(parser, &e);
   599	    be_code_binop(finfo, OptConnect, &v, &e);
   600	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1);
   601	}
   602	
   603	static void map_nextmember(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *l)
   604	{
   605	    bexpdesc e, v = *l;
   606	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   607	    expr(parser, &e); /* key */
   608	    check_var(parser, &e);
   609	    be_code_index(finfo, &v, &e);
   610	    match_token(parser, OptColon); /* ':' */
   611	    expr(parser, &e); /* value */
   612	    check_var(parser, &e);
   613	    be_code_setvar(finfo, &v, &e);
   614	}
   615	
   616	static void list_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   617	{
   618	    /* '[' {expr ','} [expr] ']' */
   619	    new_primtype(parser, "list", e); /* new list */
   620	    while (next_type(parser) != OptRSB) {
   621	        list_nextmember(parser, e);
   622	        if (!match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   623	            break;
   624	        }
   625	    }
   626	    e->type = ETREG;
   627	    match_token(parser, OptRSB); /* skip ']' */
   628	}
   629	
   630	static void map_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   631	{
   632	    /* '{' {expr ':' expr ','} [expr ':' expr] '}' */
   633	    new_primtype(parser, "map", e); /* new map */
   634	    while (next_type(parser) != OptRBR) {
   635	        map_nextmember(parser, e);
   636	        if (!match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   637	            break;
   638	        }
   639	    }
   640	    e->type = ETREG;
   641	    match_token(parser, OptRBR); /* skip '}' */
   642	}
   643	
   644	static int exprlist(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   645	{
   646	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   647	    int n = 1;
   648	    /* expr { ',' expr } */
   649	    expr(parser, e);
   650	    check_var(parser, e);
   651	    be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   652	    while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
   653	        expr(parser, e);
   654	        check_var(parser, e);
   655	        be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   656	        ++n;
   657	    }
   658	    return n;
   659	}
   660	
   661	static void call_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   662	{
   663	    bexpdesc args;
   664	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   665	    int argc = 0, base;
   666	    int ismember = e->type == ETMEMBER;
   667	
   668	    /* func '(' [exprlist] ')' */
   669	    check_var(parser, e);
   670	    /* code function index to next register */
   671	    if (ismember) {
   672	        base = be_code_getmethod(finfo, e);
   673	    } else {
   674	        base = be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   675	    }
   676	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '(' */
   677	    if (next_type(parser) != OptRBK) {
   678	        argc = exprlist(parser, &args);
   679	    }
   680	    match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   681	    argc += ismember;
   682	    be_code_call(finfo, base, argc);
   683	    if (e->type != ETREG) {
   684	        e->type = ETREG;
   685	        e->v.idx = base;
   686	    }
   687	}
   688	
   689	static void member_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   690	{
   691	    bstring *str;
   692	    /* . ID */
   693	    check_var(parser, e);
   694	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '.' */
   695	    if (match_id(parser, str) != NULL) {
   696	        bexpdesc key;
   697	        init_exp(&key, ETSTRING, 0);
   698	        key.v.s = str;
   699	        be_code_member(parser->finfo, e, &key);
   700	    } else {
   701	        push_error(parser, "invalid syntax near '%s'",
   702	            be_token2str(parser->vm, &next_token(parser)));
   703	    }
   704	}
   705	
   706	static void index_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   707	{
   708	    bexpdesc e1;
   709	    /* [expr] */
   710	    check_var(parser, e);
   711	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '[' */
   712	    expr(parser, &e1);
   713	    check_var(parser, &e1);
   714	    be_code_index(parser->finfo, e, &e1);
   715	    match_token(parser, OptRSB); /* skip ']' */
   716	}
   717	
   718	static void simple_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   719	{
   720	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
   721	    case TokenInteger:
   722	        init_exp(e, ETINT, next_token(parser).u.i);
   723	        break;
   724	    case TokenReal:
   725	        init_exp(e, ETREAL, 0);
   726	        e->v.r = next_token(parser).u.r;
   727	        break;
   728	    case TokenString:
   729	        init_exp(e, ETSTRING, 0);
   730	        e->v.s = next_token(parser).u.s;
   731	        break;
   732	    case TokenId:
   733	        singlevar(parser, e);
   734	        break;
   735	    case KeyTrue:
   736	        init_exp(e, ETBOOL, 1);
   737	        break;
   738	    case KeyFalse:
   739	        init_exp(e, ETBOOL, 0);
   740	        break;
   741	    case KeyNil:
   742	        init_exp(e, ETNIL, 0);
   743	        break;
   744	    default: /* unknow expr */
   745	        return;
   746	    }
   747	    scan_next_token(parser);
   748	}
   749	
   750	static void primary_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   751	{
   752	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
   753	    case OptLBK: /* '(' expr ')' */
   754	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '(' */
   755	        /* sub_expr() is more efficient because there is no need to initialize e. */
   756	        sub_expr(parser, e, ASSIGN_OP_PRIO);
   757	        check_var(parser, e);
   758	        match_token(parser, OptRBK); /* skip ')' */
   759	        break;
   760	    case OptLSB: /* list */
   761	        list_expr(parser, e);
   762	        break;
   763	    case OptLBR: /* map */
   764	        map_expr(parser, e);
   765	        break;
   766	    case KeyDef: /* anonymous function */
   767	        anon_func(parser, e);
   768	        break;
   769	    case OptDiv: /* lambda expression */
   770	        lambda_expr(parser, e);
   771	        break;
   772	    default: /* simple expr */
   773	        simple_expr(parser, e);
   774	        break;
   775	    }
   776	}
   777	
   778	static void suffix_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   779	{
   780	    primary_expr(parser, e);
   781	    for (;;) {
   782	        switch (next_type(parser)) {
   783	        case OptLBK: /* '(' function call */
   784	            call_expr(parser, e);
   785	            break;
   786	        case OptDot: /* '.' member */
   787	            member_expr(parser, e);
   788	            break;
   789	        case OptLSB: /* '[' index */
   790	            index_expr(parser, e);
   791	            break;
   792	        default:
   793	            return;
   794	        }
   795	    }
   796	}
   797	
   798	static void suffix_alloc_reg(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *l)
   799	{
   800	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   801	    bbool suffix = l->type == ETINDEX || l->type == ETMEMBER;
   802	    /* in the suffix expression, if the object is a temporary
   803	     * variable (l->v.ss.tt == ETREG), it needs to be cached. */
   804	    if (suffix && l->v.ss.tt == ETREG) {
   805	        be_code_allocregs(finfo, 1);
   806	    }
   807	}
   808	
   809	/* compound assignment */
   810	static void compound_assign(bparser *parser, int op, bexpdesc *l, bexpdesc *r)
   811	{
   812	    if (op != OptAssign) { /* check left variable */
   813	        check_var(parser, l);
   814	        /* cache the register of the object when continuously assigning */
   815	        suffix_alloc_reg(parser, l);
   816	    }
   817	    expr(parser, r); /* right expression */
   818	    check_var(parser, r);
   819	    if (op != OptAssign) { /* compound assignment */
   820	        bexpdesc e = *l;
   821	        op = op < OptAndAssign ? op - OptAddAssign + OptAdd
   822	                : op - OptAndAssign + OptBitAnd;
   823	        be_code_binop(parser->finfo, op, &e, r); /* coding operation */
   824	        *r = e;
   825	    }
   826	}
   827	
   828	static int check_newvar(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   829	{
   830	    if (e->type == ETGLOBAL) {
   831	        if (e->v.idx < be_builtin_count(parser->vm)) {
   832	            e->v.s = be_builtin_name(parser->vm, e->v.idx);
   833	            return btrue;
   834	        }
   835	        return bfalse;
   836	    }
   837	    return e->type == ETVOID;
   838	}
   839	
   840	static void assign_expr(bparser *parser)
   841	{
   842	    bexpdesc e;
   843	    btokentype op;
   844	    int line = parser->lexer.linenumber;
   845	    expr(parser, &e); /* left expression */
   846	    check_symbol(parser, &e);
   847	    op = get_assign_op(parser);
   848	    if (op != OP_NOT_ASSIGN) { /* assign operator */
   849	        bexpdesc e1;
   850	        scan_next_token(parser);
   851	        compound_assign(parser, op, &e, &e1);
   852	        if (check_newvar(parser, &e)) { /* new variable */
   853	            new_var(parser, e.v.s, &e);
   854	        }
   855	        if (be_code_setvar(parser->finfo, &e, &e1)) {
   856	            parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   857	            parser_error(parser,
   858	                "try to assign constant expressions.");
   859	        }
   860	    } else if (e.type >= ETMEMBER) {
   861	        bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   862	        /* these expressions occupy a register and need to be freed */
   863	        finfo->freereg = (bbyte)be_list_count(finfo->local);
   864	    } else if (e.type == ETVOID) { /* not assign expression */
   865	        /* undeclared symbol */
   866	        parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   867	        check_var(parser, &e);
   868	    } 
   869	}
   870	
   871	/* conditional expression */
   872	static void cond_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   873	{
   874	    /* expr '?' expr ':' expr */
   875	    if (next_type(parser) == OptQuestion) {
   876	        int jf, jl = NO_JUMP; /* jump list */
   877	        bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   878	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '?' */
   879	        be_code_jumpbool(finfo, e, bfalse); /* go if true */
   880	        jf = e->f;
   881	        expr(parser, e);
   882	        check_var(parser, e);
   883	        be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   884	        be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1);
   885	        be_code_conjump(finfo, &jl, be_code_jump(finfo)); /* connect jump */
   886	        be_code_patchjump(finfo, jf);
   887	        match_token(parser, OptColon); /* match and skip ':' */
   888	        expr(parser, e);
   889	        check_var(parser, e);
   890	        e->v.idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, e);
   891	        be_code_patchjump(finfo, jl);
   892	        e->type = ETREG;
   893	    }
   894	}
   895	
   896	/* binary operator: + - * / % && || < <= == != > >=
   897	 * unary operator: + - !
   898	 */
   899	static void sub_expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e, int prio)
   900	{
   901	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   902	    btokentype op = get_unary_op(parser);
   903	    if (op != OP_NOT_UNARY) {
   904	        int line, res;
   905	        scan_next_token(parser);
   906	        line = parser->lexer.linenumber;
   907	        sub_expr(parser, e, UNARY_OP_PRIO);
   908	        check_var(parser, e);
   909	        res = be_code_unop(finfo, op, e);
   910	        if (res) { /* encode unary op */
   911	            parser->lexer.linenumber = line;
   912	            push_error(parser, "wrong type argument to unary '%s'",
   913	                res == 1 ? "negative" : "bit-flip");
   914	        }
   915	    } else {
   916	        suffix_expr(parser, e);
   917	    }
   918	    op = get_binop(parser);
   919	    while (op != OP_NOT_BINARY && prio > binary_op_prio(op)) {
   920	        bexpdesc e2;
   921	        check_var(parser, e);
   922	        scan_next_token(parser);
   923	        be_code_prebinop(finfo, op, e); /* and or */
   924	        init_exp(&e2, ETVOID, 0);
   925	        sub_expr(parser, &e2, binary_op_prio(op));
   926	        check_var(parser, &e2);
   927	        be_code_binop(finfo, op, e, &e2); /* encode binary op */
   928	        op = get_binop(parser);
   929	    }
   930	    if (prio == ASSIGN_OP_PRIO) {
   931	        cond_expr(parser, e);
   932	    }
   933	}
   934	
   935	static void expr(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
   936	{
   937	    init_exp(e, ETVOID, 0);
   938	    sub_expr(parser, e, ASSIGN_OP_PRIO);
   939	}
   940	
   941	static void expr_stmt(bparser *parser)
   942	{
   943	    assign_expr(parser);
   944	}
   945	
   946	static int block_follow(bparser *parser)
   947	{
   948	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
   949	    case KeyElse: case KeyElif:
   950	    case KeyEnd: case KeyExcept:
   951	    case TokenEOS:
   952	        return 0;
   953	    default:
   954	        return 1;
   955	    }
   956	}
   957	
   958	static int cond_stmt(bparser *parser)
   959	{
   960	    bexpdesc e;
   961	    /* expr */
   962	    match_notoken(parser, OptRBK);
   963	    expr(parser, &e);
   964	    check_var(parser, &e);
   965	    be_code_jumpbool(parser->finfo, &e, bfalse); /* go if true */
   966	    return e.f;
   967	}
   968	
   969	static void condition_block(bparser *parser, int *jmp)
   970	{
   971	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
   972	    int br = cond_stmt(parser);
   973	    block(parser, 0);
   974	    if (next_type(parser) == KeyElif
   975	            || next_type(parser) == KeyElse) {
   976	        be_code_conjump(finfo, jmp, be_code_jump(finfo)); /* connect jump */
   977	    }
   978	    be_code_patchjump(finfo, br);
   979	}
   980	
   981	static void if_stmt(bparser *parser)
   982	{
   983	    int jl = NO_JUMP; /* jump list */
   984	    /* IF expr block {ELSEIF expr block}, [ELSE block], end */
   985	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'if' */
   986	    condition_block(parser, &jl);
   987	    while (match_skip(parser, KeyElif)) { /* 'elif' */
   988	        condition_block(parser, &jl);
   989	    }
   990	    if (match_skip(parser, KeyElse)) { /* 'else' */
   991	        block(parser, 0);
   992	    }
   993	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip end */
   994	    be_code_patchjump(parser->finfo, jl);
   995	}
   996	
   997	static void do_stmt(bparser *parser)
   998	{
   999	    /* DO block END */
  1000	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'do' */
  1001	    block(parser, 0);
  1002	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1003	}
  1004	
  1005	static void while_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1006	{
  1007	    int brk;
  1008	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1009	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1010	    /* WHILE expr block END */
  1011	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'while' */
  1012	    begin_block(parser->finfo, &binfo, BLOCK_LOOP);
  1013	    brk = cond_stmt(parser);
  1014	    stmtlist(parser);
  1015	    end_block(parser);
  1016	    be_code_patchjump(finfo, brk);
  1017	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1018	}
  1019	
  1020	static bstring* for_itvar(bparser *parser)
  1021	{
  1022	    bstring *str;
  1023	    if (match_id(parser, str) == NULL) {
  1024	        push_error(parser,
  1025	            "missing iteration variable before '%s'",
  1026	            token2str(parser));
  1027	    }
  1028	    return str;
  1029	}
  1030	
  1031	static void for_init(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *v)
  1032	{
  1033	    bexpdesc e;
  1034	    bstring *s;
  1035	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1036	    /* .it = __iterator__(expr) */
  1037	    s = parser_newstr(parser, "__iterator__");
  1038	    init_exp(&e, ETGLOBAL, be_builtin_find(parser->vm, s));
  1039	    be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e); /* code function '__iterator__' */
  1040	    expr(parser, v);
  1041	    check_var(parser, v);
  1042	    be_code_nextreg(finfo, v);
  1043	    be_code_call(finfo, e.v.idx, 1); /* call __iterator__(expr) */
  1044	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1); /* free register of __iterator__ */
  1045	    s = parser_newstr(parser, ".it");
  1046	    init_exp(v, ETLOCAL, new_localvar(parser, s));
  1047	}
  1048	
  1049	static void for_iter(bparser *parser, bstring *var, bexpdesc *it)
  1050	{
  1051	    bexpdesc e;
  1052	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1053	    /* reset the jump head PC of the for loop body */
  1054	    finfo->binfo->beginpc = finfo->pc;
  1055	    /* itvar = .it() */
  1056	    init_exp(&e, ETLOCAL, new_localvar(parser, var)); /* new itvar */
  1057	    be_code_setvar(finfo, &e, it); /* code function to variable '.it' */
  1058	    be_code_call(finfo, e.v.idx, 0); /* itvar <- call .it() */
  1059	    stmtlist(parser);
  1060	}
  1061	
  1062	static void for_leave(bparser *parser, int jcatch, int beginpc)
  1063	{
  1064	    bexpdesc e;
  1065	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1066	    int jbrk = finfo->binfo->breaklist;
  1067	    init_exp(&e, ETSTRING, 0);
  1068	    e.v.s = parser_newstr(parser, "stop_iteration");
  1069	    end_block_ex(parser, beginpc); /* leave except & loop block */
  1070	    if (jbrk != NO_JUMP) { /* has `break` statement in iteration block */
  1071	        be_code_exblk(finfo, 1);
  1072	        jbrk = be_code_jump(finfo);
  1073	    }
  1074	    be_code_conjump(finfo, &jcatch, finfo->pc);
  1075	    be_code_catch(finfo, be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e), 1, 0, NULL);
  1076	    be_code_raise(finfo, NULL, NULL);
  1077	    be_code_conjump(finfo, &jbrk, finfo->pc);
  1078	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, 1);
  1079	}
  1080	
  1081	/* approximate equivalent script code:
  1082	 * .it = __iter__(expr)
  1083	 * try
  1084	 *     while (1)
  1085	 *         itvar = .it()
  1086	 *         stmtlist
  1087	 *     end
  1088	 * except ('stop_iteration')
  1089	 * end
  1090	 * */
  1091	static void for_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1092	{
  1093	    bstring *var;
  1094	    bexpdesc iter;
  1095	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1096	    int jcatch, beginpc = parser->finfo->pc;
  1097	    /* FOR ID : expr block END */
  1098	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'for' */
  1099	    begin_block(parser->finfo, &binfo, BLOCK_EXCEPT | BLOCK_LOOP);
  1100	    var = for_itvar(parser);
  1101	    match_token(parser, OptColon); /* skip ':' */
  1102	    for_init(parser, &iter);
  1103	    jcatch = be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, 0);
  1104	    for_iter(parser, var, &iter);
  1105	    for_leave(parser, jcatch, beginpc);
  1106	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1107	}
  1108	
  1109	static bblockinfo* break_block(bparser *parser)
  1110	{
  1111	    int try_depth = 0; /* count of exception catch blocks */
  1112	    bblockinfo *binfo = parser->finfo->binfo;
  1113	    /* BREAK | CONTINUE */
  1114	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'break' or 'continue' */
  1115	    while (binfo && !(binfo->type & BLOCK_LOOP)) {
  1116	        if (binfo->type & BLOCK_EXCEPT) {
  1117	            ++try_depth; /* leave the exception catch block */
  1118	        }
  1119	        binfo = binfo->prev;
  1120	    }
  1121	    if (binfo && try_depth) { /* exception catch blocks that needs to leave */
  1122	        be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, try_depth);
  1123	    }
  1124	    return binfo;
  1125	}
  1126	
  1127	static void break_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1128	{
  1129	    bfuncinfo *f = parser->finfo;
  1130	    bblockinfo *binfo = break_block(parser);
  1131	    if (binfo != NULL) { /* connect jump */
  1132	        be_code_conjump(f, &binfo->breaklist, be_code_jump(f));
  1133	    } else {
  1134	        parser_error(parser, "break not loop");
  1135	    }
  1136	}
  1137	
  1138	static void continue_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1139	{
  1140	    bfuncinfo *f = parser->finfo;
  1141	    bblockinfo *b = break_block(parser);
  1142	    if (b != NULL) { /* connect jump */
  1143	        be_code_conjump(f, &b->continuelist, be_code_jump(f));
  1144	    } else {
  1145	        parser_error(parser, "continue not loop");
  1146	    }
  1147	}
  1148	
  1149	static bbool isoverloadable(btokentype type)
  1150	{
  1151	    return (type >= OptAdd && type <= OptConnect) /* overloaded binary operator */
  1152	        || type == OptFlip || type == OptLBK;     /* '~' and '()' operator */
  1153	}
  1154	
  1155	static bstring* func_name(bparser* parser, bexpdesc* e, int ismethod)
  1156	{
  1157	    btokentype type = next_type(parser);
  1158	    if (type == TokenId) {
  1159	        bstring *name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1160	        if (!ismethod) {
  1161	            new_var(parser, name, e); /* new variable */
  1162	        }
  1163	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip name */
  1164	        return name;
  1165	    } else if (ismethod && isoverloadable(type)) {
  1166	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip token */
  1167	        /* '-*' negative operator */
  1168	        if (type == OptSub && next_type(parser) == OptMul) {
  1169	            scan_next_token(parser); /* skip '*' */
  1170	            return parser_newstr(parser, "-*");
  1171	        }
  1172	        /* '()' call operator */
  1173	        if (type == OptLBK && next_type(parser) == OptRBK) {
  1174	            scan_next_token(parser); /* skip ')' */
  1175	            return parser_newstr(parser, "()");
  1176	        }
  1177	        return parser_newstr(parser, be_tokentype2str(type));
  1178	    }
  1179	    push_error(parser,
  1180	        "the token '%s' is not a valid function name.",
  1181	        token2str(parser));
  1182	    return NULL;
  1183	}
  1184	
  1185	static void def_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1186	{
  1187	    bexpdesc e;
  1188	    bproto *proto;
  1189	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1190	    /* 'def' ID '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
  1191	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'def' */
  1192	    proto = funcbody(parser, func_name(parser, &e, 0), 0);
  1193	    be_code_closure(finfo, &e, be_code_proto(finfo, proto));
  1194	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
  1195	}
  1196	
  1197	static void return_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1198	{
  1199	    bexpdesc e;
  1200	    /* 'return' expr */
  1201	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'return' */
  1202	    expr(parser, &e);
  1203	    if (e.v.s) { /* expression is not empty */
  1204	        check_var(parser, &e);
  1205	    }
  1206	    be_code_ret(parser->finfo, &e);
  1207	}
  1208	
  1209	static void check_class_attr(bparser *parser, bclass *c, bstring *attr)
  1210	{
  1211	    if (be_class_attribute(parser->vm, c, attr) != BE_NIL) {
  1212	        push_error(parser,
  1213	            "redefinition of the attribute '%s'", str(attr));
  1214	    }
  1215	}
  1216	
  1217	static void classvar_stmt(bparser *parser, bclass *c)
  1218	{
  1219	    bstring *name;
  1220	    /* 'var' ID {',' ID} */
  1221	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'var' */
  1222	    if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1223	        check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1224	        be_member_bind(parser->vm, c, name);
  1225	        while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1226	            if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1227	                check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1228	                be_member_bind(parser->vm, c, name);
  1229	            } else {
  1230	                parser_error(parser, "class var error");
  1231	            }
  1232	        }
  1233	    } else {
  1234	        parser_error(parser, "class var error");
  1235	    }
  1236	}
  1237	
  1238	static void classdef_stmt(bparser *parser, bclass *c)
  1239	{
  1240	    bexpdesc e;
  1241	    bstring *name;
  1242	    bproto *proto;
  1243	    /* 'def' ID '(' varlist ')' block 'end' */
  1244	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'def' */
  1245	    name = func_name(parser, &e, 1);
  1246	    check_class_attr(parser, c, name);
  1247	    proto = funcbody(parser, name, FUNC_METHOD);
  1248	    be_method_bind(parser->vm, c, proto->name, proto);
  1249	    be_stackpop(parser->vm, 1);
  1250	}
  1251	
  1252	static void class_inherit(bparser *parser, bexpdesc *e)
  1253	{
  1254	    if (next_type(parser) == OptColon) { /* ':' */
  1255	        bexpdesc e1;
  1256	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip ':' */
  1257	        expr(parser, &e1);
  1258	        check_var(parser, &e1);
  1259	        be_code_setsuper(parser->finfo, e, &e1);
  1260	    }
  1261	}
  1262	
  1263	static void class_block(bparser *parser, bclass *c)
  1264	{
  1265	    /* { [;] } */
  1266	    while (block_follow(parser)) {
  1267	        switch (next_type(parser)) {
  1268	        case KeyVar: classvar_stmt(parser, c); break;
  1269	        case KeyDef: classdef_stmt(parser, c); break;
  1270	        case OptSemic: scan_next_token(parser); break;
  1271	        default: push_error(parser,
  1272	                "unexpected token '%s'", token2str(parser));
  1273	        }
  1274	    }
  1275	}
  1276	
  1277	static void class_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1278	{
  1279	    bstring *name;
  1280	    /* 'class' ID [':' ID] class_block 'end' */
  1281	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'class' */
  1282	    if (match_id(parser, name) != NULL) {
  1283	        bexpdesc e;
  1284	        bclass *c = be_newclass(parser->vm, name, NULL);
  1285	        new_var(parser, name, &e);
  1286	        be_code_class(parser->finfo, &e, c);
  1287	        class_inherit(parser, &e);
  1288	        class_block(parser, c);
  1289	        be_class_compress(parser->vm, c); /* compress class size */
  1290	        match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1291	    } else {
  1292	        parser_error(parser, "class name error");
  1293	    }
  1294	}
  1295	
  1296	static void import_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1297	{
  1298	    bstring *name; /* variable name */
  1299	    bexpdesc m, v;
  1300	    /* 'import' (ID (['as' ID] | {',' ID}) | STRING 'as' ID ) */
  1301	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'import' */
  1302	    init_exp(&m, ETSTRING, 0);
  1303	    m.v.s = name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1304	    if (next_type(parser) == TokenString) { /* STRING 'as' ID */
  1305	        scan_next_token(parser); /* skip the module path */
  1306	        match_token(parser, KeyAs); /* match and skip 'as' */
  1307	        name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1308	        match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1309	    } else { /* ID (['as' ID] | {',' ID}) */
  1310	        match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1311	        if (match_skip(parser, KeyAs)) { /* 'as' */
  1312	            name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1313	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1314	        } else { /* {',' ID} */
  1315	            while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1316	                new_var(parser, name, &v);
  1317	                be_code_import(parser->finfo, &m, &v); /* code import */
  1318	                init_exp(&m, ETSTRING, 0); /* scanning for next node */
  1319	                m.v.s = name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1320	                match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1321	            }
  1322	        }
  1323	    }
  1324	    new_var(parser, name, &v);
  1325	    be_code_import(parser->finfo, &m, &v);
  1326	}
  1327	
  1328	static void var_field(bparser *parser)
  1329	{
  1330	    /* ID ['=' expr] */
  1331	    bexpdesc e1, e2;
  1332	    bstring *name;
  1333	    name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1334	    match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1335	    if (match_skip(parser, OptAssign)) { /* '=' */
  1336	        expr(parser, &e2);
  1337	        check_var(parser, &e2);
  1338	    } else {
  1339	        init_exp(&e2, ETNIL, 0);
  1340	    }
  1341	    new_var(parser, name, &e1); /* new variable */
  1342	    be_code_setvar(parser->finfo, &e1, &e2);
  1343	}
  1344	
  1345	static void var_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1346	{
  1347	    /* 'var' ID ['=' expr] {',' ID ['=' expr]} */
  1348	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'var' */
  1349	    var_field(parser);
  1350	    while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1351	        var_field(parser);
  1352	    }
  1353	}
  1354	
  1355	static int except_case_list(bparser *parser, int *base)
  1356	{
  1357	    int idx;
  1358	    bexpdesc e;
  1359	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1360	    /* expr {',' expr} | '..' */
  1361	    if (match_skip(parser, OptConnect)) { /* '..' */
  1362	        *base = finfo->freereg;
  1363	        return 0;
  1364	    }
  1365	    expr(parser, &e); /* first exception expression */
  1366	    check_var(parser, &e);
  1367	    *base = idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e);
  1368	    while (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* ',' */
  1369	        expr(parser, &e);
  1370	        check_var(parser, &e);
  1371	        idx = be_code_nextreg(finfo, &e);
  1372	    }
  1373	    idx = idx - *base + 1; /* count of exception expression */
  1374	    be_code_freeregs(finfo, idx);
  1375	    return idx;
  1376	}
  1377	
  1378	static int except_var_list(bparser *parser, int base)
  1379	{
  1380	    bexpdesc v;
  1381	    (void)base; /* unused variable (no debugging) */
  1382	    /* [as ID [, ID]] */
  1383	    if (match_skip(parser, KeyAs)) { /* 'as' */
  1384	        bstring *name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1385	        match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1386	        new_var(parser, name, &v); /* new local variable */
  1387	        be_assert(v.type == ETLOCAL && v.v.idx == base);
  1388	        if (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) { /* match and skip ',' */
  1389	            name = next_token(parser).u.s;
  1390	            match_token(parser, TokenId); /* match and skip ID */
  1391	            new_var(parser, name, &v); /* new local variable */
  1392	            be_assert(v.type == ETLOCAL && v.v.idx == base + 1);
  1393	            return 2;
  1394	        }
  1395	        return 1;
  1396	    }
  1397	    return 0;
  1398	}
  1399	
  1400	static void except_block(bparser *parser, int *jmp, int *jbrk)
  1401	{
  1402	    int base = 0; /* the first register of the catch opcode */
  1403	    int ecnt = 0; /* exception cases count */
  1404	    int vcnt = 0; /* exception variable count */
  1405	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1406	    bfuncinfo *finfo = parser->finfo;
  1407	    /* 'except' (expr {',' expr} | '..') ['as' ID [',' ID]] */
  1408	    match_token(parser, KeyExcept); /* skip 'except' */
  1409	    begin_block(finfo, &binfo, 0); /* begin catch block */
  1410	    /* link from the previous except failure point */
  1411	    be_code_conjump(finfo, jmp, finfo->pc);
  1412	    /* (expr {',' expr} | '..') ['as' ID [',' ID]] */
  1413	    ecnt = except_case_list(parser, &base);
  1414	    vcnt = except_var_list(parser, base);
  1415	    be_code_catch(finfo, base, ecnt, vcnt, jmp);
  1416	    stmtlist(parser);
  1417	    be_code_conjump(finfo, jbrk, be_code_jump(finfo));
  1418	    end_block(parser); /* leave catch block */
  1419	}
  1420	
  1421	static void try_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1422	{
  1423	    int jcatch, jbrk;
  1424	    /* 'try' block 'except' except_stmt block 'end' */
  1425	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'try' */
  1426	    jcatch = be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, 0);
  1427	    block(parser, BLOCK_EXCEPT);
  1428	    be_code_exblk(parser->finfo, 1);
  1429	    jbrk = be_code_jump(parser->finfo);
  1430	    except_block(parser, &jcatch, &jbrk);
  1431	    while (next_type(parser) == KeyExcept) {
  1432	        except_block(parser, &jcatch, &jbrk);
  1433	    }
  1434	    be_code_patchjump(parser->finfo, jcatch);
  1435	    be_code_raise(parser->finfo, NULL, NULL);
  1436	    be_code_patchjump(parser->finfo, jbrk);
  1437	    match_token(parser, KeyEnd); /* skip 'end' */
  1438	}
  1439	
  1440	static void throw_stmt(bparser *parser)
  1441	{
  1442	    bexpdesc e1, e2;
  1443	    /* 'raise' expr */
  1444	    scan_next_token(parser); /* skip 'raise' */
  1445	    expr(parser, &e1);
  1446	    check_var(parser, &e1);
  1447	    if (match_skip(parser, OptComma)) {
  1448	        expr(parser, &e2);
  1449	        check_var(parser, &e2);
  1450	        be_code_raise(parser->finfo, &e1, &e2);
  1451	    } else {
  1452	        be_code_raise(parser->finfo, &e1, NULL);
  1453	    }
  1454	}
  1455	
  1456	static void statement(bparser *parser)
  1457	{
  1458	    switch (next_type(parser)) {
  1459	    case KeyIf: if_stmt(parser); break;
  1460	    case KeyWhile: while_stmt(parser); break;
  1461	    case KeyFor: for_stmt(parser); break;
  1462	    case KeyDo: do_stmt(parser); break;
  1463	    case KeyBreak: break_stmt(parser); break;
  1464	    case KeyContinue: continue_stmt(parser); break;
  1465	    case KeyDef: def_stmt(parser); break;
  1466	    case KeyClass: class_stmt(parser); break;
  1467	    case KeyReturn: return_stmt(parser); break;
  1468	    case KeyImport: import_stmt(parser); break;
  1469	    case KeyVar: var_stmt(parser); break;
  1470	    case KeyTry: try_stmt(parser); break;
  1471	    case KeyRaise: throw_stmt(parser); break;
  1472	    case OptSemic: scan_next_token(parser); break; /* empty statement */
  1473	    default: expr_stmt(parser); break;
  1474	    }
  1475	    be_assert(parser->finfo->freereg == be_list_count(parser->finfo->local));
  1476	}
  1477	
  1478	static void stmtlist(bparser *parser)
  1479	{
  1480	    while (block_follow(parser)) {
  1481	        statement(parser);
  1482	    }
  1483	}
  1484	
  1485	static void block(bparser *parser, int type)
  1486	{
  1487	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1488	    begin_block(parser->finfo, &binfo, type);
  1489	    stmtlist(parser);
  1490	    end_block(parser);
  1491	}
  1492	
  1493	static void mainfunc(bparser *parser, bclosure *cl)
  1494	{
  1495	    bblockinfo binfo;
  1496	    bfuncinfo finfo;
  1497	    begin_func(parser, &finfo, &binfo);
  1498	    finfo.proto->argc = 0; /* args */
  1499	    finfo.proto->name = be_newstr(parser->vm, funcname(parser));
  1500	    cl->proto = finfo.proto;
  1501	    be_remove(parser->vm, -3);  /* pop proto from stack */
  1502	    stmtlist(parser);
  1503	    end_func(parser);
  1504	    match_token(parser, TokenEOS); /* skip EOS */
  1505	}
  1506	
  1507	bclosure* be_parser_source(bvm *vm,
  1508	    const char *fname, breader reader, void *data, bbool islocal)
  1509	{
  1510	    bparser parser;
  1511	    bclosure *cl = be_newclosure(vm, 0);
  1512	    parser.vm = vm;
  1513	    parser.finfo = NULL;
  1514	    parser.cl = cl;
  1515	    parser.islocal = (bbyte)islocal;
  1516	    var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
  1517	    be_stackpush(vm);
  1518	    be_lexer_init(&parser.lexer, vm, fname, reader, data);
  1519	    scan_next_token(&parser); /* scan first token */
  1520	    mainfunc(&parser, cl);
  1521	    be_lexer_deinit(&parser.lexer);
  1522	    be_global_release_space(vm); /* clear global space */
  1523	    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
  1524	    scan_next_token(&parser); /* clear lexer */
  1525	    return cl;
  1526	}

    28	#define vm_error(vm, except, ...) \
    29	    be_raise(vm, except, be_pushfstring(vm, __VA_ARGS__))
    30	
    31	#define RA()   (reg + IGET_RA(ins))
    32	#define RKB()  ((isKB(ins) ? ktab : reg) + KR2idx(IGET_RKB(ins)))
    33	#define RKC()  ((isKC(ins) ? ktab : reg) + KR2idx(IGET_RKC(ins)))
    34	
    35	#define var2cl(_v)          cast(bclosure*, var_toobj(_v))
    36	#define var2real(_v)        (var_isreal(_v) ? (_v)->v.r : (breal)(_v)->v.i)
    37	#define val2bool(v)         ((v) ? btrue : bfalse)
    38	#define ibinop(op, a, b)    ((a)->v.i op (b)->v.i)
    39	
    40	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
    41	  #define DEBUG_HOOK() \
    42	    if (vm->hookmask & BE_HOOK_LINE) { \
    43	        do_linehook(vm); \
    44	        reg = vm->reg; \
    45	    }
    46	#else
    47	  #define DEBUG_HOOK()
    48	#endif

    50	#define vm_exec_loop() \
    51	    loop: \
    52	        DEBUG_HOOK(); \
    53	        switch (IGET_OP(ins = *vm->ip++))
    54	
    55	#if BE_USE_SINGLE_FLOAT
    56	  #define mathfunc(func)    func##f
    57	#else
    58	  #define mathfunc(func)    func
    59	#endif
    60	
    61	#define opcase(opcode)      case OP_##opcode
    62	#define dispatch()          goto loop
    63	
    64	#define equal_rule(op, iseq) \
    65	    bbool res; \
    66	    if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) { \
    67	        res = ibinop(op, a, b); \
    68	    } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) { \
    69	        res = var2real(a) op var2real(b); \
    70	    } else if (var_isinstance(a)) { \
    71	        res = object_eqop(vm, #op, iseq, a, b); \
    72	    } else if (var_type(a) == var_type(b)) { /* same types */ \
    73	        if (var_isnil(a)) { /* nil op nil */ \
    74	            res = 1 op 1; \
    75	        } else if (var_isbool(a)) { /* bool op bool */ \
    76	            res = var_tobool(a) op var_tobool(b); \
    77	        } else if (var_isstr(a)) { /* string op string */ \
    78	            res = 1 op be_eqstr(a->v.s, b->v.s); \
    79	        } else if (var_isclass(a) || var_isfunction(a)) { \
    80	            res = var_toobj(a) op var_toobj(b); \
    81	        } else { \
    82	            binop_error(vm, #op, a, b); \
    83	            res = bfalse; /* will not be executed */ \
    84	        } \
    85	    } else { /* different types */ \
    86	        res = 1 op 0; \
    87	    } \
    88	    return res
    89	
    90	#define relop_rule(op) \
    91	    bbool res; \
    92	    if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) { \
    93	        res = ibinop(op, a, b); \
    94	    } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) { \
    95	        res = var2real(a) op var2real(b); \
    96	    } else if (var_isstr(a) && var_isstr(b)) { \
    97	        bstring *s1 = var_tostr(a), *s2 = var_tostr(b); \
    98	        res = be_strcmp(s1, s2) op 0; \
    99	    } else if (var_isinstance(a)) { \
   100	        binstance *obj = var_toobj(a); \
   101	        object_binop(vm, #op, *a, *b); \
   102	        check_bool(vm, obj, #op); \
   103	        res = var_tobool(vm->top); \
   104	    } else { \
   105	        binop_error(vm, #op, a, b); \
   106	        res = bfalse; /* will not be executed */ \
   107	    } \
   108	    return res
   109	
   110	#define bitwise_block(op) \
   111	    bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC(); \
   112	    if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) { \
   113	        var_setint(dst, ibinop(op, a, b)); \
   114	    } else if (var_isinstance(a)) { \
   115	        ins_binop(vm, #op, ins); \
   116	    } else { \
   117	        binop_error(vm, #op, a, b); \
   118	    }

   120	#define push_native(_vm, _f, _ns, _t) { \
   121	    precall(_vm, _f, _ns, _t); \
   122	    _vm->cf->status = PRIM_FUNC; \
   123	}

   125	static void attribute_error(bvm *vm, const char *t, bvalue *b, bvalue *c)
   126	{
   127	    const char *attr = var_isstr(c) ? str(var_tostr(c)) : be_vtype2str(c);
   128	    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   129	        "'%s' value has no %s '%s'", be_vtype2str(b), t, attr);
   130	}

   132	static void binop_error(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   133	{
   134	    vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   135	        "unsupported operand type(s) for %s: '%s' and '%s'",
   136	        op, be_vtype2str(a), be_vtype2str(b));
   137	}

   139	static void unop_error(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue *a)
   140	{
   141	    vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   142	        "unsupported operand type(s) for %s: '%s'",
   143	        op, be_vtype2str(a));
   144	}

   146	static void call_error(bvm *vm, bvalue *v)
   147	{
   148	    vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   149	        "'%s' value is not callable", be_vtype2str(v));
   150	}

   152	static void check_bool(bvm *vm, binstance *obj, const char *method)
   153	{
   154	    if (!var_isbool(vm->top)) {
   155	        const char *name = str(be_instance_name(obj));
   156	        vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   157	            "`%s::%s` return value error, the expected type is 'bool'",
   158	            strlen(name) ? name : "<anonymous>", method);
   159	    }
   160	}

   162	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   163	static void do_linehook(bvm *vm)
   164	{
   165	    bcallframe *cf = vm->cf;
   166	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(cf->func);
   167	    int pc = cast_int(vm->ip - cl->proto->code);
   168	    if (!pc || pc > cf->lineinfo->endpc) {
   169	        while (pc > cf->lineinfo->endpc)
   170	            cf->lineinfo++;
   171	        be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_LINE);
   172	    } else {
   173	        blineinfo *linfo = cf->lineinfo;
   174	        blineinfo *base = cl->proto->lineinfo;
   175	        while (linfo > base && pc <= linfo[-1].endpc)
   176	            linfo--;
   177	        if (cf->lineinfo != linfo) {
   178	            cf->lineinfo = linfo;
   179	            be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_LINE);
   180	        }
   181	    }
   182	}
   183	#endif
   184	
   185	static void precall(bvm *vm, bvalue *func, int nstack, int mode)
   186	{
   187	    bcallframe *cf;
   188	    int expan = nstack + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN;
   189	    if (vm->stacktop < func + expan) {
   190	        size_t fpos = func - vm->stack;
   191	        be_stack_expansion(vm, expan);
   192	        func = vm->stack + fpos;
   193	    }
   194	    be_stack_push(vm, &vm->callstack, NULL);
   195	    cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   196	    cf->func = func - mode;
   197	    cf->top = vm->top;
   198	    cf->reg = vm->reg;
   199	    vm->reg = func + 1;
   200	    vm->top = vm->reg + nstack;
   201	    vm->cf = cf;
   202	}
   203	
   204	static void push_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *func, int nstack, int mode)
   205	{
   206	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(func);
   207	    precall(vm, func, nstack, mode);
   208	    vm->cf->ip = vm->ip;
   209	    vm->cf->status = NONE_FLAG;
   210	    vm->ip = cl->proto->code;
   211	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   212	    vm->cf->lineinfo = cl->proto->lineinfo;
   213	    be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_CALL);
   214	#endif
   215	}
