   217	static void ret_native(bvm *vm)
   218	{
   219	    bcallframe *_cf = vm->cf;
   220	    vm->reg = _cf->reg;
   221	    vm->top = _cf->top;
   222	    be_stack_pop(&vm->callstack);
   223	    vm->cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   224	}
   225	
   226	static bbool obj2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *var)
   227	{
   228	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(var);
   229	    bstring *tobool = str_literal(vm, "tobool");
   230	    /* get operator method */
   231	    if (be_instance_member(vm, obj, tobool, vm->top)) {
   232	        vm->top[1] = *var; /* move self to argv[0] */
   233	        be_dofunc(vm, vm->top, 1); /* call method 'tobool' */
   234	        /* check the return value */
   235	        check_bool(vm, obj, "tobool");
   236	        return var_tobool(vm->top);
   237	    }
   238	    return btrue;
   239	}
   240	
   241	bbool be_value2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *v)
   242	{
   243	    switch (var_basetype(v)) {
   244	    case BE_NIL:
   245	        return bfalse;
   246	    case BE_BOOL:
   247	        return var_tobool(v);
   248	    case BE_INT:
   249	        return val2bool(v->v.i);
   250	    case BE_REAL:
   251	        return val2bool(v->v.r);
   252	    case BE_INSTANCE:
   253	        return obj2bool(vm, v);
   254	    default:
   255	        return btrue;
   256	    }
   257	}
   258	
   259	static void obj_method(bvm *vm, bvalue *o, bstring *attr, bvalue *dst)
   260	{
   261	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(o);
   262	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, obj, attr, dst);
   263	    if (basetype(type) != BE_FUNCTION) {
   264	        vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   265	            "the '%s' object has no method '%s'",
   266	            str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   267	    }
   268	}
   269	
   270	static int obj_attribute(bvm *vm, bvalue *o, bvalue *c, bvalue *dst)
   271	{
   272	    bvalue instance = *o; /* save instance to send it later to member */
   273	    bstring *attr = var_tostr(c);
   274	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(o);
   275	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, obj, attr, dst);
   276	    if (basetype(type) == BE_NIL) { /* if no method found, try virtual */
   277	        /* get method 'member' */
   278	        int type2 = be_instance_member(vm, obj, str_literal(vm, "member"), vm->top);
   279	        if (basetype(type2) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   280	            bvalue *top = vm->top;
   281	            top[1] = instance; /* move instance to argv[0] */
   282	            top[2] = *c; /* move method name to argv[1] */
   283	            vm->top += 3;   /* prevent collection results */
   284	            be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'member' */
   285	            vm->top -= 3;
   286	            *dst = *vm->top;   /* copy result to R(A) */
   287	            type = var_type(dst);
   288	        }
   289	    }
   290	    if (basetype(type) == BE_NIL) {
   291	        vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   292	            "the '%s' object has no attribute '%s'",
   293	            str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   294	    }
   295	    return type;
   296	}
   297	
   298	static bbool object_eqop(bvm *vm,
   299	    const char *op, bbool iseq, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   300	{
   301	    binstance *o = var_toobj(a);
   302	    bvalue self = *a, other = *b;
   303	    bbool isself = var_isinstance(b) && o == var_toobj(b);
   304	    /* first, try to call the overloaded operator of the object */
   305	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, o, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   306	    if (basetype(type) == BE_FUNCTION) { /* call method */
   307	        bvalue *top = vm->top;
   308	        top[1] = self;  /* move self to argv[0] */
   309	        top[2] = other; /* move other to argv[1] */
   310	        be_incrtop(vm); /* prevent collection results */
   311	        be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   312	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   313	        check_bool(vm, o, op); /* check return value */
   314	        return var_tobool(vm->top); /* copy result to dst */
   315	    }
   316	    /* the default equal operation rule */
   317	    return iseq == isself; /* check object self */
   318	}
   319	
   320	static void object_binop(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue self, bvalue other)
   321	{
   322	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   323	    /* get operator method (possible GC) */
   324	    obj_method(vm, &self, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   325	    top[1] = self; /* move self to argv[0] */
   326	    top[2] = other; /* move other to argv[1] */
   327	    be_incrtop(vm); /* prevent collection results */
   328	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   329	    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   330	}
   331	
   332	#define ins_binop(vm, op, ins) { \
   333	    object_binop(vm, op, *RKB(), *RKC()); \
   334	    reg = vm->reg; \
   335	    *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to dst */ \
   336	}
   337	
   338	static void ins_unop(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue self)
   339	{
   340	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   341	    /* get operator method (possible GC) */
   342	    obj_method(vm, &self, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   343	    top[1] = self; /* move self to argv[0] */
   344	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 1); /* call method 'item' */
   345	}

   347	bbool be_vm_iseq(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   348	{
   349	    equal_rule(==, btrue);
   350	}
   351	
   352	bbool be_vm_isneq(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   353	{
   354	    equal_rule(!=, bfalse);
   355	}
   356	
   357	bbool be_vm_islt(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   358	{
   359	    relop_rule(<);
   360	}
   361	
   362	bbool be_vm_isle(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   363	{
   364	    relop_rule(<=);
   365	}
   366	
   367	bbool be_vm_isgt(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   368	{
   369	    relop_rule(>);
   370	}
   371	
   372	bbool be_vm_isge(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   373	{
   374	    relop_rule(>=);
   375	}

   377	static void make_range(bvm *vm, bvalue lower, bvalue upper)
   378	{
   379	    /* get method 'item' (possible GC) */
   380	    int idx = be_builtin_find(vm, str_literal(vm, "range"));
   381	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   382	    top[0] = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   383	    top[1] = lower; /* move lower to argv[0] */
   384	    top[2] = upper; /* move upper to argv[1] */
   385	    vm->top += 3; /* prevent collection results */
   386	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   387	    vm->top -= 3;
   388	}
   389	
   390	static void connect_str(bvm *vm, bstring *a, bvalue *b)
   391	{
   392	    bstring *s;
   393	    if (var_isstr(b)) {
   394	        s = be_strcat(vm, a, var_tostr(b));
   395	        var_setstr(vm->top, s);
   396	    } else {
   397	        *vm->top++ = *b;
   398	        be_val2str(vm, -1);
   399	        b = vm->top - 1;
   400	        s = be_strcat(vm, a, var_tostr(b));
   401	        var_setstr(b, s);
   402	        vm->top -= 1;
   403	    }
   404	}

   406	BERRY_API bvm* be_vm_new(void)
   407	{
   408	    bvm *vm = be_os_malloc(sizeof(bvm));
   409	    be_assert(vm != NULL);
   410	    memset(vm, 0, sizeof(bvm)); /* clear all members */
   411	    be_gc_init(vm);
   412	    be_string_init(vm);
   413	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->callstack, sizeof(bcallframe));
   414	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->refstack, sizeof(binstance*));
   415	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->exceptstack, sizeof(struct bexecptframe));
   416	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->tracestack, sizeof(bcallsnapshot));
   417	    vm->stack = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bvalue) * BE_STACK_FREE_MIN);
   418	    vm->stacktop = vm->stack + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN;
   419	    vm->reg = vm->stack;
   420	    vm->top = vm->reg;
   421	    be_globalvar_init(vm);
   422	    be_gc_setpause(vm, 1);
   423	    be_loadlibs(vm);
   424	#if BE_USE_OBSERVABILITY_HOOK
   425	    vm->obshook = NULL;
   426	#endif
   427	    return vm;
   428	}
   429	
   430	BERRY_API void be_vm_delete(bvm *vm)
   431	{
   432	    be_gc_deleteall(vm);
   433	    be_string_deleteall(vm);
   434	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->callstack);
   435	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->refstack);
   436	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->exceptstack);
   437	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->tracestack);
   438	    be_free(vm, vm->stack, (vm->stacktop - vm->stack) * sizeof(bvalue));
   439	    be_globalvar_deinit(vm);
   440	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   441	    /* free native hook */
   442	    if (var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR))
   443	        be_free(vm, var_toobj(&vm->hook), sizeof(struct bhookblock));
   444	#endif
   445	    /* free VM structure */
   446	    be_os_free(vm);
   447	}
   448	
   449	static void vm_exec(bvm *vm)
   450	{
   451	    bclosure *clos;
   452	    bvalue *ktab, *reg;
   453	    binstruction ins;
   454	    vm->cf->status |= BASE_FRAME;
   455	newframe: /* a new call frame */
   456	    be_assert(var_isclosure(vm->cf->func));
   457	    clos = var_toobj(vm->cf->func);
   458	    ktab = clos->proto->ktab;
   459	    reg = vm->reg;
   460	    vm_exec_loop() {
   461	        opcase(LDNIL): {
   462	            var_setnil(RA());
   463	            dispatch();
   464	        }
   465	        opcase(LDBOOL): {
   466	            bvalue *v = RA();
   467	            var_setbool(v, IGET_RKB(ins));
   468	            if (IGET_RKC(ins)) { /* skip next instruction */
   469	                vm->ip += 1;
   470	            }
   471	            dispatch();
   472	        }
   473	        opcase(LDINT): {
   474	            bvalue *v = RA();
   475	            var_setint(v, IGET_sBx(ins));
   476	            dispatch();
   477	        }
   478	        opcase(LDCONST): {
   479	            bvalue *dst = RA();
   480	            *dst = ktab[IGET_Bx(ins)];
   481	            dispatch();
   482	        }
   483	        opcase(GETGBL): {
   484	            bvalue *v = RA();
   485	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   486	            *v = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   487	            dispatch();
   488	        }
   489	        opcase(SETGBL): {
   490	            bvalue *v = RA();
   491	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   492	            *be_global_var(vm, idx) = *v;
   493	            dispatch();
   494	        }
   495	        opcase(GETUPV): {
   496	            bvalue *v = RA();
   497	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   498	            be_assert(*clos->upvals != NULL);
   499	            *v = *clos->upvals[idx]->value;
   500	            dispatch();
   501	        }
   502	        opcase(SETUPV): {
   503	            bvalue *v = RA();
   504	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   505	            be_assert(*clos->upvals != NULL);
   506	            *clos->upvals[idx]->value = *v;
   507	            dispatch();
   508	        }
   509	        opcase(MOVE): {
   510	            bvalue *dst = RA();
   511	            *dst = *RKB();
   512	            dispatch();
   513	        }
   514	        opcase(ADD): {
   515	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   516	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   517	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(+, a, b));
   518	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   519	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   520	                var_setreal(dst, x + y);
   521	            } else if (var_isstr(a) && var_isstr(b)) { /* strcat */
   522	                bstring *s = be_strcat(vm, var_tostr(a), var_tostr(b));
   523	                reg = vm->reg;
   524	                dst = RA();
   525	                var_setstr(dst, s);
   526	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   527	                ins_binop(vm, "+", ins);
   528	            } else {
   529	                binop_error(vm, "+", a, b);
   530	            }
   531	            dispatch();

  1072	                }
  1073	                return;
  1074	            }
  1075	            vm->cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
  1076	            goto newframe;
  1077	        }
  1078	    }
  1079	}
  1080	
  1081	static void do_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1082	{
  1083	    bvalue *v, *end;
  1084	    bproto *proto = var2cl(reg)->proto;
  1085	    push_closure(vm, reg, proto->nstack, 0);
  1086	    v = vm->reg + argc;
  1087	    end = vm->reg + proto->argc;
  1088	    for (; v <= end; ++v) {
  1089	        var_setnil(v);
  1090	    }
  1091	    vm_exec(vm);
  1092	}
  1093	
  1094	static void do_ntvclos(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1095	{
  1096	    bntvclos *f = var_toobj(reg);
  1097	    push_native(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1098	    f->f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1099	    ret_native(vm);
  1100	}
  1101	
  1102	static void do_ntvfunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1103	{
  1104	    bntvfunc f = var_tontvfunc(reg);
  1105	    push_native(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1106	    f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1107	    ret_native(vm);
  1108	}
  1109	
  1110	static void do_class(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1111	{
  1112	    if (be_class_newobj(vm, var_toobj(reg), reg, ++argc)) {
  1113	        be_incrtop(vm);
  1114	        be_dofunc(vm, reg + 1, argc);
  1115	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
  1116	    }
  1117	}
  1118	
  1119	void be_dofunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *v, int argc)
  1120	{
  1121	    be_assert(vm->reg <= v && v < vm->stacktop);
  1122	    be_assert(vm->stack <= vm->reg && vm->reg < vm->stacktop);
  1123	    switch (var_type(v)) {
  1124	    case BE_CLASS: do_class(vm, v, argc); break;
  1125	    case BE_CLOSURE: do_closure(vm, v, argc); break;
  1126	    case BE_NTVCLOS: do_ntvclos(vm, v, argc); break;
  1127	    case BE_NTVFUNC: do_ntvfunc(vm, v, argc); break;
  1128	    default: call_error(vm, v);
  1129	    }
  1130	}
  1131	
  1132	BERRY_API void be_set_obs_hook(bvm *vm, bobshook hook)
  1133	{
  1134	    (void)vm;       /* avoid comiler warning */
  1135	    (void)hook;     /* avoid comiler warning */
  1136	
  1137	#if BE_USE_OBSERVABILITY_HOOK
  1138	    vm->obshook = hook;
  1139	#endif
  1140	}

    41	static uint8_t vm_sizeinfo(void)
    42	{
    43	    uint8_t res = sizeof(bint) == 8;

    45	    return res;
    46	}

    49	#if BE_USE_BYTECODE_SAVER
    50	static void save_proto(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto);

    52	static void save_byte(void *fp, uint8_t value)
    53	{
    54	    be_fwrite(fp, &value, 1);
    55	}
    56	
    57	static void save_word(void *fp, uint16_t value)
    58	{
    59	    uint8_t buffer[2];
    60	    buffer[0] = value & 0xff;
    61	    buffer[1] = value >> 8;
    62	    be_fwrite(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer));
    63	}
    64	
    65	static void save_long(void *fp, uint32_t value)
    66	{
    67	    uint8_t buffer[4];
    68	    buffer[0] = value & 0xff;
    69	    buffer[1] = (value >> 8) & 0xff;
    70	    buffer[2] = (value >> 16) & 0xff;
    71	    buffer[3] = (value >> 24) & 0xff;
    72	    be_fwrite(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer));
    73	}
    74	
    75	static void save_header(void *fp)
    76	{
    77	    uint8_t buffer[8] = { 0 };
    78	    buffer[0] = MAGIC_NUMBER1;
    79	    buffer[1] = MAGIC_NUMBER2;
    80	    buffer[2] = MAGIC_NUMBER3;
    81	    buffer[3] = BYTECODE_VERSION;
    82	    buffer[4] = vm_sizeinfo();
    83	    be_fwrite(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer));
    84	}

    86	static void save_int(void *fp, bint i)
    87	{
    88	#if USE_64BIT_INT
    89	    save_long(fp, i & 0xffffffff);
    90	    save_long(fp, (i >> 32) & 0xffffffff);
    91	#else
    92	    save_long(fp, (uint32_t)i);
    93	#endif
    94	}

    96	static void save_real(void *fp, breal r)
    97	{
    98	#if BE_USE_SINGLE_FLOAT
    99	    union { breal r; uint32_t i; } u;
   100	    u.r = r;

   102	#else
   103	    union { breal r; uint64_t i; } u;
   104	    u.r = r;

   106	    save_long(fp, (u.i >> 32) & 0xffffffff);

   110	static void save_string(void *fp, bstring *s)
   111	{
   112	    if (s) {
   113	        uint16_t length = (uint16_t)str_len(s);
   114	        const char *data = str(s);

   120	static bstring** save_members(bvm *vm, void *fp, bclass *c, int nvar)
   121	{
   122	    bmapnode *node;
   123	    bstring **vars = NULL;
   124	    bmap *members = c->members;
   125	    bmapiter iter = be_map_iter();
   126	    if (nvar) {
   127	        /* allocate the member-variable name cache */
   128	        vars = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bstring *) * nvar);
   129	    }
   130	    while ((node = be_map_next(members, &iter)) != NULL) {
   131	        be_assert(var_isstr(&node->key));
   132	        if (var_isint(&node->value)) { /* cache member name */
   133	            if (vars == NULL) {
   134	                return NULL; /* should never be executed */
   135	            }
   136	            vars[var_toidx(&node->value)] = var_tostr(&node->key);
   137	        } else { /* save method's name and function */
   138	            bproto *proto;
   139	            bvalue *value = &node->value;
   140	            be_assert(var_isclosure(value) || var_isproto(value));
   141	            save_string(fp, var_tostr(&node->key)); /* save method name */
   142	            if (var_isproto(value)) { /* the method is a prototype */
   143	                proto = var_toobj(value);
   144	            } else { /* the method is a closure */
   145	                proto = cast(bclosure *, var_toobj(value))->proto;
   146	            }
   147	            save_proto(vm, fp, proto); /* only save prototype */
   148	        }
   149	    }
   150	    return vars;
   151	}
   152	
   153	static void save_class(bvm *vm, void *fp, bclass *c)
   154	{
   155	    bstring **vars;
   156	    int i, count = be_map_count(c->members);
   157	    int nvar = c->nvar - be_class_closure_count(c);
   158	    save_string(fp, c->name);
   159	    save_long(fp, nvar); /* member variables count */
   160	    save_long(fp, count - nvar); /* method count */
   161	    vars = save_members(vm, fp, c, nvar);
   162	    if (vars != NULL) {
   163	        for (i = 0; i < nvar; ++i) {
   164	            save_string(fp, vars[i]);
   165	        }
   166	        be_free(vm, vars, sizeof(bstring *) * nvar);
   167	    }
   168	}
   169	
   170	static void save_value(bvm *vm, void *fp, bvalue *v)
   171	{
   172	    save_byte(fp, (uint8_t)var_type(v)); /* type */
   173	    switch (var_type(v)) {
   174	    case BE_INT: save_int(fp, var_toint(v)); break;
   175	    case BE_REAL: save_real(fp, var_toreal(v)); break;
   176	    case BE_STRING: save_string(fp, var_tostr(v)); break;
   177	    case BE_CLASS: save_class(vm, fp, var_toobj(v)); break;
   178	    default: break;
   179	    }
   180	}

   182	static void save_bytecode(void *fp, bproto *proto)
   183	{
   184	    binstruction *code = proto->code, *end;
   185	    save_long(fp, (uint32_t)proto->codesize);
   186	    for (end = code + proto->codesize; code < end; ++code) {
   187	        save_long(fp, (uint32_t)*code);
   188	    }
   189	}
   190	
   191	static void save_constants(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto)
   192	{
   193	    bvalue *v = proto->ktab, *end;
   194	    save_long(fp, proto->nconst); /* constants count */
   195	    for (end = v + proto->nconst; v < end; ++v) {
   196	        save_value(vm, fp, v);
   197	    }
   198	}
   199	
   200	static void save_proto_table(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto)
   201	{
   202	    bproto **p = proto->ptab, **end;
   203	    save_long(fp, proto->nproto); /* proto count */
   204	    for (end = p + proto->nproto; p < end; ++p) {
   205	        save_proto(vm, fp, *p);
   206	    }
   207	}
   208	
   209	static void save_upvals(void *fp, bproto *proto)
   210	{
   211	    bupvaldesc *uv = proto->upvals, *end;
   212	    save_byte(fp, proto->nupvals); /* upvals count */
   213	    for (end = uv + proto->nupvals; uv < end; ++uv) {
   214	        save_byte(fp, uv->instack);
   215	        save_byte(fp, uv->idx);
   216	    }
   217	}
   218	
   219	static void save_proto(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto)
   220	{
   221	    if (proto) {
   222	        save_string(fp, proto->name); /* name */
   223	        save_string(fp, proto->source); /* source */
   224	        save_byte(fp, proto->argc); /* argc */
   225	        save_byte(fp, proto->nstack); /* nstack */
   226	        save_bytecode(fp, proto); /* bytecode */
   227	        save_constants(vm, fp, proto); /* constant */
   228	        save_proto_table(vm, fp, proto); /* proto table */
   229	        save_upvals(fp, proto); /* upvals description table */
   230	    }
   231	}

   233	static void save_globals(bvm *vm, void *fp)
   234	{
   235	    bmapnode *node;
   236	    bmapiter iter = be_map_iter();
   237	    bmap *map = vm->gbldesc.global.vtab;
   238	    int i, count = be_global_count(vm);
   239	    bstring **list = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bstring*) * count);
   240	    while ((node = be_map_next(map, &iter)) != NULL) {
   241	        if (var_isstr(&node->key)) {
   242	            int idx = var_toidx(&node->value);
   243	            be_assert(idx < count);
   244	            list[idx] = var_tostr(&node->key);
   245	        }
   246	    }
   247	    for (i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
   248	        save_string(fp, list[i]);
   249	    }
   250	    be_free(vm, list, sizeof(bstring*) * count);
   251	}

   253	static void save_global_info(bvm *vm, void *fp)
   254	{
   255	    save_long(fp, be_builtin_count(vm));
   256	    save_long(fp, be_global_count(vm));
   257	    save_globals(vm, fp);

   260	void be_bytecode_save(bvm *vm, const char *filename, bproto *proto)
   261	{
   262	    void *fp = be_fopen(filename, "wb");
   263	    if (fp == NULL) {

   267	        save_header(fp);
   268	        save_global_info(vm, fp);

   278	static uint8_t load_byte(void *fp)
   279	{
   280	    uint8_t buffer[1];
   281	    if (be_fread(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer)) == sizeof(buffer)) {
   282	        return buffer[0];
   283	    }
   284	    return 0;
   285	}
   286	
   287	static uint16_t load_word(void *fp)
   288	{
   289	    uint8_t buffer[2];
   290	    if (be_fread(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer)) == sizeof(buffer)) {
   291	        return ((uint16_t)buffer[1] << 8) | buffer[0];
   292	    }
   293	    return 0;
   294	}
   295	
   296	static uint32_t load_long(void *fp)
   297	{
   298	    uint8_t buffer[4];
   299	    if (be_fread(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer)) == sizeof(buffer)) {
   300	        return ((uint32_t)buffer[3] << 24)
   301	            | ((uint32_t)buffer[2] << 16)
   302	            | ((uint32_t)buffer[1] << 8)
   303	            | buffer[0];
   304	    }
   305	    return 0;
   306	}
   307	
   308	static int load_head(void *fp)
   309	{
   310	    int res;
   311	    uint8_t buffer[8] = { 0 };
   312	    be_fread(fp, buffer, sizeof(buffer));
   313	    res = buffer[0] == MAGIC_NUMBER1 &&
   314	          buffer[1] == MAGIC_NUMBER2 &&
   315	          buffer[2] == MAGIC_NUMBER3 &&
   316	          buffer[3] == BYTECODE_VERSION &&
   317	          buffer[4] == vm_sizeinfo();
   318	    return res;
   319	}
   320	
   321	bbool be_bytecode_check(const char *path)
   322	{
   323	    void *fp = be_fopen(path, "r");
   324	    if (fp) {
   325	        uint8_t buffer[3], rb;
   326	        rb = (uint8_t)be_fread(fp, buffer, 3);
   327	        be_fclose(fp);
   328	        /* check magic number */
   329	        return rb == 3 &&
   330	            buffer[0] == MAGIC_NUMBER1 &&
   331	            buffer[1] == MAGIC_NUMBER2 &&
   332	            buffer[2] == MAGIC_NUMBER3;
   333	    }
   334	    return bfalse;
   335	}

   337	static bint load_int(void *fp)
   338	{
   339	#if USE_64BIT_INT
   340	    bint i;
   341	    i = load_long(fp);
   342	    i |= (bint)load_long(fp) << 32;
   343	    return i;
   344	#else
   345	    return load_long(fp);
   346	#endif
   347	}

   349	static breal load_real(void *fp)
   350	{
   351	#if BE_USE_SINGLE_FLOAT
   352	    union { breal r; uint32_t i; } u;
   353	    u.i = load_long(fp);
   354	    return u.r;
   355	#else
   356	    union {
   357	        breal r;
   358	        uint64_t i;
   359	    } u;
   360	    u.i = load_long(fp);
   361	    u.i |= (uint64_t)load_long(fp) << 32;
   362	    return u.r;
   363	#endif
   364	}
   365	
   366	static bstring* load_string(bvm *vm, void *fp)
   367	{
   368	    uint16_t len = load_word(fp);
   369	    if (len > 0) {
   370	        bstring *str;
   371	        char *buf = be_malloc(vm, len);
   372	        be_fread(fp, buf, len);
   373	        str = be_newstrn(vm, buf, len);
   374	        be_free(vm, buf, len);
   375	        return str;
   376	    }
   377	    return str_literal(vm, "");
   378	}
   379	
   380	static bstring* cache_string(bvm *vm, void *fp)
   381	{
   382	    bstring *str = load_string(vm, fp);
   383	    var_setstr(vm->top, str);
   384	    be_incrtop(vm);
   385	    return str;
   386	}
   387	
   388	static void load_class(bvm *vm, void *fp, bvalue *v)
   389	{
   390	    int nvar, count;
   391	    bclass *c = be_newclass(vm, NULL, NULL);
   392	    var_setclass(v, c);
   393	    c->name = load_string(vm, fp);
   394	    nvar = load_long(fp);
   395	    count = load_long(fp);
   396	    while (count--) { /* load method table */
   397	        bvalue *value;
   398	        bstring *name = cache_string(vm, fp);
   399	        value = vm->top;
   400	        var_setproto(value, NULL);
   401	        be_incrtop(vm);
   402	        load_proto(vm, fp, (bproto**)&var_toobj(value), -3);
   403	        be_method_bind(vm, c, name, var_toobj(value));
   404	        be_stackpop(vm, 2); /* pop the cached string and proto */
   405	    }
   406	    for (count = 0; count < nvar; ++count) { /* load member-variable table */
   407	        bstring *name = cache_string(vm, fp);
   408	        be_member_bind(vm, c, name);
   409	        be_stackpop(vm, 1); /* pop the cached string */
   410	    }
   411	}
   412	
   413	static void load_value(bvm *vm, void *fp, bvalue *v)
   414	{
   415	    switch (load_byte(fp)) {
   416	    case BE_INT: var_setint(v, load_int(fp)); break;
   417	    case BE_REAL: var_setreal(v, load_real(fp)); break;
   418	    case BE_STRING: var_setstr(v, load_string(vm, fp)); break;
   419	    case BE_CLASS: load_class(vm, fp, v); break;
   420	    default: break;
   421	    }
   422	}
   423	
   424	static void load_bytecode(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto, int info)
   425	{
   426	    int size = (int)load_long(fp);
   427	    if (size) {
   428	        binstruction *code, *end;
   429	        int bcnt = be_builtin_count(vm);
   430	        blist *list = var_toobj(be_indexof(vm, info));
   431	        be_assert(be_islist(vm, info));
   432	        proto->code = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(binstruction) * size);
   433	        proto->codesize = size;
   434	        code = proto->code;
   435	        for (end = code + size; code < end; ++code) {
   436	            binstruction ins = (binstruction)load_long(fp);
   437	            binstruction op = IGET_OP(ins);
   438	            /* fix global variable index */
   439	            if (op == OP_GETGBL || op == OP_SETGBL) {
   440	                int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   441	                if (idx >= bcnt) { /* does not fix builtin index */
   442	                    bvalue *name = be_list_at(list, idx - bcnt);
   443	                    idx = be_global_find(vm, var_tostr(name));
   444	                    ins = (ins & ~IBx_MASK) | ISET_Bx(idx);
   445	                }
   446	            }
   447	            *code = ins;
   448	        }
   449	    }
   450	}
   451	
   452	static void load_constant(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto)
   453	{
   454	    int size = (int)load_long(fp); /* nconst */
   455	    if (size) {
   456	        bvalue *end, *v = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bvalue) * size);
   457	        memset(v, 0, sizeof(bvalue) * size);
   458	        proto->ktab = v;
   459	        proto->nconst = size;
   460	        for (end = v + size; v < end; ++v) {
   461	            load_value(vm, fp, v);
   462	        }
   463	    }
   464	}
   465	
   466	static void load_proto_table(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto)
   467	{
   468	    int size = (int)load_long(fp); /* proto count */
   469	    if (size) {
   470	        bproto **p = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bproto *) * size);
   471	        memset(p, 0, sizeof(bproto *) * size);
   472	        proto->ptab = p;
   473	        proto->nproto = size;
   474	        while (size--) {
   475	            load_proto(vm, fp, p++, -1);
   476	        }
   477	    }
   478	}
   479	
   480	static void load_upvals(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto *proto)
   481	{
   482	    int size = (int)load_byte(fp);
   483	    if (size) {
   484	        bupvaldesc *uv, *end;
   485	        proto->upvals = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bupvaldesc) * size);
   486	        proto->nupvals = (bbyte)size;
   487	        uv = proto->upvals;
   488	        for (end = uv + size; uv < end; ++uv) {
   489	            uv->instack = load_byte(fp);
   490	            uv->idx = load_byte(fp);
   491	        }
   492	    }
   493	}
   494	
   495	static void load_proto(bvm *vm, void *fp, bproto **proto, int info)
   496	{
   497	    *proto = be_newproto(vm);
   498	    (*proto)->name = load_string(vm, fp);
   499	    (*proto)->source = load_string(vm, fp);
   500	    (*proto)->argc = load_byte(fp);
   501	    (*proto)->nstack = load_byte(fp);
   502	    load_bytecode(vm, fp, *proto, info);
   503	    load_constant(vm, fp, *proto);
   504	    load_proto_table(vm, fp, *proto);
   505	    load_upvals(vm, fp, *proto);
   506	}
   507	
   508	void load_global_info(bvm *vm, void *fp)
   509	{
   510	    int i;
   511	    int bcnt = (int)load_long(fp); /* builtin count */
   512	    int gcnt = (int)load_long(fp); /* global count */
   513	    if (bcnt != be_builtin_count(vm)) {
   514	        bytecode_error(vm, be_pushfstring(vm,
   515	            "inconsistent number of builtin objects."));
   516	    }
   517	    be_newlist(vm);
   518	    for (i = 0; i < gcnt; ++i) {
   519	        bstring *name = cache_string(vm, fp);
   520	        be_global_new(vm, name);
   521	        be_data_push(vm, -2); /* push the variable name to list */
   522	        be_stackpop(vm, 1); /* pop the cached string */
   523	    }
   524	    be_global_release_space(vm);
   525	}
   526	
   527	bclosure* be_bytecode_load(bvm *vm, const char *filename)
   528	{
   529	    void *fp = be_fopen(filename, "rb");
   530	    if (fp == NULL) {
   531	        bytecode_error(vm, be_pushfstring(vm,
   532	            "can not open file '%s'.", filename));
   533	    } else if (load_head(fp)) {
   534	        bclosure *cl = be_newclosure(vm, 0);
   535	        var_setclosure(vm->top, cl);
   536	        be_stackpush(vm);
   537	        load_global_info(vm, fp);
   538	        load_proto(vm, fp, &cl->proto, -1);
   539	        be_stackpop(vm, 2); /* pop the closure and list */
   540	        be_fclose(fp);
   541	        return cl;
   542	    }
   543	    bytecode_error(vm, be_pushfstring(vm,
   544	        "invalid bytecode file '%s'.", filename));
   545	    return NULL;
   546	}
   547	#endif /* BE_USE_BYTECODE_LOADER */
</output>

     8	#include "be_object.h"

    12	#include "be_vm.h"
    13	
    14	#define cast_comobj(o)      gc_cast(o, BE_COMOBJ, bcommomobj)
    15	
    16	const char* be_vtype2str(bvalue *v)
    17	{
    18	    switch(var_type(v)) {
    19	    case BE_NIL: return "nil";
    20	    case BE_INT: return "int";
    21	    case BE_REAL: return "real";
    22	    case BE_BOOL: return "bool";
    23	    case BE_CLOSURE: case BE_NTVCLOS:
    24	    case BE_NTVFUNC: return "function";
    25	    case BE_PROTO: return "proto";
    26	    case BE_CLASS: return "class";
    27	    case BE_STRING: return "string";
    28	    case BE_LIST: return "list";
    29	    case BE_MAP: return "map";
    30	    case BE_INSTANCE: return "instance";
    31	    case BE_MODULE: return "module";
    32	    default: return "invalid type";
    33	    }
    34	}
    35	
    36	bvalue* be_indexof(bvm *vm, int idx)
    37	{
    38	    if (idx > 0) { /* absolute index */
    39	        be_assert(vm->reg + idx <= vm->top);
    40	        return vm->reg + idx - 1;
    41	    }
    42	    /* relative index */
    43	    be_assert(vm->top + idx >= vm->reg);
    44	    return vm->top + idx;
    45	}
    46	
    47	BERRY_API void be_newcomobj(bvm *vm, void *data, bntvfunc destory)
    48	{
    49	    bcommomobj *obj;
    50	    bgcobject *gco = be_gcnew(vm, BE_COMOBJ, bcommomobj);
    51	    if ((obj = cast_comobj(gco)) != NULL) {
    52	        bvalue* top = be_incrtop(vm);
    53	        obj->data = data;
    54	        obj->destory = destory;
    55	        var_setobj(top, BE_COMOBJ, obj);
    56	    }
    57	}
    58	
    59	void be_commonobj_delete(bvm *vm, bgcobject *obj)
    60	{
    61	    bcommomobj *co = cast_comobj(obj);
    62	    if (co) {
    63	        if (co->destory && co->data) {
    64	            be_pushntvfunction(vm, co->destory);
    65	            be_pushcomptr(vm, co->data);
    66	            be_call(vm, 1);
    67	            be_pop(vm, 2);
    68	        }
    69	        be_free(vm, co, sizeof(bcommomobj));
    70	    }
    71	}

    14	typedef enum {

    25	    ETUPVAL,

    46	    bbyte not; /* not mark */
    47	    bbyte type;
    48	} bexpdesc;
    49	
    50	typedef struct bblockinfo {

    64	    struct blexer *lexer; /* the lexer pointer */
    65	    blist *local; /* local variable */
    66	    bmap *upval; /* upvalue variable */

    68	    bvector kvec; /* constants table */

    73	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO

    75	#endif
    76	    int pc; /* program count */
    77	    bbyte freereg; /* first free register */
    78	    bbyte flags; /* some flages */
    79	} bfuncinfo;
    80

    84	
    85	bclosure *be_parser_source(bvm *vm,

<output>
     1	/********************************************************************
     2	** Copyright (c) 2018-2020 Guan Wenliang
     3	** This file is part of the Berry default interpreter.
     4	** skiars@qq.com, https://github.com/Skiars/berry
     5	** See Copyright Notice in the LICENSE file or at
     6	** https://github.com/Skiars/berry/blob/master/LICENSE
     7	********************************************************************/
     8	#include "be_lexer.h"
     9	#include "be_string.h"
    10	#include "be_mem.h"
    11	#include "be_gc.h"
    12	#include "be_exec.h"
    13	#include "be_map.h"
    14	#include "be_vm.h"
    15	
    16	#define SHORT_STR_LEN       32
    17	#define EOS                 '\0' /* end of source */
    18	
    19	#define type_count()        (int)array_count(kwords_tab)
    20	#define lexbuf(lex)         ((lex)->buf.s)
    21	#define isvalid(lex)        ((lex)->cursor < (lex)->endbuf)
    22	#define lgetc(lex)          ((lex)->cursor)
    23	#define setstr(lex, v)      ((lex)->token.u.s = (v))
    24	#define setint(lex, v)      ((lex)->token.u.i = (v))
    25	#define setreal(lex, v)     ((lex)->token.u.r = (v))
    26	#define match(lex, pattern) while (pattern(lgetc(lex))) { save(lex); }
    27	
    28	#if BE_USE_SCRIPT_COMPILER
    29	
    30	/* IMPORTANT: This must follow the enum found in be_lexer.h !!! */
    31	static const char* const kwords_tab[] = {
    32	    "NONE", "EOS", "ID", "INT", "REAL", "STR",
    33	    "=", "+=","-=", "*=", "/=", "%=", "&=", "|=",
    34	    "^=", "<<=", ">>=", "+", "-", "*", "/", "%",
    35	    "<", "<=", "==", "!=", ">", ">=", "&", "|",
    36	    "^", "<<", ">>", "..", "&&", "||", "!", "~",
    37	    "(", ")", "[", "]", "{", "}", ".", ",", ";",
    38	    ":", "?", "->", "if", "elif", "else", "while",
    39	    "for", "def", "end", "class", "break", "continue",
    40	    "return", "true", "false", "nil", "var", "do",
    41	    "import", "as", "try", "except", "raise"
    42	};
    43	
    44	void be_lexerror(blexer *lexer, const char *msg)
    45	{
    46	    bvm *vm = lexer->vm;
    47	    const char *error = be_pushfstring(vm,
    48	        "%s:%d: %s", lexer->fname, lexer->linenumber, msg);
    49	    be_lexer_deinit(lexer);
    50	    be_raise(vm, "syntax_error", error);
    51	}
    52	
    53	static void keyword_registe(bvm *vm)
    54	{
    55	    int i;
    56	    for (i = KeyIf; i < type_count(); ++i) {
    57	        bstring *s = be_newstr(vm, kwords_tab[i]);
    58	        be_gc_fix(vm, gc_object(s));
    59	        be_str_setextra(s, i);
    60	    }
    61	}
    62	
    63	static void keyword_unregiste(bvm *vm)
    64	{
    65	    int i;
    66	    for (i = KeyIf; i < type_count(); ++i) {
    67	        bstring *s = be_newstr(vm, kwords_tab[i]);
    68	        be_gc_unfix(vm, gc_object(s));
    69	    }
    70	}
    71	
    72	static bstring* cache_string(blexer *lexer, bstring *s)
    73	{
    74	    bvalue *res;
    75	    bvm *vm = lexer->vm;
    76	    var_setstr(vm->top, s);
    77	    be_stackpush(vm); /* cache string to stack */
    78	    res = be_map_findstr(lexer->vm, lexer->strtab, s);
    79	    if (res) {
    80	        s = var_tostr(&be_map_val2node(res)->key);
    81	    } else {
    82	        res = be_map_insertstr(vm, lexer->strtab, s, NULL);
    83	        var_setnil(res);
    84	    }
    85	    be_stackpop(vm, 1); /* pop string frome stack */
    86	    return s;
    87	}
    88	
    89	static bstring* lexer_newstrn(blexer *lexer, const char *str, size_t len)
    90	{
    91	    return cache_string(lexer, be_newstrn(lexer->vm, str, len));
    92	}
    93	
    94	bstring* be_lexer_newstr(blexer *lexer, const char *str)
    95	{
    96	    return cache_string(lexer, be_newstr(lexer->vm, str));
    97	}
    98	
    99	static int next(blexer *lexer)
   100	{
   101	    struct blexerreader *lr = &lexer->reader;
   102	    if (!(lr->len--)) {
   103	        static const char eos = EOS;
   104	        const char *s = lr->readf(lr->data, &lr->len);
   105	        lr->s = s ? s : &eos;
   106	        --lr->len;
   107	    }
   108	    lexer->cursor = *lr->s++;
   109	    return lexer->cursor;
   110	}
   111	
   112	static void clear_buf(blexer *lexer)
   113	{
   114	    lexer->buf.len = 0;
   115	}
   116	
   117	/* save and next */
   118	static int save(blexer *lexer)
   119	{
   120	    int ch = lgetc(lexer);
   121	    struct blexerbuf *buf = &lexer->buf;
   122	    if (buf->len >= buf->size) {
   123	        size_t size = buf->size << 1;
   124	        buf->s = be_realloc(lexer->vm, buf->s, buf->size, size);
   125	        buf->size = size;
   126	    }
   127	    buf->s[buf->len++] = (char)ch;
   128	    return next(lexer);
   129	}
   130	
   131	static bstring* buf_tostr(blexer *lexer)
   132	{
   133	    struct blexerbuf *buf = &lexer->buf;
   134	    return lexer_newstrn(lexer, buf->s, buf->len);
   135	}
   136	
   137	static int is_newline(int c)
   138	{
   139	    return c == '\n' || c == '\r';
   140	}
   141	
   142	static int is_digit(int c)
   143	{
   144	    return c >= '0' && c <= '9';
   145	}
   146	
   147	static int is_octal(int c)
   148	{
   149	    return c >= '0' && c <= '7';
   150	}
   151	
   152	static int is_letter(int c)
   153	{
   154	    return (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') || (c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') || (c == '_');
   155	}
   156	
   157	static int is_word(int c)
   158	{
   159	    return is_letter(c) || is_digit(c);
   160	}
   161	
   162	static int check_next(blexer *lexer, int c)
   163	{
   164	    if (lgetc(lexer) == c) {
   165	        next(lexer);
   166	        return 1;
   167	    }
   168	    return 0;
   169	}
   170	
   171	static int char2hex(int c)
   172	{
   173	    if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') {
   174	        return c - '0';
   175	    } else if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'f') {
   176	        return c - 'a' + 0x0A;
   177	    } else if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'F') {
   178	        return c - 'A' + 0x0A;
   179	    }
   180	    return -1;
   181	}
   182	
   183	static int check2hex(blexer *lexer, int c)
   184	{
   185	    c = char2hex(c);
   186	    if (c < 0) {
   187	        be_lexerror(lexer, "invalid hexadecimal number");
   188	    }
   189	    return c;
   190	}
   191	
   192	static int read_hex(blexer *lexer, const char *src)
   193	{
   194	    int c = check2hex(lexer, *src++);
   195	    return ((unsigned)c << 4) + check2hex(lexer, *src);
   196	}
   197	
   198	static int read_oct(blexer *lexer, const char *src)
   199	{
   200	    int c = 0;
   201	    const char *end = src + 3;
   202	    while (src < end && is_octal(*src)) {
   203	        c = 8 * c + *src++ - '0';
   204	    }
   205	    if (src < end) {
   206	        be_lexerror(lexer, "invalid octal number");
   207	    }
   208	    return c;
   209	}
   210	
   211	static void tr_string(blexer *lexer)
   212	{
   213	    char *dst, *src, *end;
   214	    dst = src = lexbuf(lexer);
   215	    end = lexbuf(lexer) + lexer->buf.len;
   216	    while (src < end) {
   217	        int c = *src++;
   218	        switch (c) {
   219	        case '\n': case '\r':
   220	            be_lexerror(lexer, "unfinished string");
   221	            break;
   222	        case '\\':
   223	            switch (*src) {
   224	            case 'a': c = '\a'; break;
   225	            case 'b': c = '\b'; break;
   226	            case 'f': c = '\f'; break;
   227	            case 'n': c = '\n'; break;
   228	            case 'r': c = '\r'; break;
   229	            case 't': c = '\t'; break;
   230	            case 'v': c = '\v'; break;
   231	            case '\\': c = '\\'; break;
   232	            case '\'': c = '\''; break;
   233	            case '"': c = '"'; break;
   234	            case '?': c = '?'; break;
   235	            case 'x': c = read_hex(lexer, ++src); ++src; break;
   236	            default:
   237	                c = read_oct(lexer, src);
   238	                if (c != EOS) {
   239	                    src += 2;
   240	                }
   241	                break;
   242	            }
   243	            ++src;
   244	            break;
   245	        default:
   246	            break;
   247	        }
   248	        *dst++ = (char)c;
   249	    }
   250	    lexer->buf.len = dst - lexbuf(lexer);
   251	}
   252	
   253	static int skip_newline(blexer *lexer)
   254	{
   255	    int lc = lgetc(lexer);
   256	    next(lexer);
   257	    if (is_newline(lgetc(lexer)) && lgetc(lexer) != lc) {
   258	        next(lexer); /* skip "\n\r" or "\r\n" */
   259	    }
   260	    lexer->linenumber++;
   261	    return lexer->cursor;
   262	}
   263	
   264	static void skip_comment(blexer *lexer)
   265	{
   266	    next(lexer); /* skip '#' */
   267	    if (lgetc(lexer) == '-') { /* mult-line comment */
   268	        int mark, c = 'x'; /* skip first '-' (#- ... -#) */
   269	        do {
   270	            mark = c == '-';
   271	            if (is_newline(c)) {
   272	                c = skip_newline(lexer);
   273	                continue;
   274	            }
   275	            c = next(lexer);
   276	        } while (!(mark && c == '#') && c != EOS);
   277	        next(lexer); /* skip '#' */
   278	    } else { /* line comment */
   279	        while (!is_newline(lgetc(lexer)) && lgetc(lexer)) {
   280	            next(lexer);
   281	        }
   282	    }
   283	}
   284	
   285	static bbool scan_realexp(blexer *lexer)
   286	{
   287	    int c = lgetc(lexer);
   288	    if (c == 'e' || c == 'E') {
   289	        c = save(lexer);
   290	        if (c == '+' || c == '-') {
   291	            c = save(lexer);
   292	        }
   293	        if (!is_digit(c)) {
   294	            be_lexerror(lexer, "malformed number");
   295	        }
   296	        match(lexer, is_digit);
   297	        return btrue;
   298	    }
   299	    return bfalse;
   300	}
   301	
   302	static btokentype scan_dot_real(blexer *lexer)
   303	{
   304	    if (save(lexer) == '.') { /* is '..' */
   305	        next(lexer);
   306	        return OptConnect;
   307	    }
   308	    if (is_digit(lgetc(lexer))) {
   309	        match(lexer, is_digit);
   310	        scan_realexp(lexer);
   311	        setreal(lexer, be_str2real(lexbuf(lexer), NULL));
   312	        return TokenReal;
   313	    }
   314	    return OptDot;
   315	}
   316	
   317	/* check the dots is a decimal dot or '..' operator */
   318	static bbool decimal_dots(blexer *lexer)
   319	{
   320	    if (lgetc(lexer) == '.') { /* '..' or real */
   321	        if (save(lexer) != '.') { /* read numberic => \.\b* */
   322	            match(lexer, is_digit); /* match and skip numberic */
   323	            return btrue;
   324	        }
   325	        /* token '..' */
   326	        next(lexer); /*  skip the second '.' */
   327	        lexer->cacheType = OptConnect;
   328	    }
   329	    return bfalse; /* operator '..' */
   330	}
   331	
   332	static bint scan_hexadecimal(blexer *lexer)
   333	{
   334	    bint res = 0;
   335	    int dig, num = 0;
   336	    while ((dig = char2hex(lgetc(lexer))) >= 0) {
   337	        res = ((bint)res << 4) + dig;
   338	        next(lexer);
   339	        ++num;
   340	    }
   341	    if (num == 0) {
   342	        be_lexerror(lexer, "invalid hexadecimal number");
   343	    }
   344	    return res;
   345	}
   346	
   347	static btokentype scan_decimal(blexer *lexer)
   348	{
   349	    btokentype type = TokenInteger;
   350	    match(lexer, is_digit);
   351	    if (decimal_dots(lexer) | scan_realexp(lexer)) {
   352	        type = TokenReal;
   353	    }
   354	    lexer->buf.s[lexer->buf.len] = '\0';
   355	    if (type == TokenReal) {
   356	        setreal(lexer, be_str2real(lexbuf(lexer), NULL));
   357	    } else {
   358	        setint(lexer, be_str2int(lexbuf(lexer), NULL));
   359	    }
   360	    return type;
   361	}
   362	
   363	static btokentype scan_numeral(blexer *lexer)
   364	{
   365	    btokentype type = TokenInteger;
   366	    int c0 = lgetc(lexer), c1 = save(lexer);
   367	    /* hex: 0[xX][0-9a-fA-F]+ */
   368	    if (c0 == '0' && (c1 == 'x' || c1 == 'X')) {
   369	        next(lexer);
   370	        setint(lexer, scan_hexadecimal(lexer));
   371	    } else {
   372	        type = scan_decimal(lexer);
   373	    }
   374	    /* can't follow decimal or letter after numeral */
   375	    if (lexer->cacheType == TokenNone) {
   376	        if (is_letter(lgetc(lexer)) || decimal_dots(lexer)) {
   377	            be_lexerror(lexer, "malformed number");
   378	        }
   379	    }
   380	    return type;
   381	}
   382	
   383	static btokentype scan_identifier(blexer *lexer)
   384	{
   385	    int type;
   386	    bstring *s;
   387	    save(lexer);
   388	    match(lexer, is_word);
   389	    s = buf_tostr(lexer);
   390	    type = str_extra(s);
   391	    if (type >= KeyIf && type < type_count()) {
   392	        lexer->token.type = (btokentype)type;
   393	        return lexer->token.type;
   394	    }
   395	    setstr(lexer, s); /* set identifier name */
   396	    return TokenId;
   397	}
   398	
   399	static btokentype scan_string(blexer *lexer)
   400	{
   401	    int c, end = lgetc(lexer);
   402	    next(lexer); /* skip '"' or '\'' */
   403	    while ((c = lgetc(lexer)) != EOS && (c != end)) {
   404	        save(lexer);
   405	        if (c == '\\') {
   406	            save(lexer); /* skip '\\.' */
   407	        }
   408	    }
   409	    tr_string(lexer);
   410	    setstr(lexer, buf_tostr(lexer));
   411	    next(lexer); /* skip '"' or '\'' */
   412	    return TokenString;
   413	}
   414	
   415	static btokentype scan_assign(blexer *lexer, btokentype is, btokentype not)
   416	{
   417	    next(lexer);
   418	    return check_next(lexer, '=') ? is : not;
   419	}
   420	
   421	static btokentype scan_sub(blexer *lexer)
   422	{
   423	    btokentype op;
   424	    switch (next(lexer)) {
   425	        case '>': op = OptArrow; break;
   426	        case '=': op = OptSubAssign; break;
   427	        default: return OptSub;
   428	    }
   429	    next(lexer);
   430	    return op;
   431	}
   432	
   433	static btokentype scan_and(blexer *lexer)
   434	{
   435	    btokentype op;
   436	    switch (next(lexer)) {
   437	        case '&': op = OptAnd; break;
   438	        case '=': op = OptAndAssign; break;
   439	        default: return OptBitAnd;
   440	    }
   441	    next(lexer);
   442	    return op;
   443	}
   444	
   445	static btokentype scan_or(blexer *lexer)
   446	{
   447	    btokentype op;
   448	    switch (next(lexer)) {
   449	        case '|': op = OptOr; break;
   450	        case '=': op = OptOrAssign; break;
   451	        default: return OptBitOr;
   452	    }
   453	    next(lexer);
   454	    return op;
   455	}
   456	
   457	static btokentype scan_le(blexer *lexer)
   458	{
   459	    switch (next(lexer)) {
   460	    case '=':
   461	        next(lexer);
   462	        return OptLE;
   463	    case '<':
   464	        next(lexer);
   465	        return check_next(lexer, '=') ? OptLsfAssign : OptShiftL;
   466	    default:
   467	        return OptLT;
   468	    }
   469	}
   470	
   471	static btokentype scan_ge(blexer *lexer)
   472	{
   473	    switch (next(lexer)) {
   474	    case '=':
   475	        next(lexer);
   476	        return OptGE;
   477	    case '>':
   478	        next(lexer);
   479	        return check_next(lexer, '=') ? OptRsfAssign : OptShiftR;
   480	    default:
   481	        return OptGT;
   482	    }
   483	}
   484	
   485	static btokentype lexer_next(blexer *lexer)
   486	{
   487	    for (;;) {
   488	        switch (lgetc(lexer)) {
   489	        case '\r': case '\n': /* newline */
   490	            skip_newline(lexer);
   491	            break;
   492	        case ' ': case '\t': case '\f': case '\v': /* spaces */
   493	            next(lexer);
   494	            break;
   495	        case '#': /* comment */
   496	            skip_comment(lexer);
   497	            break;
   498	        case EOS: return TokenEOS; /* end of source stream */
   499	        /* operator */
   500	        case '+': return scan_assign(lexer, OptAddAssign, OptAdd);
   501	        case '-': return scan_sub(lexer);
   502	        case '*': return scan_assign(lexer, OptMulAssign, OptMul);
   503	        case '/': return scan_assign(lexer, OptDivAssign, OptDiv);
   504	        case '%': return scan_assign(lexer, OptModAssign, OptMod);
   505	        case '(': next(lexer); return OptLBK;
   506	        case ')': next(lexer); return OptRBK;
   507	        case '[': next(lexer); return OptLSB;
   508	        case ']': next(lexer); return OptRSB;
   509	        case '{': next(lexer); return OptLBR;
   510	        case '}': next(lexer); return OptRBR;
   511	        case ',': next(lexer); return OptComma;
   512	        case ';': next(lexer); return OptSemic;
   513	        case ':': next(lexer); return OptColon;
   514	        case '?': next(lexer); return OptQuestion;
   515	        case '^': return scan_assign(lexer, OptXorAssign, OptBitXor);
   516	        case '~': next(lexer); return OptFlip;
   517	        case '&': return scan_and(lexer);
   518	        case '|': return scan_or(lexer);
   519	        case '<': return scan_le(lexer);
   520	        case '>': return scan_ge(lexer);
   521	        case '=':
   522	            next(lexer);
   523	            return check_next(lexer, '=') ? OptEQ : OptAssign;
   524	        case '!':
   525	            next(lexer);
   526	            return check_next(lexer, '=') ? OptNE : OptNot;
   527	        case '\'': case '"':
   528	            return scan_string(lexer);
   529	        case '.':
   530	            return scan_dot_real(lexer);
   531	        case '0': case '1': case '2': case '3': case '4':
   532	        case '5': case '6': case '7': case '8': case '9':
   533	            return scan_numeral(lexer);
   534	        default:
   535	            if (is_letter(lgetc(lexer))) {
   536	                return scan_identifier(lexer);
   537	            }
   538	            be_lexerror(lexer, be_pushfstring(lexer->vm,
   539	                "stray '\\%d' in program", (unsigned char)lgetc(lexer)));
   540	            return TokenNone; /* error */
   541	        }
   542	    }
   543	}
   544	
   545	static void lexerbuf_init(blexer *lexer)
   546	{
   547	    lexer->buf.size = SHORT_STR_LEN;
   548	    lexer->buf.s = be_malloc(lexer->vm, SHORT_STR_LEN);
   549	    lexer->buf.len = 0;
   550	}
   551	
   552	void be_lexer_init(blexer *lexer, bvm *vm,
   553	    const char *fname, breader reader, void *data)
   554	{
   555	    lexer->vm = vm;
   556	    lexer->cacheType = TokenNone;
   557	    lexer->fname = fname;
   558	    lexer->linenumber = 1;
   559	    lexer->lastline = 1;
   560	    lexer->reader.readf = reader;
   561	    lexer->reader.data = data;
   562	    lexer->reader.len = 0;
   563	    lexerbuf_init(lexer);
   564	    keyword_registe(vm);
   565	    lexer->strtab = be_map_new(vm);
   566	    var_setmap(vm->top, lexer->strtab);
   567	    be_stackpush(vm); /* save string to cache */
   568	    next(lexer); /* read the first character */
   569	}
   570	
   571	void be_lexer_deinit(blexer *lexer)
   572	{
   573	    be_free(lexer->vm, lexer->buf.s, lexer->buf.size);
   574	    keyword_unregiste(lexer->vm);
   575	    be_stackpop(lexer->vm, 1); /* pop strtab */
   576	}
   577	
   578	int be_lexer_scan_next(blexer *lexer)
   579	{
   580	    btokentype type;
   581	    if (lexer->cacheType != TokenNone) {
   582	        lexer->token.type = lexer->cacheType;
   583	        lexer->cacheType = TokenNone;
   584	        return 1;
   585	    }
   586	    if (lgetc(lexer) == EOS) { /* clear lexer */
   587	        lexer->token.type = TokenEOS;
   588	        return 0;
   589	    }
   590	    lexer->lastline = lexer->linenumber;
   591	    type = lexer_next(lexer);
   592	    clear_buf(lexer);
   593	    if (type != TokenNone) {
   594	        lexer->token.type = type;
   595	    } else {
   596	        lexer->token.type = TokenEOS;
   597	        return 0;
   598	    }
   599	    return 1;
   600	}
   601	
   602	const char* be_token2str(bvm *vm, btoken *token)
   603	{
   604	    switch (token->type) {
   605	    case TokenString:
   606	    case TokenId:
   607	        return str(token->u.s);
   608	    case TokenInteger:
   609	        return be_pushfstring(vm, "%d", token->u.i);
   610	    case TokenReal:
   611	        return be_pushfstring(vm, "%g", token->u.r);
   612	    default:
   613	        return kwords_tab[token->type];
   614	    }
   615	}
   616	
   617	const char* be_tokentype2str(btokentype type)
   618	{
   619	    return kwords_tab[type];
   620	}
   621	
   622	#endif
</output>

     1	/********************************************************************

     7	********************************************************************/
     8	#include "be_vm.h"
     9	#include "be_decoder.h"
    10	#include "be_string.h"
    11	#include "be_strlib.h"
    12	#include "be_class.h"
    13	#include "be_func.h"
    14	#include "be_vector.h"
    15	#include "be_map.h"
    16	#include "be_module.h"
    17	#include "be_mem.h"
    18	#include "be_var.h"
    19	#include "be_gc.h"
    20	#include "be_exec.h"
    21	#include "be_debug.h"
    22	#include "be_libs.h"
    23	#include <string.h>
    24	#include <math.h>
    25	
    26	#define NOT_METHOD          BE_NONE
    27	
    28	#define vm_error(vm, except, ...) \
    29	    be_raise(vm, except, be_pushfstring(vm, __VA_ARGS__))
    30	
    31	#define RA()   (reg + IGET_RA(ins))
    32	#define RKB()  ((isKB(ins) ? ktab : reg) + KR2idx(IGET_RKB(ins)))
    33	#define RKC()  ((isKC(ins) ? ktab : reg) + KR2idx(IGET_RKC(ins)))
    34	
    35	#define var2cl(_v)          cast(bclosure*, var_toobj(_v))
    36	#define var2real(_v)        (var_isreal(_v) ? (_v)->v.r : (breal)(_v)->v.i)
    37	#define val2bool(v)         ((v) ? btrue : bfalse)
    38	#define ibinop(op, a, b)    ((a)->v.i op (b)->v.i)
    39	
    40	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
    41	  #define DEBUG_HOOK() \
    42	    if (vm->hookmask & BE_HOOK_LINE) { \
    43	        do_linehook(vm); \
    44	        reg = vm->reg; \
    45	    }
    46	#else
    47	  #define DEBUG_HOOK()
    48	#endif
    49	
    50	#define vm_exec_loop() \
    51	    loop: \
    52	        DEBUG_HOOK(); \
    53	        switch (IGET_OP(ins = *vm->ip++))
    54	
    55	#if BE_USE_SINGLE_FLOAT
    56	  #define mathfunc(func)    func##f
    57	#else
    58	  #define mathfunc(func)    func
    59	#endif
    60	
    61	#define opcase(opcode)      case OP_##opcode
    62	#define dispatch()          goto loop
    63	
    64	#define equal_rule(op, iseq) \
    65	    bbool res; \
    66	    if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) { \
    67	        res = ibinop(op, a, b); \
    68	    } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) { \
    69	        res = var2real(a) op var2real(b); \
    70	    } else if (var_isinstance(a)) { \
    71	        res = object_eqop(vm, #op, iseq, a, b); \
    72	    } else if (var_type(a) == var_type(b)) { /* same types */ \
    73	        if (var_isnil(a)) { /* nil op nil */ \
    74	            res = 1 op 1; \
    75	        } else if (var_isbool(a)) { /* bool op bool */ \
    76	            res = var_tobool(a) op var_tobool(b); \
    77	        } else if (var_isstr(a)) { /* string op string */ \
    78	            res = 1 op be_eqstr(a->v.s, b->v.s); \
    79	        } else if (var_isclass(a) || var_isfunction(a)) { \
    80	            res = var_toobj(a) op var_toobj(b); \
    81	        } else { \
    82	            binop_error(vm, #op, a, b); \
    83	            res = bfalse; /* will not be executed */ \
    84	        } \
    85	    } else { /* different types */ \
    86	        res = 1 op 0; \
    87	    } \
    88	    return res
    89	
    90	#define relop_rule(op) \
    91	    bbool res; \
    92	    if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) { \
    93	        res = ibinop(op, a, b); \
    94	    } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) { \
    95	        res = var2real(a) op var2real(b); \
    96	    } else if (var_isstr(a) && var_isstr(b)) { \
    97	        bstring *s1 = var_tostr(a), *s2 = var_tostr(b); \
    98	        res = be_strcmp(s1, s2) op 0; \
    99	    } else if (var_isinstance(a)) { \
   100	        binstance *obj = var_toobj(a); \
   101	        object_binop(vm, #op, *a, *b); \
   102	        check_bool(vm, obj, #op); \
   103	        res = var_tobool(vm->top); \
   104	    } else { \
   105	        binop_error(vm, #op, a, b); \
   106	        res = bfalse; /* will not be executed */ \
   107	    } \
   108	    return res
   109	
   110	#define bitwise_block(op) \
   111	    bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC(); \
   112	    if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) { \
   113	        var_setint(dst, ibinop(op, a, b)); \
   114	    } else if (var_isinstance(a)) { \
   115	        ins_binop(vm, #op, ins); \
   116	    } else { \
   117	        binop_error(vm, #op, a, b); \
   118	    }
   119	
   120	#define push_native(_vm, _f, _ns, _t) { \
   121	    precall(_vm, _f, _ns, _t); \
   122	    _vm->cf->status = PRIM_FUNC; \
   123	}

   126	{

   128	    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   129	        "'%s' value has no %s '%s'", be_vtype2str(b), t, attr);

   133	{

   135	        "unsupported operand type(s) for %s: '%s' and '%s'",
   136	        op, be_vtype2str(a), be_vtype2str(b));
   137	}
