   152	static void check_bool(bvm *vm, binstance *obj, const char *method)
   153	{
   154	    if (!var_isbool(vm->top)) {
   155	        const char *name = str(be_instance_name(obj));
   156	        vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   157	            "`%s::%s` return value error, the expected type is 'bool'",
   158	            strlen(name) ? name : "<anonymous>", method);
   159	    }
   160	}
   161	
   162	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   163	static void do_linehook(bvm *vm)
   164	{
   165	    bcallframe *cf = vm->cf;
   166	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(cf->func);
   167	    int pc = cast_int(vm->ip - cl->proto->code);
   168	    if (!pc || pc > cf->lineinfo->endpc) {
   169	        while (pc > cf->lineinfo->endpc)
   170	            cf->lineinfo++;
   171	        be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_LINE);
   172	    } else {
   173	        blineinfo *linfo = cf->lineinfo;
   174	        blineinfo *base = cl->proto->lineinfo;
   175	        while (linfo > base && pc <= linfo[-1].endpc)
   176	            linfo--;
   177	        if (cf->lineinfo != linfo) {
   178	            cf->lineinfo = linfo;
   179	            be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_LINE);
   180	        }
   181	    }
   182	}
   183	#endif
   184	
   185	static void precall(bvm *vm, bvalue *func, int nstack, int mode)
   186	{
   187	    bcallframe *cf;
   188	    int expan = nstack + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN;
   189	    if (vm->stacktop < func + expan) {
   190	        size_t fpos = func - vm->stack;
   191	        be_stack_expansion(vm, expan);
   192	        func = vm->stack + fpos;
   193	    }
   194	    be_stack_push(vm, &vm->callstack, NULL);
   195	    cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   196	    cf->func = func - mode;
   197	    cf->top = vm->top;
   198	    cf->reg = vm->reg;
   199	    vm->reg = func + 1;
   200	    vm->top = vm->reg + nstack;
   201	    vm->cf = cf;
   202	}
   203	
   204	static void push_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *func, int nstack, int mode)
   205	{
   206	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(func);
   207	    precall(vm, func, nstack, mode);
   208	    vm->cf->ip = vm->ip;
   209	    vm->cf->status = NONE_FLAG;
   210	    vm->ip = cl->proto->code;
   211	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   212	    vm->cf->lineinfo = cl->proto->lineinfo;
   213	    be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_CALL);
   214	#endif
   215	}
   216	
   217	static void ret_native(bvm *vm)
   218	{
   219	    bcallframe *_cf = vm->cf;
   220	    vm->reg = _cf->reg;
   221	    vm->top = _cf->top;
   222	    be_stack_pop(&vm->callstack);
   223	    vm->cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   224	}
   225	
   226	static bbool obj2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *var)
   227	{
   228	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(var);
   229	    bstring *tobool = str_literal(vm, "tobool");
   230	    /* get operator method */
   231	    if (be_instance_member(vm, obj, tobool, vm->top)) {
   232	        vm->top[1] = *var; /* move self to argv[0] */
   233	        be_dofunc(vm, vm->top, 1); /* call method 'tobool' */
   234	        /* check the return value */
   235	        check_bool(vm, obj, "tobool");
   236	        return var_tobool(vm->top);
   237	    }
   238	    return btrue;
   239	}
   240	
   241	bbool be_value2bool(bvm *vm, bvalue *v)
   242	{
   243	    switch (var_basetype(v)) {
   244	    case BE_NIL:
   245	        return bfalse;
   246	    case BE_BOOL:
   247	        return var_tobool(v);
   248	    case BE_INT:
   249	        return val2bool(v->v.i);
   250	    case BE_REAL:
   251	        return val2bool(v->v.r);
   252	    case BE_INSTANCE:
   253	        return obj2bool(vm, v);
   254	    default:
   255	        return btrue;
   256	    }
   257	}
   258	
   259	static void obj_method(bvm *vm, bvalue *o, bstring *attr, bvalue *dst)
   260	{
   261	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(o);
   262	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, obj, attr, dst);
   263	    if (basetype(type) != BE_FUNCTION) {
   264	        vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   265	            "the '%s' object has no method '%s'",
   266	            str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   267	    }
   268	}
   269	
   270	static int obj_attribute(bvm *vm, bvalue *o, bvalue *c, bvalue *dst)
   271	{
   272	    bvalue instance = *o; /* save instance to send it later to member */
   273	    bstring *attr = var_tostr(c);
   274	    binstance *obj = var_toobj(o);
   275	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, obj, attr, dst);
   276	    if (basetype(type) == BE_NIL) { /* if no method found, try virtual */
   277	        /* get method 'member' */
   278	        int type2 = be_instance_member(vm, obj, str_literal(vm, "member"), vm->top);
   279	        if (basetype(type2) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   280	            bvalue *top = vm->top;
   281	            top[1] = instance; /* move instance to argv[0] */
   282	            top[2] = *c; /* move method name to argv[1] */
   283	            vm->top += 3;   /* prevent collection results */
   284	            be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'member' */
   285	            vm->top -= 3;
   286	            *dst = *vm->top;   /* copy result to R(A) */
   287	            type = var_type(dst);
   288	        }
   289	    }
   290	    if (basetype(type) == BE_NIL) {
   291	        vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   292	            "the '%s' object has no attribute '%s'",
   293	            str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   294	    }
   295	    return type;
   296	}
   297	
   298	static bbool object_eqop(bvm *vm,
   299	    const char *op, bbool iseq, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   300	{
   301	    binstance *o = var_toobj(a);
   302	    bvalue self = *a, other = *b;
   303	    bbool isself = var_isinstance(b) && o == var_toobj(b);
   304	    /* first, try to call the overloaded operator of the object */
   305	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, o, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   306	    if (basetype(type) == BE_FUNCTION) { /* call method */
   307	        bvalue *top = vm->top;
   308	        top[1] = self;  /* move self to argv[0] */
   309	        top[2] = other; /* move other to argv[1] */
   310	        be_incrtop(vm); /* prevent collection results */
   311	        be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   312	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   313	        check_bool(vm, o, op); /* check return value */
   314	        return var_tobool(vm->top); /* copy result to dst */
   315	    }
   316	    /* the default equal operation rule */
   317	    return iseq == isself; /* check object self */
   318	}
   319	
   320	static void object_binop(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue self, bvalue other)
   321	{
   322	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   323	    /* get operator method (possible GC) */
   324	    obj_method(vm, &self, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   325	    top[1] = self; /* move self to argv[0] */
   326	    top[2] = other; /* move other to argv[1] */
   327	    be_incrtop(vm); /* prevent collection results */
   328	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   329	    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   330	}
   331	
   332	#define ins_binop(vm, op, ins) { \
   333	    object_binop(vm, op, *RKB(), *RKC()); \
   334	    reg = vm->reg; \
   335	    *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to dst */ \
   336	}
   337	
   338	static void ins_unop(bvm *vm, const char *op, bvalue self)
   339	{
   340	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   341	    /* get operator method (possible GC) */
   342	    obj_method(vm, &self, be_newstr(vm, op), vm->top);
   343	    top[1] = self; /* move self to argv[0] */
   344	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 1); /* call method 'item' */
   345	}
   346	
   347	bbool be_vm_iseq(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   348	{
   349	    equal_rule(==, btrue);
   350	}
   351	
   352	bbool be_vm_isneq(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   353	{
   354	    equal_rule(!=, bfalse);
   355	}
   356	
   357	bbool be_vm_islt(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   358	{
   359	    relop_rule(<);
   360	}
   361	
   362	bbool be_vm_isle(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   363	{
   364	    relop_rule(<=);
   365	}
   366	
   367	bbool be_vm_isgt(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   368	{
   369	    relop_rule(>);
   370	}
   371	
   372	bbool be_vm_isge(bvm *vm, bvalue *a, bvalue *b)
   373	{
   374	    relop_rule(>=);
   375	}
   376	
   377	static void make_range(bvm *vm, bvalue lower, bvalue upper)
   378	{
   379	    /* get method 'item' (possible GC) */
   380	    int idx = be_builtin_find(vm, str_literal(vm, "range"));
   381	    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   382	    top[0] = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   383	    top[1] = lower; /* move lower to argv[0] */
   384	    top[2] = upper; /* move upper to argv[1] */
   385	    vm->top += 3; /* prevent collection results */
   386	    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   387	    vm->top -= 3;
   388	}
   389	
   390	static void connect_str(bvm *vm, bstring *a, bvalue *b)
   391	{
   392	    bstring *s;
   393	    if (var_isstr(b)) {
   394	        s = be_strcat(vm, a, var_tostr(b));
   395	        var_setstr(vm->top, s);
   396	    } else {
   397	        *vm->top++ = *b;
   398	        be_val2str(vm, -1);
   399	        b = vm->top - 1;
   400	        s = be_strcat(vm, a, var_tostr(b));
   401	        var_setstr(b, s);
   402	        vm->top -= 1;
   403	    }
   404	}
   405	
   406	BERRY_API bvm* be_vm_new(void)
   407	{
   408	    bvm *vm = be_os_malloc(sizeof(bvm));
   409	    be_assert(vm != NULL);
   410	    memset(vm, 0, sizeof(bvm)); /* clear all members */
   411	    be_gc_init(vm);
   412	    be_string_init(vm);
   413	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->callstack, sizeof(bcallframe));
   414	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->refstack, sizeof(binstance*));
   415	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->exceptstack, sizeof(struct bexecptframe));
   416	    be_stack_init(vm, &vm->tracestack, sizeof(bcallsnapshot));
   417	    vm->stack = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bvalue) * BE_STACK_FREE_MIN);
   418	    vm->stacktop = vm->stack + BE_STACK_FREE_MIN;
   419	    vm->reg = vm->stack;
   420	    vm->top = vm->reg;
   421	    be_globalvar_init(vm);
   422	    be_gc_setpause(vm, 1);
   423	    be_loadlibs(vm);
   424	#if BE_USE_OBSERVABILITY_HOOK
   425	    vm->obshook = NULL;
   426	#endif
   427	    return vm;
   428	}
   429	
   430	BERRY_API void be_vm_delete(bvm *vm)
   431	{
   432	    be_gc_deleteall(vm);
   433	    be_string_deleteall(vm);
   434	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->callstack);
   435	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->refstack);
   436	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->exceptstack);
   437	    be_stack_delete(vm, &vm->tracestack);
   438	    be_free(vm, vm->stack, (vm->stacktop - vm->stack) * sizeof(bvalue));
   439	    be_globalvar_deinit(vm);
   440	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   441	    /* free native hook */
   442	    if (var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR))
   443	        be_free(vm, var_toobj(&vm->hook), sizeof(struct bhookblock));
   444	#endif
   445	    /* free VM structure */
   446	    be_os_free(vm);
   447	}
   448	
   449	static void vm_exec(bvm *vm)
   450	{
   451	    bclosure *clos;
   452	    bvalue *ktab, *reg;
   453	    binstruction ins;
   454	    vm->cf->status |= BASE_FRAME;
   455	newframe: /* a new call frame */
   456	    be_assert(var_isclosure(vm->cf->func));
   457	    clos = var_toobj(vm->cf->func);
   458	    ktab = clos->proto->ktab;
   459	    reg = vm->reg;
   460	    vm_exec_loop() {
   461	        opcase(LDNIL): {
   462	            var_setnil(RA());
   463	            dispatch();
   464	        }
   465	        opcase(LDBOOL): {
   466	            bvalue *v = RA();
   467	            var_setbool(v, IGET_RKB(ins));
   468	            if (IGET_RKC(ins)) { /* skip next instruction */
   469	                vm->ip += 1;
   470	            }
   471	            dispatch();
   472	        }
   473	        opcase(LDINT): {
   474	            bvalue *v = RA();
   475	            var_setint(v, IGET_sBx(ins));
   476	            dispatch();
   477	        }
   478	        opcase(LDCONST): {
   479	            bvalue *dst = RA();
   480	            *dst = ktab[IGET_Bx(ins)];
   481	            dispatch();
   482	        }
   483	        opcase(GETGBL): {
   484	            bvalue *v = RA();
   485	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   486	            *v = *be_global_var(vm, idx);
   487	            dispatch();
   488	        }
   489	        opcase(SETGBL): {
   490	            bvalue *v = RA();
   491	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   492	            *be_global_var(vm, idx) = *v;
   493	            dispatch();
   494	        }
   495	        opcase(GETUPV): {
   496	            bvalue *v = RA();
   497	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   498	            be_assert(*clos->upvals != NULL);
   499	            *v = *clos->upvals[idx]->value;
   500	            dispatch();
   501	        }
   502	        opcase(SETUPV): {
   503	            bvalue *v = RA();
   504	            int idx = IGET_Bx(ins);
   505	            be_assert(*clos->upvals != NULL);
   506	            *clos->upvals[idx]->value = *v;
   507	            dispatch();
   508	        }
   509	        opcase(MOVE): {
   510	            bvalue *dst = RA();
   511	            *dst = *RKB();
   512	            dispatch();
   513	        }
   514	        opcase(ADD): {
   515	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   516	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   517	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(+, a, b));
   518	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   519	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   520	                var_setreal(dst, x + y);
   521	            } else if (var_isstr(a) && var_isstr(b)) { /* strcat */
   522	                bstring *s = be_strcat(vm, var_tostr(a), var_tostr(b));
   523	                reg = vm->reg;
   524	                dst = RA();
   525	                var_setstr(dst, s);
   526	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   527	                ins_binop(vm, "+", ins);
   528	            } else {
   529	                binop_error(vm, "+", a, b);
   530	            }
   531	            dispatch();
   532	        }
   533	        opcase(SUB): {
   534	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   535	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   536	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(-, a, b));
   537	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   538	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   539	                var_setreal(dst, x - y);
   540	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   541	                ins_binop(vm, "-", ins);
   542	            } else {
   543	                binop_error(vm, "-", a, b);
   544	            }
   545	            dispatch();
   546	        }
   547	        opcase(MUL): {
   548	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   549	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   550	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(*, a, b));
   551	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   552	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   553	                var_setreal(dst, x * y);
   554	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   555	                ins_binop(vm, "*", ins);
   556	            } else {
   557	                binop_error(vm, "*", a, b);
   558	            }
   559	            dispatch();
   560	        }
   561	        opcase(DIV): {
   562	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   563	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   564	                bint x = var_toint(a), y = var_toint(b);
   565	                if (y == 0) {
   566	                    vm_error(vm, "divzero_error", "division by zero");
   567	                } else {
   568	                    var_setint(dst, x / y);
   569	                }
   570	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   571	                breal x = var2real(a), y = var2real(b);
   572	                if (y == cast(breal, 0)) {
   573	                    vm_error(vm, "divzero_error", "division by zero");
   574	                }
   575	                var_setreal(dst, x / y);
   576	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   577	                ins_binop(vm, "/", ins);
   578	            } else {
   579	                binop_error(vm, "/", a, b);
   580	            }
   581	            dispatch();
   582	        }
   583	        opcase(MOD): {
   584	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   585	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   586	                var_setint(dst, ibinop(%, a, b));
   587	            } else if (var_isnumber(a) && var_isnumber(b)) {
   588	                var_setreal(dst, mathfunc(fmod)(var_toreal(a), var_toreal(b)));
   589	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   590	                ins_binop(vm, "%", ins);
   591	            } else {
   592	                binop_error(vm, "%", a, b);
   593	            }
   594	            dispatch();
   595	        }
   596	        opcase(LT): {
   597	            bbool res = be_vm_islt(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   598	            bvalue *dst;
   599	            reg = vm->reg;
   600	            dst = RA();
   601	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   602	            dispatch();
   603	        }
   604	        opcase(LE): {
   605	            bbool res = be_vm_isle(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   606	            bvalue *dst;
   607	            reg = vm->reg;
   608	            dst = RA();
   609	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   610	            dispatch();
   611	        }
   612	        opcase(EQ): {
   613	            bbool res = be_vm_iseq(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   614	            bvalue *dst;
   615	            reg = vm->reg;
   616	            dst = RA();
   617	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   618	            dispatch();
   619	        }
   620	        opcase(NE): {
   621	            bbool res = be_vm_isneq(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   622	            bvalue *dst;
   623	            reg = vm->reg;
   624	            dst = RA();
   625	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   626	            dispatch();
   627	        }
   628	        opcase(GT): {
   629	            bbool res = be_vm_isgt(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   630	            bvalue *dst;
   631	            reg = vm->reg;
   632	            dst = RA();
   633	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   634	            dispatch();
   635	        }
   636	        opcase(GE): {
   637	            bbool res = be_vm_isge(vm, RKB(), RKC());
   638	            bvalue *dst;
   639	            reg = vm->reg;
   640	            dst = RA();
   641	            var_setbool(dst, res);
   642	            dispatch();
   643	        }
   644	        opcase(CONNECT): {
   645	            bvalue *a = RKB(), *b = RKC();
   646	            if (var_isint(a) && var_isint(b)) {
   647	                make_range(vm, *RKB(), *RKC());
   648	            } else if (var_isstr(a)) {
   649	                connect_str(vm, var_tostr(a), b);
   650	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   651	                object_binop(vm, "..", *RKB(), *RKC());
   652	            } else {
   653	                binop_error(vm, "..", RKB(), RKC());
   654	            }
   655	            reg = vm->reg;
   656	            *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to R(A) */
   657	            dispatch();
   658	        }
   659	        opcase(AND): {
   660	            bitwise_block(&);
   661	            dispatch();
   662	        }
   663	        opcase(OR): {
   664	            bitwise_block(|);
   665	            dispatch();
   666	        }
   667	        opcase(XOR): {
   668	            bitwise_block(^);
   669	            dispatch();
   670	        }
   671	        opcase(SHL): {
   672	            bitwise_block(<<);
   673	            dispatch();
   674	        }
   675	        opcase(SHR): {
   676	            bitwise_block(>>);
   677	            dispatch();
   678	        }
   679	        opcase(NEG): {
   680	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB();
   681	            if (var_isint(a)) {
   682	                var_setint(dst, -a->v.i);
   683	            } else if (var_isreal(a)) {
   684	                var_setreal(dst, -a->v.r);
   685	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   686	                ins_unop(vm, "-*", *RKB());
   687	                reg = vm->reg;
   688	                *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to dst */
   689	            } else {
   690	                unop_error(vm, "-", a);
   691	            }
   692	            dispatch();
   693	        }
   694	        opcase(FLIP): {
   695	            bvalue *dst = RA(), *a = RKB();
   696	            if (var_isint(a)) {
   697	                var_setint(dst, -a->v.i);
   698	            } else if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   699	                ins_unop(vm, "~", *RKB());
   700	                reg = vm->reg;
   701	                *RA() = *vm->top; /* copy result to dst */
   702	            } else {
   703	                unop_error(vm, "~", a);
   704	            }
   705	            dispatch();
   706	        }
   707	        opcase(JMP): {
   708	            vm->ip += IGET_sBx(ins);
   709	            dispatch();
   710	        }
   711	        opcase(JMPT): {
   712	            if (be_value2bool(vm, RA())) {
   713	                vm->ip += IGET_sBx(ins);
   714	            }
   715	            dispatch();
   716	        }
   717	        opcase(JMPF): {
   718	            if (!be_value2bool(vm, RA())) {
   719	                vm->ip += IGET_sBx(ins);
   720	            }
   721	            dispatch();
   722	        }
   723	        opcase(CLOSURE): {
   724	            bvalue *dst;
   725	            bproto *p = clos->proto->ptab[IGET_Bx(ins)];
   726	            bclosure *cl = be_newclosure(vm, p->nupvals);
   727	            cl->proto = p;
   728	            reg = vm->reg;
   729	            dst = RA();
   730	            var_setclosure(dst, cl);
   731	            be_initupvals(vm, cl);
   732	            dispatch();
   733	        }
   734	        opcase(CLASS): {
   735	            bclass *c = var_toobj(ktab + IGET_Bx(ins));
   736	            be_class_upvalue_init(vm, c);
   737	            dispatch();
   738	        }
   739	        opcase(GETMBR): {
   740	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   741	            if (var_isinstance(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   742	                obj_attribute(vm, b, c, a);
   743	                reg = vm->reg;
   744	            } else if (var_ismodule(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   745	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(c);
   746	                bmodule *module = var_toobj(b);
   747	                bvalue *v = be_module_attr(vm, module, attr);
   748	                if (v) {
   749	                    *a = *v;
   750	                } else {
   751	                    bvalue *member = be_module_attr(vm, module, str_literal(vm, "member"));
   752	                    var_setnil(a);
   753	                    if (member && var_basetype(member) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   754	                        bvalue *top = vm->top;
   755	                        top[0] = *member;
   756	                        top[1] = *c; /* move name to argv[0] */
   757	                        vm->top += 2;   /* prevent collection results */
   758	                        be_dofunc(vm, top, 1); /* call method 'method' */
   759	                        vm->top -= 2;
   760	                        *a = *vm->top;   /* copy result to R(A) */
   761	                    }
   762	                    if (var_basetype(a) == BE_NIL) {
   763	                        vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   764	                            "module '%s' has no attribute '%s'",
   765	                            be_module_name(module), str(attr));
   766	                    }
   767	                }
   768	            } else {
   769	                attribute_error(vm, "attribute", b, c);
   770	            }
   771	            dispatch();
   772	        }
   773	        opcase(GETMET): {
   774	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   775	            if (var_isinstance(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   776	                bvalue self = *b;
   777	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(c);
   778	                binstance *obj = var_toobj(b);
   779	                int type = obj_attribute(vm, b, c, a);
   780	                reg = vm->reg;
   781	                if (basetype(type) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   782	                    a[1] = self;
   783	                } else {
   784	                    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   785	                        "class '%s' has no method '%s'",
   786	                        str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   787	                }
   788	            } else if (var_ismodule(b) && var_isstr(c)) {
   789	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(c);
   790	                bmodule *module = var_toobj(b);
   791	                bvalue *src = be_module_attr(vm, module, attr);
   792	                if (src) {
   793	                    var_settype(a, NOT_METHOD);
   794	                    a[1] = *src;
   795	                } else {
   796	                    bvalue *member = be_module_attr(vm, module, str_literal(vm, "member"));
   797	                    var_setnil(a);
   798	                    if (member && var_basetype(member) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   799	                        bvalue *top = vm->top;
   800	                        top[0] = *member;
   801	                        top[1] = *c; /* move name to argv[0] */
   802	                        vm->top += 2;   /* prevent collection results */
   803	                        be_dofunc(vm, top, 1); /* call method 'method' */
   804	                        vm->top -= 2;
   805	                        var_settype(a, NOT_METHOD);
   806	                        a[1] = *vm->top;   /* copy result to R(A) */
   807	                    }
   808	                    if (var_basetype(a) == BE_NIL) {
   809	                        vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   810	                            "module '%s' has no method '%s'",
   811	                            be_module_name(module), str(attr));
   812	                    }
   813	                }
   814	            } else {
   815	                attribute_error(vm, "method", b, c);
   816	            }
   817	            dispatch();
   818	        }
   819	        opcase(SETMBR): {
   820	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   821	            if (var_isinstance(a) && var_isstr(b)) {
   822	                binstance *obj = var_toobj(a);
   823	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(b);
   824	                if (!be_instance_setmember(vm, obj, attr, c)) {
   825	                    vm_error(vm, "attribute_error",
   826	                        "class '%s' cannot assign to attribute '%s'",
   827	                        str(be_instance_name(obj)), str(attr));
   828	                }
   829	                dispatch();
   830	            }
   831	            if (var_ismodule(a) && var_isstr(b)) {
   832	                bmodule *obj = var_toobj(a);
   833	                bstring *attr = var_tostr(b);
   834	                bvalue tmp = *c; /* stack may change */
   835	                bvalue *v = be_module_bind(vm, obj, attr);
   836	                if (v != NULL) {
   837	                    *v = tmp;
   838	                    dispatch();
   839	                }
   840	                /* if it failed, try 'setmeemner' */
   841	                bvalue *member = be_module_attr(vm, obj, str_literal(vm, "setmember"));
   842	                if (member && var_basetype(member) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   843	                    bvalue *top = vm->top;
   844	                    top[0] = *member;
   845	                    top[1] = *b; /* move name to argv[0] */
   846	                    top[2] = tmp; /* move value to argv[1] */
   847	                    vm->top += 3;   /* prevent collection results */
   848	                    be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'setmember' */
   849	                    vm->top -= 3;
   850	                    dispatch();
   851	                }
   852	            }
   853	            attribute_error(vm, "writable attribute", a, b);
   854	            dispatch();
   855	        }
   856	        opcase(GETIDX): {
   857	            bvalue *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   858	            if (var_isinstance(b)) {
   859	                bvalue *top = vm->top;
   860	                /* get method 'item' */
   861	                obj_method(vm, b, str_literal(vm, "item"), vm->top);
   862	                top[1] = *b; /* move object to argv[0] */
   863	                top[2] = *c; /* move key to argv[1] */
   864	                vm->top += 3;   /* prevent collection results */
   865	                be_dofunc(vm, top, 2); /* call method 'item' */
   866	                vm->top -= 3;
   867	                reg = vm->reg;
   868	                *RA() = *vm->top;   /* copy result to R(A) */
   869	            } else if (var_isstr(b)) {
   870	                bstring *s = be_strindex(vm, var_tostr(b), c);
   871	                reg = vm->reg;
   872	                var_setstr(RA(), s);
   873	            } else {
   874	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   875	                    "value '%s' does not support subscriptable",
   876	                    be_vtype2str(b));
   877	            }
   878	            dispatch();
   879	        }
   880	        opcase(SETIDX): {
   881	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB(), *c = RKC();
   882	            if (var_isinstance(a)) {
   883	                bvalue *top = vm->top;
   884	                /* get method 'setitem' */
   885	                obj_method(vm, a, str_literal(vm, "setitem"), vm->top);
   886	                top[1] = *a; /* move object to argv[0] */
   887	                top[2] = *b; /* move key to argv[1] */
   888	                top[3] = *c; /* move src to argv[2] */
   889	                vm->top += 4;
   890	                be_dofunc(vm, top, 3); /* call method 'setitem' */
   891	                vm->top -= 4;
   892	                reg = vm->reg;
   893	            } else {
   894	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   895	                    "value '%s' does not support index assignment",
   896	                    be_vtype2str(a));
   897	            }
   898	            dispatch();
   899	        }
   900	        opcase(SETSUPER): {
   901	            bvalue *a = RA(), *b = RKB();
   902	            if (var_isclass(a) && var_isclass(b)) {
   903	                bclass *obj = var_toobj(a);
   904	                be_class_setsuper(obj, var_toobj(b));
   905	            } else {
   906	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   907	                    "value '%s' does not support set super",
   908	                    be_vtype2str(b));
   909	            }
   910	            dispatch();
   911	        }
   912	        opcase(CLOSE): {
   913	            be_upvals_close(vm, RA());
   914	            dispatch();
   915	        }
   916	        opcase(IMPORT): {
   917	            bvalue *b = RKB();
   918	            if (var_isstr(b)) {
   919	                bstring *name = var_tostr(b);
   920	                int res = be_module_load(vm, name);
   921	                reg = vm->reg;
   922	                switch (res) {
   923	                case BE_OK: /* find the module */
   924	                    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   925	                    *RA() = *vm->top;
   926	                    break;
   927	                case BE_EXCEPTION: /* pop the exception value and message */
   928	                    be_pop(vm, 2);
   929	                    be_throw(vm, BE_EXCEPTION);
   930	                    break;
   931	                default:
   932	                    vm_error(vm, "import_error", "module '%s' not found", str(name));
   933	                }
   934	            } else {
   935	                vm_error(vm, "type_error",
   936	                    "import '%s' does not support import",
   937	                    be_vtype2str(b));
   938	            }
   939	            dispatch();
   940	        }
   941	        opcase(CATCH): {
   942	            bvalue *base = RA(), *top = vm->top;
   943	            int i = 0, ecnt = IGET_RKB(ins), vcnt = IGET_RKC(ins);
   944	            while (i < ecnt && !be_vm_iseq(vm, top, base + i)) {
   945	                ++i;
   946	            }
   947	            if (!ecnt || i < ecnt) { /* exception catched */
   948	                base = RA(), top = vm->top;
   949	                for (i = 0; i < vcnt; ++i) {
   950	                    *base++ = *top++;
   951	                }
   952	                vm->ip += 1; /* skip next instruction */
   953	            }
   954	            dispatch();
   955	        }
   956	        opcase(RAISE): {
   957	            if (IGET_RA(ins) < 2) {
   958	                bvalue *top = vm->top;
   959	                top[0] = *RKB(); /* push the exception value to top */
   960	                if (IGET_RA(ins)) { /* has exception argument? */
   961	                    top[1] = *RKC(); /* push the exception argument to top + 1 */
   962	                } else {
   963	                    var_setnil(top + 1);
   964	                }
   965	                be_save_stacktrace(vm);
   966	            }
   967	            be_throw(vm, BE_EXCEPTION); /* throw / rethrow the exception */
   968	            dispatch();
   969	        }
   970	        opcase(EXBLK): {
   971	            if (!IGET_RA(ins)) {
   972	                be_except_block_setup(vm);
   973	                if (be_setjmp(vm->errjmp->b)) {
   974	                    be_except_block_resume(vm);
   975	                    goto newframe;
   976	                }
   977	                reg = vm->reg;
   978	            } else {
   979	                be_except_block_close(vm, IGET_Bx(ins));
   980	            }
   981	            dispatch();
   982	        }
   983	        opcase(CALL): {
   984	            bvalue *var = RA();
   985	            int mode = 0, argc = IGET_RKB(ins);
   986	        recall: /* goto: instantiation class and call constructor */
   987	            switch (var_type(var)) {
   988	            case NOT_METHOD:
   989	                var[0] = var[1];
   990	                ++var, --argc, mode = 1;
   991	                goto recall;
   992	            case BE_CLASS:
   993	                if (be_class_newobj(vm, var_toobj(var), var, ++argc)) {
   994	                    reg = vm->reg;
   995	                    var = RA() + 1; /* to next register */
   996	                    goto recall; /* call constructor */
   997	                }
   998	                break;
   999	            case BE_INSTANCE: {
  1000	                bvalue *v = var + argc++, temp;
  1001	                /* load the '()' method to `temp' */
  1002	                obj_method(vm, var, str_literal(vm, "()"), &temp);
  1003	                for (; v >= var; --v) v[1] = v[0];
  1004	                *var = temp;
  1005	                goto recall; /* call '()' method */
  1006	            }
  1007	            case BE_CLOSURE: {
  1008	                bvalue *v, *end;
  1009	                bproto *proto = var2cl(var)->proto;
  1010	                push_closure(vm, var, proto->nstack, mode);
  1011	                reg = vm->reg;
  1012	                v = reg + argc;
  1013	                end = reg + proto->argc;
  1014	                for (; v < end; ++v) {
  1015	                    var_setnil(v);
  1016	                }
  1017	                goto newframe;
  1018	            }
  1019	            case BE_NTVCLOS: {
  1020	                bntvclos *f = var_toobj(var);
  1021	                push_native(vm, var, argc, mode);
  1022	                f->f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1023	                ret_native(vm);
  1024	                break;
  1025	            }
  1026	            case BE_NTVFUNC: {
  1027	                bntvfunc f = var_tontvfunc(var);
  1028	                push_native(vm, var, argc, mode);
  1029	                f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1030	                ret_native(vm);
  1031	                break;
  1032	            }
  1033	            case BE_MODULE: {
  1034	                bmodule *f = var_toobj(var);
  1035	                bvalue *member = be_module_attr(vm, f, str_literal(vm, "()"));
  1036	                if (member && var_basetype(member) == BE_FUNCTION) {
  1037	                    *var = *member;
  1038	                    goto recall; /* call '()' method */
  1039	                } else {
  1040	                    call_error(vm, var);
  1041	                }
  1042	                break;
  1043	            }
  1044	            default:
  1045	                call_error(vm, var);
  1046	            }
  1047	            reg = vm->reg;
  1048	            dispatch();
  1049	        }
  1050	        opcase(RET): {
  1051	            bcallframe *cf;
  1052	            bvalue *ret;
  1053	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
  1054	            be_callhook(vm, BE_HOOK_RET);
  1055	#endif
  1056	            cf = vm->cf;
  1057	            ret = vm->cf->func;
  1058	            /* copy return value */
  1059	            if (IGET_RA(ins)) {
  1060	                *ret = *RKB();
  1061	            } else {
  1062	                var_setnil(ret);
  1063	            }
  1064	            vm->reg = cf->reg;
  1065	            vm->top = cf->top;
  1066	            vm->ip = cf->ip;
  1067	            be_stack_pop(&vm->callstack); /* pop don't delete */
  1068	            if (cf->status & BASE_FRAME) { /* entrance function */
  1069	                bstack *cs = &vm->callstack;
  1070	                if (!be_stack_isempty(cs)) {
  1071	                    vm->cf = be_stack_top(cs);
  1072	                }
  1073	                return;
  1074	            }
  1075	            vm->cf = be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
  1076	            goto newframe;
  1077	        }
  1078	    }
  1079	}
  1080	
  1081	static void do_closure(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1082	{
  1083	    bvalue *v, *end;
  1084	    bproto *proto = var2cl(reg)->proto;
  1085	    push_closure(vm, reg, proto->nstack, 0);
  1086	    v = vm->reg + argc;
  1087	    end = vm->reg + proto->argc;
  1088	    for (; v <= end; ++v) {
  1089	        var_setnil(v);
  1090	    }
  1091	    vm_exec(vm);
  1092	}
  1093	
  1094	static void do_ntvclos(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1095	{
  1096	    bntvclos *f = var_toobj(reg);
  1097	    push_native(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1098	    f->f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1099	    ret_native(vm);
  1100	}
  1101	
  1102	static void do_ntvfunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1103	{
  1104	    bntvfunc f = var_tontvfunc(reg);
  1105	    push_native(vm, reg, argc, 0);
  1106	    f(vm); /* call C primitive function */
  1107	    ret_native(vm);
  1108	}
  1109	
  1110	static void do_class(bvm *vm, bvalue *reg, int argc)
  1111	{
  1112	    if (be_class_newobj(vm, var_toobj(reg), reg, ++argc)) {
  1113	        be_incrtop(vm);
  1114	        be_dofunc(vm, reg + 1, argc);
  1115	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
  1116	    }
  1117	}
  1118	
  1119	void be_dofunc(bvm *vm, bvalue *v, int argc)
  1120	{
  1121	    be_assert(vm->reg <= v && v < vm->stacktop);
  1122	    be_assert(vm->stack <= vm->reg && vm->reg < vm->stacktop);
  1123	    switch (var_type(v)) {
  1124	    case BE_CLASS: do_class(vm, v, argc); break;
  1125	    case BE_CLOSURE: do_closure(vm, v, argc); break;
  1126	    case BE_NTVCLOS: do_ntvclos(vm, v, argc); break;
  1127	    case BE_NTVFUNC: do_ntvfunc(vm, v, argc); break;
  1128	    default: call_error(vm, v);
  1129	    }
  1130	}
  1131	
  1132	BERRY_API void be_set_obs_hook(bvm *vm, bobshook hook)
  1133	{
  1134	    (void)vm;       /* avoid comiler warning */
  1135	    (void)hook;     /* avoid comiler warning */
  1136	
  1137	#if BE_USE_OBSERVABILITY_HOOK
  1138	    vm->obshook = hook;
  1139	#endif
  1140	}
</output>

    25	#ifndef INST_BUF_SIZE
    26	#define INST_BUF_SIZE   96
    27	#endif
    28	
    29	#define logbuf(...)     snprintf(__lbuf, sizeof(__lbuf), __VA_ARGS__)
    30	
    31	#define logfmt(...)                     \
    32	    do {                                \
    33	        char __lbuf[INST_BUF_SIZE];     \
    34	        logbuf(__VA_ARGS__);            \
    35	        be_writestring(__lbuf);         \
    36	    } while (0)

    38	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_MODULE
    39	static const char* opc2str(bopcode op)
    40	{
    41	    static const char* const opc_tab[] = {
    42	        #define OPCODE(opc) #opc
    43	        #include "be_opcodes.h"
    44	        #undef OPCODE
    45	    };
    46	    return op < array_count(opc_tab) ? opc_tab[op] : "ERROP";
    47	}
    48	
    49	void be_print_inst(binstruction ins, int pc)
    50	{
    51	    char __lbuf[INST_BUF_SIZE];
    52	    bopcode op = IGET_OP(ins);
    53	
    54	    logbuf("  %.4X  ", pc);
    55	    be_writestring(__lbuf);
    56	    switch (op) {
    57	    case OP_ADD: case OP_SUB: case OP_MUL: case OP_DIV:
    58	    case OP_MOD: case OP_LT: case OP_LE: case OP_EQ:
    59	    case OP_NE:  case OP_GT:  case OP_GE: case OP_CONNECT:
    60	    case OP_GETMBR: case OP_SETMBR:  case OP_GETMET:
    61	    case OP_GETIDX: case OP_SETIDX: case OP_AND:
    62	    case OP_OR: case OP_XOR: case OP_SHL: case OP_SHR:
    63	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\tR%d\tR%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins), IGET_RKC(ins));
    64	        break;
    65	    case OP_GETGBL: case OP_SETGBL:
    66	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\tG%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_Bx(ins));
    67	        break;
    68	    case OP_MOVE: case OP_SETSUPER: case OP_NEG: case OP_FLIP: case OP_IMPORT:
    69	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\tR%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins));
    70	        break;
    71	    case OP_JMP:
    72	        logbuf("%s\t\t#%.4X", opc2str(op), IGET_sBx(ins) + pc + 1);
    73	        break;
    74	    case OP_JMPT: case OP_JMPF:
    75	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\t#%.4X", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_sBx(ins) + pc + 1);
    76	        break;
    77	    case OP_LDINT:
    78	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\t%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_sBx(ins));
    79	        break;
    80	    case OP_LDBOOL:
    81	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\t%d\t%d", opc2str(op),  IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins), IGET_RKC(ins));
    82	        break;
    83	    case OP_RET:
    84	        logbuf("%s\t%d\tR%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins));
    85	        break;
    86	    case OP_GETUPV: case OP_SETUPV:
    87	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\tU%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_Bx(ins));
    88	        break;
    89	    case OP_LDCONST:
    90	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\tK%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_Bx(ins));
    91	        break;
    92	    case OP_CALL:
    93	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\t%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins));
    94	        break;
    95	    case OP_CLOSURE:
    96	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\tP%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_Bx(ins));
    97	        break;
    98	    case OP_CLASS:
    99	        logbuf("%s\tK%d", opc2str(op), IGET_Bx(ins));
   100	        break;
   101	    case OP_CLOSE: case OP_LDNIL:
   102	        logbuf("%s\t%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins));
   103	        break;
   104	    case OP_RAISE:
   105	        logbuf("%s\t%d\tR%d\tR%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins), IGET_RKC(ins));
   106	        break;
   107	    case OP_EXBLK:
   108	        if (IGET_RA(ins)) {
   109	            logbuf("%s\t%d\t%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_Bx(ins));
   110	        } else {
   111	            logbuf("%s\t%d\t#%.4X", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_sBx(ins) + pc + 1);
   112	        }
   113	        break;
   114	    case OP_CATCH:
   115	        logbuf("%s\tR%d\t%d\t%d", opc2str(op), IGET_RA(ins), IGET_RKB(ins), IGET_RKC(ins));
   116	        break;
   117	    default:
   118	        logbuf("%s", opc2str(op));
   119	        break;
   120	    }
   121	    be_writestring(__lbuf);
   122	    be_writenewline();
   123	}
   124	#endif

   126	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_MODULE
   127	void be_dumpclosure(bclosure *cl)
   128	{
   129	    int pc;
   130	    bproto *proto = cl->proto;
   131	    binstruction *code = proto->code;
   132	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   133	    blineinfo *lineinfo = proto->lineinfo;
   134	#endif
   135	    logfmt("source '%s', ", str(proto->source));
   136	    logfmt("function '%s':\n", str(proto->name));
   137	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   138	    if (lineinfo) { /* first line */
   139	        logfmt("; line %d\n", lineinfo->linenumber);
   140	    }
   141	#endif
   142	    for (pc = 0; pc < proto->codesize; pc++) {
   143	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   144	        if (lineinfo && pc > lineinfo->endpc) {
   145	            logfmt("; line %d\n", (++lineinfo)->linenumber);
   146	        }
   147	#endif
   148	        be_print_inst(*code++, pc);
   149	    }
   150	}
   151	#endif
   152	
   153	static void sourceinfo(bproto *proto, binstruction *ip)
   154	{
   155	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   156	    char buf[24];
   157	    be_assert(proto != NULL);
   158	    if (proto->lineinfo && proto->nlineinfo) {
   159	        blineinfo *it = proto->lineinfo;
   160	        blineinfo *end = it + proto->nlineinfo;
   161	        int pc = cast_int(ip - proto->code - 1); /* now vm->ip has been increased */
   162	        for (; it < end && pc > it->endpc; ++it);
   163	        sprintf(buf, ":%d:", it->linenumber);
   164	        be_writestring(str(proto->source));
   165	        be_writestring(buf);
   166	    } else {
   167	        be_writestring("<unknow source>:");
   168	    }
   169	#else
   170	    (void)proto; (void)ip;
   171	    be_writestring("<unknow source>:");
   172	#endif
   173	}
   174	
   175	static void tracestack(bvm *vm)
   176	{
   177	    bcallsnapshot *cf;
   178	    bcallsnapshot *base = be_stack_base(&vm->tracestack);
   179	    bcallsnapshot *top = be_stack_top(&vm->tracestack);
   180	    be_writestring("stack traceback:\n");
   181	    for (cf = top; cf >= base; --cf) {
   182	        if (cf <= top - 10 && cf >= base + 10) {
   183	            if (cf == top - 10)
   184	                be_writestring("\t...\n");
   185	            continue;
   186	        }
   187	        if (var_isclosure(&cf->func)) {
   188	            bclosure *cl = var_toobj(&cf->func);
   189	            be_writestring("\t");
   190	            sourceinfo(cl->proto, cf->ip);
   191	            be_writestring(" in function `");
   192	            be_writestring(str(cl->proto->name));
   193	            be_writestring("`\n");
   194	        } else {
   195	            be_writestring("\t<native>: in native function\n");
   196	        }
   197	    }
   198	}
   199	
   200	static void repair_stack(bvm *vm)
   201	{
   202	    bcallsnapshot *cf;
   203	    bcallsnapshot *base = be_stack_base(&vm->tracestack);
   204	    bcallsnapshot *top = be_stack_top(&vm->tracestack);
   205	    /* Because the native function does not push `ip` to the
   206	     * stack, the ip on the native function frame corresponds
   207	     * to the previous Berry closure. */
   208	    for (cf = top; cf >= base; --cf) {
   209	        if (!var_isclosure(&cf->func)) {
   210	            /* the last native function stack frame has the `ip` of
   211	             * the previous Berry frame */
   212	            binstruction *ip = cf->ip;
   213	            /* skip native function stack frames */
   214	            for (; cf >= base && !var_isclosure(&cf->func); --cf);
   215	            /* fixed `ip` of Berry closure frame near native function frame */
   216	            if (cf >= base) cf->ip = ip;
   217	        }
   218	    }
   219	}
   220	
   221	void be_tracestack(bvm *vm)
   222	{
   223	    if (be_stack_count(&vm->tracestack)) {
   224	        repair_stack(vm);
   225	        tracestack(vm);
   226	    }
   227	}

   229	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_HOOK
   230	
   231	static void hook_callnative(bvm *vm, int mask)
   232	{
   233	    bhookinfo info;
   234	    int top = be_top(vm);
   235	    bcallframe *cf = vm->cf;
   236	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(cf->func);
   237	    struct bhookblock *hb = var_toobj(&vm->hook);
   238	    be_stack_require(vm, BE_STACK_FREE_MIN + 2);
   239	    info.type = mask;
   240	    info.line = cf->lineinfo->linenumber;
   241	    info.source = str(cl->proto->source);
   242	    info.func_name = str(cl->proto->name);
   243	    info.data = hb->data;
   244	    hb->hook(vm, &info);
   245	    vm->top += 2;
   246	    be_pop(vm, be_top(vm) - top);
   247	}
   248	
   249	static int hook_pushargs(bvm *vm, int mask)
   250	{
   251	    bcallframe *cf = vm->cf;
   252	    if (mask == BE_HOOK_LINE) {
   253	        be_pushstring(vm, "line");
   254	        be_pushint(vm, cf->lineinfo->linenumber);
   255	        return 2;
   256	    }
   257	    if (mask == BE_HOOK_CALL) {
   258	        bclosure *cl = var_toobj(cf->func);
   259	        be_pushstring(vm, "call");
   260	        var_setstr(vm->top, cl->proto->name);
   261	        vm->top++;
   262	        return 2;
   263	    }
   264	    if (mask == BE_HOOK_RET) {
   265	        be_pushstring(vm, "return");
   266	        return 1;
   267	    }
   268	    return 0;
   269	}
   270	
   271	static void hook_call(bvm *vm, int mask)
   272	{
   273	    int argc;
   274	    vm->top[2] = vm->hook;
   275	    be_stack_require(vm, 5);
   276	    vm->top += 3;
   277	    argc = hook_pushargs(vm, mask);
   278	    be_call(vm, argc);
   279	    be_pop(vm, 3 + argc);
   280	}
   281	
   282	void be_callhook(bvm *vm, int mask)
   283	{
   284	    if (vm->hookmask & mask) {
   285	        int hookmask = vm->hookmask;
   286	        vm->hookmask = 0;
   287	        if (var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR)) {
   288	            hook_callnative(vm, mask);
   289	        } else {
   290	            hook_call(vm, mask);
   291	        }
   292	        vm->hookmask = (bbyte)hookmask;
   293	    }
   294	}
   295	
   296	static bbyte parse_hookmask(const char *mask)
   297	{
   298	    int c, res = 0;
   299	    if (mask) {
   300	        while ((c = *mask++) != '\0') {
   301	            switch (c) {
   302	            case 'l': res |= BE_HOOK_LINE; break;
   303	            case 'c': res |= BE_HOOK_CALL; break;
   304	            case 'r': res |= BE_HOOK_RET; break;
   305	            default: break;
   306	            }
   307	        }
   308	    }
   309	    return (bbyte)res;
   310	}
   311	
   312	BERRY_API void be_sethook(bvm *vm, const char *mask)
   313	{
   314	    vm->hookmask = parse_hookmask(mask);
   315	    if (vm->hookmask && var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR)) /* free native hook */
   316	        be_free(vm, var_toobj(&vm->hook), sizeof(struct bhookblock));
   317	    if (vm->hookmask) {
   318	        vm->hook = *be_indexof(vm, -1);
   319	    } else if (!var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR)) {
   320	        var_setnil(&vm->hook);
   321	    }
   322	}
   323	
   324	BERRY_API void be_setntvhook(bvm *vm, bntvhook hook, void *data, int mask)
   325	{
   326	    struct bhookblock *hb;
   327	    if (mask) {
   328	        if (!var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR)) {
   329	            var_setobj(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR,
   330	                be_malloc(vm, sizeof(struct bhookblock)));
   331	        }
   332	        hb = var_toobj(&vm->hook);
   333	        be_assert(hb != NULL);
   334	        hb->hook = hook;
   335	        hb->data = data;
   336	    } else if (!var_istype(&vm->hook, BE_COMPTR)) {
   337	        var_setnil(&vm->hook);
   338	    }
   339	    vm->hookmask = (bbyte)mask;
   340	}

   344	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   345	static binstruction* callstack_fixip(bvm *vm, int level)
   346	{
   347	    bcallframe *top = (bcallframe*)be_stack_top(&vm->callstack);
   348	    bcallframe *cf = top - level + 2;
   349	    for (; cf <= top && cf->status & PRIM_FUNC; ++cf);
   350	    return cf <= top ? cf->ip : vm->ip;
   351	}
   352	
   353	bbool be_debug_varname(bvm *vm, int level, int index)
   354	{
   355	    int depth = be_stack_count(&vm->callstack);
   356	    if (level > 0 && level <= depth) {
   357	        bcallframe *cf = be_vector_at(&vm->callstack, depth - level);
   358	        if ((cf->status & PRIM_FUNC) == 0) {
   359	            bproto *proto = cast(bclosure*, var_toobj(cf->func))->proto;
   360	            int pc = (int)(callstack_fixip(vm, level) - proto->code);
   361	            bstring *name = be_func_varname(proto, index, pc);
   362	            if (name) {
   363	                bvalue *reg = be_incrtop(vm);
   364	                var_setstr(reg, name);
   365	                return btrue;
   366	            }
   367	        }
   368	    }
   369	    return bfalse;
   370	}
   371	
   372	bbool be_debug_upvname(bvm *vm, int level, int index)
   373	{
   374	    int depth = be_stack_count(&vm->callstack);
   375	    if (level > 0 && level <= depth) {
   376	        bcallframe *cf = be_vector_at(&vm->callstack, depth - level);
   377	        if ((cf->status & PRIM_FUNC) == 0) {
   378	            bproto *proto = cast(bclosure*, var_toobj(cf->func))->proto;
   379	            if (index >= 0 && index < proto->nupvals) {
   380	                bvalue *reg = be_incrtop(vm);
   381	                var_setstr(reg, proto->upvals[index].name);
   382	                return btrue;
   383	            }
   384	        }
   385	    }
   386	    return bfalse;
   387	}
   388	#endif

     8	#include "be_func.h"

    15	#define clousersize(n) \
    16	    (sizeof(bclosure) + sizeof(bupval*) * ((size_t)(n) - 1))
    17	
    18	static bupval* findupval(bvm *vm, bvalue *level)
    19	{
    20	    bupval *node = vm->upvalist;
    21	    while (node != NULL && node->value > level) {
    22	        node = node->u.next;
    23	    }
    24	    if (!node || node->value != level) {
    25	        /* not found */
    26	        node = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bupval));
    27	        node->value = level;
    28	        node->refcnt = 0;
    29	        /* insert to list head */
    30	        node->u.next = vm->upvalist;
    31	        vm->upvalist = node;
    32	    }
    33	    return node;
    34	}
    35	
    36	void be_initupvals(bvm *vm, bclosure *cl)
    37	{
    38	    int count = cl->proto->nupvals;
    39	    bupvaldesc *desc = cl->proto->upvals;
    40	    bvalue *stack = vm->reg;
    41	    bupval **uv = cl->upvals;
    42	    bupval **superuv = cast(bclosure*, var_toobj(vm->cf->func))->upvals;
    43	    for (; count--; desc++, uv++) {
    44	        if (desc->instack) {
    45	            bvalue *ref = stack + desc->idx;
    46	            *uv = findupval(vm, ref);
    47	        } else {
    48	            *uv = superuv[desc->idx];
    49	        }
    50	        (*uv)->refcnt++;
    51	    }
    52	}
    53	
    54	void be_upvals_close(bvm *vm, bvalue *level)
    55	{
    56	    bupval *node = vm->upvalist, *next;
    57	    while (node && node->value >= level) {
    58	        next = node->u.next;
    59	        if (!node->refcnt) {
    60	            be_free(vm, node, sizeof(bupval));
    61	        } else {
    62	            node->u.value = *node->value; /* move value to upvalue slot */
    63	            node->value = &node->u.value;
    64	        }
    65	        node = next;
    66	    }
    67	    vm->upvalist = node;
    68	}
    69	
    70	void be_release_upvalues(bvm *vm, bclosure *cl)
    71	{
    72	    int i, count = cl->nupvals;
    73	    for (i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
    74	        bupval *uv = cl->upvals[i];
    75	        if (uv) {
    76	            if (uv->refcnt) {
    77	                --uv->refcnt;
    78	            }
    79	            /* delete non-referenced closed upvalue */
    80	            if (uv->value == &uv->u.value && !uv->refcnt) {
    81	                be_free(vm, uv, sizeof(bupval));
    82	            }
    83	        }
    84	    }
    85	}

    87	bproto* be_newproto(bvm *vm)
    88	{
    89	    bgcobject *gco = be_gcnew(vm, BE_PROTO, bproto);
    90	    bproto *p = cast_proto(gco);
    91	    if (p) {
    92	        p->upvals = NULL;
    93	        p->ktab = NULL;
    94	        p->ptab = NULL;
    95	        p->code = NULL;
    96	        p->name = NULL;
    97	        p->gray = NULL;
    98	        p->codesize = 0;
    99	        p->nupvals = 0;
   100	        p->nproto = 0;
   101	        p->nconst = 0;
   102	        p->nstack = 0;
   103	        p->codesize = 0;
   104	        p->argc = 0;
   105	        p->varg = 0;
   106	        p->source = NULL;
   107	#if BE_DEBUG_RUNTIME_INFO
   108	        p->lineinfo = NULL;
   109	        p->nlineinfo = 0;
   110	#endif
   111	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   112	        p->varinfo = NULL;
   113	        p->nvarinfo = 0;
   114	#endif
   115	    }
   116	    return p;
   117	}

   119	bclosure* be_newclosure(bvm *vm, int nupval)
   120	{
   121	    bgcobject *gco = be_newgcobj(vm, BE_CLOSURE, clousersize(nupval));
   122	    bclosure *cl = cast_closure(gco);
   123	    if (cl) {
   124	        cl->proto = NULL;
   125	        cl->nupvals = (bbyte)nupval;
   126	        while (nupval--) {
   127	            cl->upvals[nupval] = NULL;
   128	        }
   129	    }
   130	    return cl;
   131	}

   133	static void init_upvals(bvm *vm, bntvclos *f)
   134	{
   135	    int count = f->nupvals;
   136	    bupval **upvals = &be_ntvclos_upval(f, 0);
   137	    while (count--) {
   138	        bupval *uv = be_malloc(vm, sizeof(bupval)); /* was closed */
   139	        uv->value = &uv->u.value;
   140	        uv->refcnt = 1;
   141	        var_setnil(uv->value);
   142	        *upvals++ = uv;
   143	    }
   144	}
   145	
   146	bntvclos* be_newntvclosure(bvm *vm, bntvfunc cf, int nupvals)
   147	{
   148	    size_t size = sizeof(bntvclos) + sizeof(bupval*) * nupvals;
   149	    bgcobject *gco = be_newgcobj(vm, BE_NTVCLOS, size);
   150	    bntvclos *f = cast_ntvclos(gco);
   151	    if (f) {
   152	        f->f = cf;
   153	        f->nupvals = (bbyte)nupvals;
   154	        if (nupvals) {
   155	            var_setntvclos(vm->top, f);
   156	            be_incrtop(vm);
   157	            init_upvals(vm, f); /* may be GC */
   158	            be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   159	        }
   160	    }
   161	    return f;
   162	}
   163	
   164	#if BE_DEBUG_VAR_INFO
   165	bstring* be_func_varname(bproto *proto, int index, int pc)
   166	{
   167	    int i, nvarinfo = proto->nvarinfo;
   168	    bvarinfo *varinfo = proto->varinfo;
   169	    for (i = 0; i < nvarinfo && varinfo[i].beginpc <= pc; ++i) {
   170	        if (pc <= varinfo[i].endpc && index-- == 0) {
   171	            return varinfo[i].name;
   172	        }
   173	    }
   174	    return NULL;
   175	}
   176	#endif
</output>

     1	/********************************************************************
     2	** Copyright (c) 2018-2020 Guan Wenliang

     8	#include "be_class.h"
     9	#include "be_string.h"
    10	#include "be_vector.h"
    11	#include "be_map.h"
    12	#include "be_exec.h"
    13	#include "be_gc.h"
    14	#include "be_vm.h"
    15	#include "be_func.h"
    16	#include "be_var.h"
    17	
    18	#define check_members(vm, c)            \
    19	    if (!(c)->members) {                \
    20	        (c)->members = be_map_new(vm);  \
    21	    }
    22	
    23	bclass* be_newclass(bvm *vm, bstring *name, bclass *super)
    24	{
    25	    bgcobject *gco = be_gcnew(vm, BE_CLASS, bclass);
    26	    bclass *obj = cast_class(gco);
    27	    bvalue *buf = be_incrtop(vm); /* protect new objects from GC */
    28	    var_setclass(buf, obj);
    29	    if (obj) {
    30	        obj->super = super;
    31	        obj->members = NULL; /* gc protection */
    32	        obj->nvar = 0;
    33	        obj->name = name;
    34	    }
    35	    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
    36	    return obj;
    37	}
    38	
    39	void be_class_compress(bvm *vm, bclass *c)
    40	{
    41	    if (!gc_isconst(c) && c->members) {
    42	        be_map_release(vm, c->members); /* clear space */
    43	    }
    44	}
    45	
    46	int be_class_attribute(bvm *vm, bclass *c, bstring *attr)
    47	{
    48	    for (; c; c = c->super) {
    49	        if (c->members) {
    50	            bvalue *v = be_map_findstr(vm, c->members, attr);
    51	            if (v) {
    52	                return var_type(v);
    53	            }
    54	        }
    55	    }
    56	    return BE_NIL;
    57	}
    58	
    59	void be_member_bind(bvm *vm, bclass *c, bstring *name)
    60	{
    61	    bvalue *attr;
    62	    set_fixed(name);
    63	    check_members(vm, c);
    64	    attr = be_map_insertstr(vm, c->members, name, NULL);
    65	    restore_fixed(name);
    66	    attr->v.i = c->nvar++;
    67	    attr->type = MT_VARIABLE;
    68	}
    69	
    70	void be_method_bind(bvm *vm, bclass *c, bstring *name, bproto *p)
    71	{
    72	    bclosure *cl;
    73	    bvalue *attr;
    74	    set_fixed(name);
    75	    check_members(vm, c);
    76	    attr = be_map_insertstr(vm, c->members, name, NULL);
    77	    restore_fixed(name);
    78	    var_setnil(attr);
    79	    cl = be_newclosure(vm, p->nupvals);
    80	    cl->proto = p;
    81	    var_setclosure(attr, cl);
    82	}
    83	
    84	void be_prim_method_bind(bvm *vm, bclass *c, bstring *name, bntvfunc f)
    85	{
    86	    bvalue *attr;
    87	    set_fixed(name);
    88	    check_members(vm, c);
    89	    attr = be_map_insertstr(vm, c->members, name, NULL);
    90	    restore_fixed(name);
    91	    attr->v.nf = f;
    92	    attr->type = MT_PRIMMETHOD;
    93	}
    94	
    95	void be_closure_method_bind(bvm *vm, bclass *c, bstring *name, bclosure *cl)
    96	{
    97	    bvalue *attr;
    98	    check_members(vm, c);
    99	    attr = be_map_insertstr(vm, c->members, name, NULL);
   100	    attr->v.gc = (bgcobject*) cl;
   101	    attr->type = MT_METHOD;
   102	}
   103	
   104	/* get the closure method count that need upvalues */
   105	int be_class_closure_count(bclass *c)
   106	{
   107	    int count = 0;
   108	    if (c->members) {
   109	        bmapnode *node;
   110	        bmap *members = c->members;
   111	        bmapiter iter = be_map_iter();
   112	        while ((node = be_map_next(members, &iter)) != NULL) {
   113	            if (var_isproto(&node->value)) {
   114	                ++count;
   115	            }
   116	        }
   117	    }
   118	    return count;
   119	}
   120	
   121	static binstance* instance_member(bvm *vm,
   122	    binstance *obj, bstring *name, bvalue *dst)
   123	{
   124	    for (; obj; obj = obj->super) {
   125	        bmap *members = obj->_class->members;
   126	        if (members) {
   127	            bvalue *v = be_map_findstr(vm, members, name);
   128	            if (v) {
   129	                *dst = *v;
   130	                return obj;
   131	            }
   132	        }
   133	    }
   134	    var_setnil(dst);
   135	    return NULL;
   136	}
   137	
   138	void be_class_upvalue_init(bvm *vm, bclass *c)
   139	{
   140	    bmap *mbr = c->members;
   141	    if (mbr != NULL) {
   142	        bmapnode *node;
   143	        bmapiter iter = be_map_iter();
   144	        while ((node = be_map_next(mbr, &iter)) != NULL) {
   145	            if (var_isclosure(&node->value)) {
   146	                bclosure *cl = var_toobj(&node->value);
   147	                if (cl->proto->nupvals) {
   148	                    /* initialize the closure's upvalues */
   149	                    be_release_upvalues(vm, cl);
   150	                    be_initupvals(vm, cl);
   151	                }
   152	            }
   153	        }
   154	    }
   155	}
   156	
   157	static binstance* newobjself(bvm *vm, bclass *c)
   158	{
   159	    size_t size = sizeof(binstance) + sizeof(bvalue) * (c->nvar - 1);
   160	    bgcobject *gco = be_newgcobj(vm, BE_INSTANCE, size);
   161	    binstance *obj = cast_instance(gco);
   162	    be_assert(obj != NULL);
   163	    if (obj) { /* initialize members */
   164	        bvalue *v = obj->members, *end = v + c->nvar;
   165	        while (v < end) { var_setnil(v); ++v; }
   166	        obj->_class = c;
   167	        obj->super = NULL;
   168	    }
   169	    return obj;
   170	}
   171	
   172	static binstance* newobject(bvm *vm, bclass *c)
   173	{
   174	    binstance *obj, *prev;
   175	    be_assert(c != NULL);
   176	    obj = prev = newobjself(vm, c);
   177	    var_setinstance(vm->top, obj);
   178	    be_incrtop(vm); /* protect new objects from GC */
   179	    for (c = c->super; c; c = c->super) {
   180	        prev->super = newobjself(vm, c);
   181	        prev = prev->super;
   182	    }
   183	    be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   184	    return obj;
   185	}
   186	
   187	bbool be_class_newobj(bvm *vm, bclass *c, bvalue *reg, int argc)
   188	{
   189	    bvalue init;
   190	    size_t pos = reg - vm->reg;
   191	    binstance *obj = newobject(vm, c);
   192	    reg = vm->reg + pos; /* the stack may have changed  */
   193	    var_setinstance(reg, obj);
   194	    /* find constructor */
   195	    obj = instance_member(vm, obj, str_literal(vm, "init"), &init);
   196	    if (obj && var_type(&init) != MT_VARIABLE) {
   197	        /* copy argv */
   198	        for (reg = vm->reg + pos + 1; argc > 0; --argc) {
   199	            reg[argc] = reg[argc - 2];
   200	        }
   201	        *reg = init; /* set constructor */
   202	        return btrue;
   203	    }
   204	    return bfalse;
   205	}
   206	
   207	int be_instance_member(bvm *vm, binstance *obj, bstring *name, bvalue *dst)
   208	{
   209	    int type;
   210	    be_assert(name != NULL);
   211	    obj = instance_member(vm, obj, name, dst);
   212	    type = var_type(dst);
   213	    if (obj && type == MT_VARIABLE) {
   214	        *dst = obj->members[dst->v.i];
   215	    }
   216	    return type;
   217	}
   218	
   219	bbool be_instance_setmember(bvm *vm, binstance *o, bstring *name, bvalue *src)
   220	{
   221	    bvalue v;
   222	    be_assert(name != NULL);
   223	    binstance * obj = instance_member(vm, o, name, &v);
   224	    if (obj && var_istype(&v, MT_VARIABLE)) {
   225	        obj->members[var_toint(&v)] = *src;
   226	        return btrue;
   227	    } else {
   228	        obj = instance_member(vm, o, str_literal(vm, "setmember"), &v);
   229	        if (obj && var_type(&v) == MT_VARIABLE) {
   230	            v = obj->members[v.v.i];
   231	        }
   232	        if (var_basetype(&v) == BE_FUNCTION) {
   233	            bvalue *top = vm->top;
   234	            var_setval(top, &v);
   235	            var_setinstance(top + 1, o); /* move instance to argv[0] */
   236	            var_setstr(top + 2, name); /* move method name to argv[1] */
   237	            var_setval(top + 3, src); /* move method name to argv[1] */
   238	            vm->top += 4;   /* prevent collection results */
   239	            be_dofunc(vm, top, 3); /* call method 'member' */
   240	            vm->top -= 4;
   241	            return var_tobool(top);
   242	        }
   243	    }
   244	    return bfalse;
   245	}
</output>

     8	#include "be_map.h"
     9	#include "be_string.h"
    10	#include "be_vector.h"

    16	#include <string.h>
    17	
    18	#define key(node)           (&(node)->key)
    19	#define value(node)         (&(node)->value)
    20	#define isnil(node)         var_isnil(key(node))
    21	#define setnil(node)        var_setnil(key(node))
    22	#define hash2slot(m, h)     ((m)->slots + (h) % (m)->size)
    23	#define hashcode(_v)        _hashcode(vm, (_v)->type, (_v)->v)
    24	#define keytype(key)        ((signed char)(key)->type)
    25	
    26	#define next(node)          ((node)->key.next)
    27	#define pos2slot(map, n)    ((n) != LASTNODE ? ((map)->slots + (n)) : NULL)
    28	#define pos(map, node)      ((int)((node) - (map)->slots))
    29	#define setkey(node, _v)    { (node)->key.type = (bbyte)(_v)->type; \
    30	                              (node)->key.v = (_v)->v; }
    31	
    32	#define datasize(size)      ((size) * sizeof(bmapnode))
    33	
    34	#define LASTNODE            ((1 << 24) - 1)
    35	
    36	static int map_nextsize(int size)
    37	{
    38	    be_assert(size < LASTNODE);
    39	    if (size < LASTNODE) {
    40	        return be_nextsize(size);
    41	    }
    42	    return LASTNODE + 1;
    43	}
    44	
    45	static uint32_t hashptr(void *p)
    46	{
    47	    uintptr_t i = (uintptr_t)p;
    48	    return (uint32_t)((i ^ (i >> 16)) & 0xFFFFFFFF);
    49	}
    50	
    51	#if BE_USE_SINGLE_FLOAT
    52	#define hashreal(v)     ((uint32_t)((v).i))
    53	#else
    54	static uint32_t hashreal(union bvaldata v)
    55	{
    56	    union { breal r; uint32_t i[2]; } u;
    57	    u.r = v.r;
    58	    return u.i[0] ^ u.i[1];
    59	}
    60	#endif
    61	
    62	#if BE_USE_OVERLOAD_HASH
    63	static uint32_t hashins(bvm *vm, binstance *obj)
    64	{
    65	    int type = be_instance_member(vm, obj, str_literal(vm, "hash"), vm->top);
    66	    if (basetype(type) == BE_FUNCTION) {
    67	        bvalue *top = vm->top;
    68	        var_setinstance(top + 1, obj);
    69	        vm->top += 2;
    70	        be_dofunc(vm, top, 1); /* call method 'item' */
    71	        vm->top -= 2;
    72	        if (!var_isint(vm->top)) { /* check the return value */
    73	            const char *name = str(be_instance_name(obj));
    74	            be_raise(vm, "runtime_error", be_pushfstring(vm,
    75	                "the value of `%s::hash()` is not a 'int'",
    76	                strlen(name) ? name : "<anonymous>"));
    77	        }
    78	        return (uint32_t)var_toint(vm->top);
    79	    }
    80	    return hashptr(obj);
    81	}
    82	#endif
    83	
    84	static uint32_t _hashcode(bvm *vm, int type, union bvaldata v)
    85	{
    86	    (void)vm;
    87	    switch (type) {
    88	    case BE_NIL: return 0;
    89	    case BE_BOOL: return (uint32_t)v.b;
    90	    case BE_INT: return (uint32_t)v.i;
    91	    case BE_REAL: return hashreal(v);
    92	    case BE_STRING: return be_strhash(v.s);
    93	#if BE_USE_OVERLOAD_HASH
    94	    case BE_INSTANCE: return hashins(vm, v.p);
    95	#endif
    96	    default: return hashptr(v.p);
    97	    }
    98	}
    99	
   100	static int eqnode(bvm *vm, bmapnode *node, bvalue *key, uint32_t hash)
   101	{
   102	    (void)vm;
   103	    if (!var_isnil(key)) {
   104	        bmapkey *k = key(node);
   105	#if BE_USE_OVERLOAD_HASH
   106	        if (var_isinstance(key)) {
   107	            bvalue kv;
   108	            kv.type = k->type;
   109	            kv.v = k->v;
   110	            return be_vm_iseq(vm, key, &kv);
   111	        }
   112	#endif
   113	        if(keytype(k) == key->type && hashcode(k) == hash) {
   114	            switch (key->type) {
   115	            case BE_INT: return var_toint(key) == var_toint(k);
   116	            case BE_REAL: return var_toreal(key) == var_toreal(k);
   117	            case BE_STRING: return be_eqstr(var_tostr(key), var_tostr(k));
   118	            default: return var_toobj(key) == var_toobj(k);
   119	            }
   120	        }
   121	    }
   122	    return 0;
   123	}
   124	
   125	static bmapnode* findprev(bmap *map, bmapnode *list, bmapnode *slot)
   126	{
   127	    int n, pos = pos(map, slot);
   128	    bmapnode *prev = list;
   129	    for (;;) {
   130	        n = next(prev);
   131	        if (n == pos || n == LASTNODE) {
   132	            break;
   133	        }
   134	        prev = map->slots + n;
   135	    }
   136	    return n == pos ? prev : NULL;
   137	}
   138	
   139	static bmapnode* nextfree(bmap *map)
   140	{
   141	    bmapnode *base = map->slots;
   142	    while (map->lastfree >= base) {
   143	        if (isnil(map->lastfree)) {
   144	            return map->lastfree;
   145	        }
   146	        --map->lastfree;
   147	    }
   148	    return NULL;
   149	}
   150	
   151	static bmapnode* insert(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bvalue *key, uint32_t hash)
   152	{
   153	    bmapnode *slot = hash2slot(map, hash);
   154	    if (isnil(slot)) { /* empty slot */
   155	        setkey(slot, key);
   156	        next(slot) = LASTNODE;
   157	    } else {
   158	        uint32_t h = hashcode(key(slot)); /* get the hashcode of the exist node */
   159	        bmapnode *mainslot = hash2slot(map, h); /* get the main-slot */
   160	        bmapnode *new = nextfree(map); /* get a free slot */
   161	        if (mainslot == slot) { /* old is main slot */
   162	            /* insert in first */
   163	            setkey(new, key);
   164	            next(new) = next(slot);
   165	            next(slot) = pos(map, new);
   166	            slot = new;
   167	        } else {
   168	            bmapnode *prev = findprev(map, mainslot, slot);
   169	            next(prev) = pos(map, new); /* link the previous node */
   170	            *new = *slot; /* copy to new slot */
   171	            setkey(slot, key);
   172	            next(slot) = LASTNODE;
   173	        }
   174	    }
   175	    return slot;
   176	}
   177	
   178	static bmapnode* find(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bvalue *key, uint32_t hash)
   179	{
   180	    bmapnode *slot = hash2slot(map, hash);
   181	    if (isnil(slot)) {
   182	        return NULL;
   183	    }
   184	    while (!eqnode(vm, slot, key, hash)) {
   185	        int n = next(slot);
   186	        if (n == LASTNODE) {
   187	            return NULL;
   188	        }
   189	        slot = map->slots + n;
   190	    }
   191	    return slot;
   192	}
   193	
   194	static void resize(bvm *vm, bmap *map, int size)
   195	{
   196	    int i, oldsize;
   197	    bmapnode *slots, *oldslots;
   198	    if (size < map->count) {
   199	        return;
   200	    }
   201	    oldsize = map->size;
   202	    oldslots = map->slots;
   203	    slots = be_malloc(vm, datasize(size));
   204	    for (i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
   205	        setnil(slots + i);
   206	    }
   207	    map->size = size;
   208	    map->slots = slots;
   209	    map->lastfree = slots + size - 1;
   210	    /* rehash */
   211	    for (i = 0; i < oldsize; ++i) {
   212	        bmapnode *node = oldslots + i;
   213	        if (!isnil(node)) {
   214	            bvalue v;
   215	            bmapnode *newslot;
   216	            v.type = node->key.type;
   217	            v.v = node->key.v;
   218	            newslot = insert(vm, map, &v, hashcode(&v));
   219	            newslot->value = node->value;
   220	        }
   221	    }
   222	    be_free(vm, oldslots, datasize(oldsize));
   223	}
   224	
   225	bmap* be_map_new(bvm *vm)
   226	{
   227	    bgcobject *gco = be_gcnew(vm, BE_MAP, bmap);
   228	    bmap *map = cast_map(gco);
   229	    if (map) {
   230	        map->size = 0;
   231	        map->count = 0;
   232	        map->slots = NULL;
   233	        var_setmap(vm->top, map);
   234	        be_incrtop(vm);
   235	        resize(vm, map, 2);
   236	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   237	    }
   238	    return map;
   239	}
   240	
   241	void be_map_delete(bvm *vm, bmap *map)
   242	{
   243	    be_free(vm, map->slots, datasize(map->size));
   244	    be_free(vm, map, sizeof(bmap));
   245	}
   246	
   247	bvalue* be_map_find(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bvalue *key)
   248	{
   249	    bmapnode *entry = find(vm, map, key, hashcode(key));
   250	    return entry ? value(entry) : NULL;
   251	}
   252	
   253	bvalue* be_map_insert(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bvalue *key, bvalue *value)
   254	{
   255	    uint32_t hash = hashcode(key);
   256	    bmapnode *entry = find(vm, map, key, hash);
   257	    if (!entry) { /* new entry */
   258	        if (map->count >= map->size) {
   259	            resize(vm, map, map_nextsize(map->size));
   260	        }
   261	        entry = insert(vm, map, key, hash);
   262	        ++map->count;
   263	    }
   264	    if (value) {
   265	        entry->value = *value;
   266	    }
   267	    return value(entry);
   268	}
   269	
   270	int be_map_remove(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bvalue *key)
   271	{
   272	    uint32_t hash = hashcode(key);
   273	    bmapnode *slot = hash2slot(map, hash); /* main slot */
   274	
   275	    if (eqnode(vm, slot, key, hash)) { /* first node */
   276	        bmapnode *next = pos2slot(map, next(slot));
   277	        if (next) { /* has next */
   278	            *slot = *next; /* first: copy the second node to the slot */
   279	            slot = next; /* second: set the second node to nil (empty) */
   280	        }
   281	    } else { /* the node will be remove is not first-node */
   282	        bmapnode *prev = slot;
   283	        for (;;) { /* find the previous node */
   284	            int n = next(prev);
   285	            slot = pos2slot(map, n);
   286	            if (slot == NULL) { /* node not found */
   287	                return bfalse;
   288	            }
   289	            if (eqnode(vm, slot, key, hash)) {
   290	                break;
   291	            }
   292	            prev = slot;
   293	        }
   294	        /* link the list */
   295	        next(prev) = next(slot);
   296	    }
   297	    /* set to nil */
   298	    setnil(slot);
   299	    /* add to lastfree */
   300	    if (map->lastfree < slot) {
   301	        map->lastfree = slot;
   302	    }
   303	    --map->count;
   304	    return btrue;
   305	}
   306	
   307	bvalue* be_map_findstr(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bstring *key)
   308	{
   309	    bvalue v;
   310	    var_setstr(&v, key);
   311	    return be_map_find(vm, map, &v);
   312	}
   313	
   314	bvalue* be_map_insertstr(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bstring *key, bvalue *value)
   315	{
   316	    bvalue v;
   317	    var_setstr(&v, key);
   318	    set_fixed(key);
   319	    bvalue * r = be_map_insert(vm, map, &v, value);
   320	    restore_fixed(key);
   321	    return r;
   322	}
   323	
   324	void be_map_removestr(bvm *vm, bmap *map, bstring *key)
   325	{
   326	    bvalue v;
   327	    var_setstr(&v, key);
   328	    be_map_remove(vm, map, &v);
   329	}
   330	
   331	bmapnode* be_map_next(bmap *map, bmapiter *iter)
   332	{
   333	    bmapnode *end = map->slots + map->size;
   334	    *iter = *iter ? *iter + 1 : map->slots;
   335	    while (*iter < end && isnil(*iter)) {
   336	        ++(*iter);
   337	    }
   338	    return *iter < end ? *iter : NULL;
   339	}
   340	
   341	bmapnode* be_map_val2node(bvalue *value)
   342	{
   343	    return (bmapnode *)((size_t)value - sizeof(bmapkey));
   344	}
   345	
   346	void be_map_release(bvm *vm, bmap *map)
   347	{
   348	    (void)vm;
   349	    resize(vm, map, map->count ? map->count : 1);
   350	}
</output>
