     8	#include "be_mem.h"
     9	#include "be_exec.h"
    10	#include "be_vm.h"
    11	#include "be_gc.h"
    12	#include <stdlib.h>
    13	#include <string.h>
    14	
    15	#define GC_ALLOC    (1 << 2) /* GC in alloc */
    16	
    17	#ifdef BE_EXPLICIT_MALLOC
    18	  #define malloc                BE_EXPLICIT_MALLOC
    19	#endif
    20	
    21	#ifdef BE_EXPLICIT_FREE
    22	  #define free                  BE_EXPLICIT_FREE
    23	#endif
    24	
    25	#ifdef BE_EXPLICIT_REALLOC
    26	  #define realloc               BE_EXPLICIT_REALLOC
    27	#endif
    28	
    29	BERRY_API void* be_os_malloc(size_t size)
    30	{
    31	    return malloc(size);
    32	}
    33	
    34	BERRY_API void be_os_free(void *ptr)
    35	{
    36	    free(ptr);
    37	}
    38	
    39	BERRY_API void* be_os_realloc(void *ptr, size_t size)
    40	{
    41	    return realloc(ptr, size);
    42	}
    43	
    44	static void* _realloc(void *ptr, size_t old_size, size_t new_size)
    45	{
    46	    if (old_size == new_size) { /* the block unchanged */
    47	        return ptr;
    48	    }
    49	    if (ptr && new_size) { /* realloc block */
    50	        return realloc(ptr, new_size);
    51	    }
    52	    if (new_size) { /* alloc a new block */
    53	        be_assert(ptr == NULL && old_size == 0);
    54	        return malloc(new_size);
    55	    }
    56	    be_assert(new_size == 0);
    57	
    58	#if BE_USE_DEBUG_GC
    59	    memset(ptr, 0xFF, old_size); /* fill the structure with invalid pointers */
    60	#endif
    61	    free(ptr);
    62	    return NULL;
    63	}
    64	
    65	BERRY_API void* be_realloc(bvm *vm, void *ptr, size_t old_size, size_t new_size)
    66	{
    67	    void *block = _realloc(ptr, old_size, new_size);
    68	    if (!block && new_size) { /* allocation failure */
    69	        vm->gc.status |= GC_ALLOC;
    70	        be_gc_collect(vm); /* try to allocate again after GC */
    71	        vm->gc.status &= ~GC_ALLOC;
    72	        block = _realloc(ptr, old_size, new_size);
    73	        if (!block) { /* lack of heap space */
    74	            be_throw(vm, BE_MALLOC_FAIL);
    75	        }
    76	    }
    77	    vm->gc.usage = vm->gc.usage + new_size - old_size; /* update allocated count */
    78	    return block;
    79	}

   126	        var_setnil((bvalue*)(builtin(vm).vlist.end));
   127	    }
   128	    return idx;
   129	}
   130	
   131	void be_bulitin_release_space(bvm *vm)
   132	{
   133	    be_map_release(vm, builtin(vm).vtab);
   134	    be_vector_release(vm, &builtin(vm).vlist);
   135	}
   136	#else
   137	void be_const_builtin_set(bvm *vm, const bmap *map, const bvector *vec)
   138	{
   139	    builtin(vm).vtab = cast(bmap*, map);
   140	    builtin(vm).vlist = *vec;
   141	}
   142	#endif
</output>

<output>
     1	/********************************************************************
     2	** Copyright (c) 2018-2020 Guan Wenliang
     3	** This file is part of the Berry default interpreter.
     4	** skiars@qq.com, https://github.com/Skiars/berry
     5	** See Copyright Notice in the LICENSE file or at
     6	** https://github.com/Skiars/berry/blob/master/LICENSE
     7	********************************************************************/
     8	#include "be_vector.h"
     9	#include "be_mem.h"
    10	#include <string.h>
    11	
    12	/* initialize a vector, the vector structure itself is usually allocated
    13	 * on the stack, and the data is allocated from the heap.
    14	 **/
    15	void be_vector_init(bvm *vm, bvector *vector, int size)
    16	{
    17	    vector->capacity = 2; /* the default capacity */
    18	    vector->size = size;
    19	    vector->count = 0;
    20	    vector->data = be_malloc(vm, (size_t)vector->capacity * size);
    21	    vector->end = (char*)vector->data - size;
    22	    memset(vector->data, 0, (size_t)vector->capacity * size);
    23	}
    24	
    25	void be_vector_delete(bvm *vm, bvector *vector)
    26	{
    27	    be_free(vm, vector->data, (size_t)vector->capacity * vector->size);
    28	}
    29	
    30	void* be_vector_at(bvector *vector, int index)
    31	{
    32	    return (char*)vector->data + (size_t)index * vector->size;
    33	}
    34	
    35	void be_vector_push(bvm *vm, bvector *vector, void *data)
    36	{
    37	    size_t size = vector->size;
    38	    size_t capacity = vector->capacity;
    39	    size_t count = vector->count++;
    40	    if (count >= capacity) {
    41	        int newcap = be_nextsize(vector->capacity);
    42	        vector->data = be_realloc(vm,
    43	                vector->data, vector->capacity * size, newcap * size);
    44	        vector->end = (char*)vector->data + count * size;
    45	        vector->capacity = newcap;
    46	    } else {
    47	        vector->end = (char*)vector->end + size;
    48	    }
    49	    if (data != NULL) {
    50	        memcpy(vector->end, data, size);
    51	    }
    52	}
    53	
    54	/* clear the expanded portion if the memory expands */
    55	void be_vector_push_c(bvm *vm, bvector *vector, void *data)
    56	{
    57	    int capacity = vector->capacity + 1;
    58	    be_vector_push(vm, vector, data);
    59	    if (vector->capacity > capacity) {
    60	        size_t size = ((size_t)vector->capacity - capacity) * vector->size;
    61	        memset(be_vector_at(vector, capacity), 0, size);
    62	    }
    63	}
    64	
    65	void be_vector_remove_end(bvector *vector)
    66	{
    67	    be_assert(vector->count > 0);
    68	    vector->count--;
    69	    vector->end = (char*)vector->end - vector->size;
    70	}
    71	
    72	void be_vector_resize(bvm *vm, bvector *vector, int count)
    73	{
    74	    size_t size = vector->size;
    75	    be_assert(count >= 0);
    76	    if (count != be_vector_count(vector)) {
    77	        int newcap = be_nextsize(count);
    78	        if (newcap > vector->capacity) { /* extended capacity */
    79	            vector->data = be_realloc(vm,
    80	                vector->data, vector->capacity * size, newcap * size);
    81	            vector->capacity = newcap;
    82	        }
    83	        vector->count = count;
    84	        vector->end = (char*)vector->data + size * ((size_t)count - 1);
    85	    }
    86	}
    87	
    88	void be_vector_clear(bvector *vector)
    89	{
    90	    vector->count = 0;
    91	    vector->end = (char*)vector->data - vector->size;
    92	}
    93	
    94	/* free not used */
    95	void* be_vector_release(bvm *vm, bvector *vector)
    96	{
    97	    size_t size = vector->size;
    98	    int count = be_vector_count(vector);
    99	    if (count == 0) {
   100	        be_free(vm, vector->data, vector->capacity * size);
   101	        vector->capacity = 0;
   102	        vector->data = NULL;
   103	        vector->end = NULL;
   104	    } else if (count < vector->capacity) {
   105	        vector->data = be_realloc(vm,
   106	            vector->data, vector->capacity * size, count * size);
   107	        vector->end = (char*)vector->data + ((size_t)count - 1) * size;
   108	        vector->capacity = count;
   109	    }
   110	    return vector->data;
   111	}
   112	
   113	/* use binary search to find the vector capacity between 0-1024 */
   114	static int binary_search(int value)
   115	{
   116	    static const uint16_t tab[] = {
   117	        0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16,
   118	        20, 24, 28, 32, 40, 48, 64, 96, 128,
   119	        192, 256, 384, 512, 768, 1024
   120	    };
   121	    const uint16_t *low = tab;
   122	    const uint16_t *high = tab + array_count(tab) - 1;
   123	    while (low <= high) {
   124	        const uint16_t *mid = low + ((high - low) >> 1);
   125	        if (*mid == value) {
   126	            return mid[1];
   127	        }
   128	        if (*mid < value) {
   129	            low = mid + 1;
   130	        } else {
   131	            high = mid - 1;
   132	        }
   133	    }
   134	    return *low;
   135	}
   136	
   137	static int nextpow(int value)
   138	{
   139	    value |= value >> 1;
   140	    value |= value >> 2;
   141	    value |= value >> 4;
   142	    value |= value >> 8;
   143	    value |= value >> 16;
   144	    return value + 1;
   145	}
   146	
   147	int be_nextsize(int size)
   148	{
   149	    if (size < 1024) {
   150	        return binary_search(size);
   151	    }
   152	    return nextpow(size);
   153	}
</output>

     1	/********************************************************************
     2	** Copyright (c) 2018-2020 Guan Wenliang

     4	** skiars@qq.com, https://github.com/Skiars/berry

     8	#include "be_string.h"
     9	#include "be_vm.h"
    10	#include "be_mem.h"
    11	#include "be_constobj.h"
    12	#include <string.h>
    13	
    14	#define next(_s)    cast(void*, cast(bstring*, (_s)->next))
    15	#define sstr(_s)    cast(char*, cast(bsstring*, _s) + 1)
    16	#define lstr(_s)    cast(char*, cast(blstring*, _s) + 1)
    17	#define cstr(_s)    (cast(bcstring*, _s)->s)
    18	
    19	#define be_define_const_str(_name, _s, _hash, _extra, _len, _next) \
    20	    BERRY_LOCAL const bcstring be_const_str_##_name = {            \
    21	        .next = (bgcobject *)_next,                                \
    22	        .type = BE_STRING,                                         \
    23	        .marked = GC_CONST,                                        \
    24	        .extra = _extra,                                           \
    25	        .slen = _len,                                              \
    26	        .hash = _hash,                                             \
    27	        .s = _s                                                    \
    28	    }
    29	
    30	/* const string table */
    31	struct bconststrtab {
    32	    const bstring* const *table;
    33	    int count; /* string count */
    34	    int size;
    35	};
    36	
    37	#if BE_USE_PRECOMPILED_OBJECT
    38	#include "../generate/be_const_strtab_def.h"
    39	#endif
    40	
    41	int be_eqstr(bstring *s1, bstring *s2)
    42	{
    43	    int slen;
    44	    if (s1 == s2) { /* short string or the same string */
    45	        return 1;
    46	    }
    47	    slen = s1->slen;
    48	    /* discard different lengths */
    49	    if (slen != s2->slen) {
    50	        return 0;
    51	    }
    52	    /* long string */
    53	    if (slen == 255) {  /* s2->slen is also 255 */
    54	        blstring *ls1 = cast(blstring*, s1);
    55	        blstring *ls2 = cast(blstring*, s2);
    56	        return ls1->llen == ls2->llen && !strcmp(lstr(ls1), lstr(ls2));
    57	    }
    58	    // TODO one is long const and the other is long string
    59	    /* const short strings */
    60	    if (gc_isconst(s1) || gc_isconst(s2)) { /* one of the two string is short const */
    61	        if (cast(bcstring*, s1)->hash && cast(bcstring*, s2)->hash) {
    62	            return 0; /* if they both have a hash, then we know they are different */
    63	        }
    64	        return !strcmp(str(s1), str(s2));
    65	    }
    66	
    67	    return 0;
    68	}
    69	
    70	static void resize(bvm *vm, int size)
    71	{
    72	    int i;
    73	    struct bstringtable *tab = &vm->strtab;
    74	    if (size > tab->size) {
    75	        tab->table = be_realloc(vm, tab->table,
    76	            tab->size * sizeof(bstring*), size * sizeof(bstring*));
    77	        for (i = tab->size; i < size; ++i) {
    78	            tab->table[i] = NULL;
    79	        }
    80	    }
    81	    for (i = 0; i < tab->size; ++i) { /* rehash */
    82	        bstring *p = tab->table[i];
    83	        tab->table[i] = NULL;
    84	        while (p) { /* for each node in the list */
    85	            bstring *hnext = next(p);
    86	            uint32_t hash = be_strhash(p) & (size - 1);
    87	            p->next = cast(void*, tab->table[hash]);
    88	            tab->table[hash] = p;
    89	            p = hnext;
    90	        }
    91	    }
    92	    if (size < tab->size) {
    93	        for (i = size; i < tab->size; ++i) {
    94	            tab->table[i] = NULL;
    95	        }
    96	        tab->table = be_realloc(vm, tab->table,
    97	            tab->size * sizeof(bstring*), size * sizeof(bstring*));
    98	    }
    99	    tab->size = size;
   100	}
   101	
   102	static void free_sstring(bvm *vm, bstring *str)
   103	{
   104	    be_free(vm, str, sizeof(bsstring) + str->slen + 1);
   105	}
   106	
   107	/* FNV-1a Hash */
   108	static uint32_t str_hash(const char *str, size_t len)
   109	{
   110	    uint32_t hash = 2166136261u;
   111	    be_assert(str || len);
   112	    while (len--) {
   113	        hash = (hash ^ (unsigned char)*str++) * 16777619u;
   114	    }
   115	    return hash;
   116	}
   117	
   118	void be_string_init(bvm *vm)
   119	{
   120	    resize(vm, 8);
   121	#if !BE_USE_PRECOMPILED_OBJECT
   122	    /* the destructor name deinit needs to exist all the time, to ensure
   123	     * that it does not need to be created when the heap is exhausted. */
   124	    be_gc_fix(vm, cast(bgcobject*, str_literal(vm, "deinit")));
   125	#endif
   126	    /* be_const_str_deinit --> for precompiled */
   127	}
   128	
   129	void be_string_deleteall(bvm *vm)
   130	{
   131	    int i;
   132	    struct bstringtable *tab = &vm->strtab;
   133	    for (i = 0; i < tab->size; ++i) {
   134	        bstring *node = tab->table[i];
   135	        while (node) {
   136	            bstring *next = next(node);
   137	            free_sstring(vm, node);
   138	            node = next;
   139	        }
   140	    }
   141	    be_free(vm, tab->table, tab->size * sizeof(bstring*));
   142	}
   143	
   144	static bstring* createstrobj(bvm *vm, size_t len, int islong)
   145	{
   146	    size_t size = (islong ? sizeof(blstring)
   147	                : sizeof(bsstring)) + len + 1;
   148	    bgcobject *gco = be_gc_newstr(vm, size, islong);
   149	    bstring *s = cast_str(gco);
   150	    if (s) {
   151	        s->slen = islong ? 255 : (bbyte)len;
   152	        char *str = cast(char *, islong ? lstr(s) : sstr(s));
   153	        str[len] = '\0';
   154	    }
   155	    return s;
   156	}
   157	
   158	#if BE_USE_PRECOMPILED_OBJECT
   159	static bstring* find_conststr(const char *str, size_t len)
   160	{
   161	    const struct bconststrtab *tab = &m_const_string_table;
   162	    uint32_t hash = str_hash(str, len);
   163	    bcstring *s = (bcstring*)tab->table[hash % tab->size];
   164	    for (; s != NULL; s = next(s)) {
   165	        if (len == s->slen && !strncmp(str, s->s, len)) {
   166	            return (bstring*)s;
   167	        }
   168	    }
   169	    return NULL;
   170	}
   171	#endif
   172	
   173	static bstring* newshortstr(bvm *vm, const char *str, size_t len)
   174	{
   175	    bstring *s;
   176	    int size = vm->strtab.size;
   177	    uint32_t hash = str_hash(str, len);
   178	    bstring **list = vm->strtab.table + (hash & (size - 1));
   179	
   180	    for (s = *list; s != NULL; s = next(s)) {
   181	        if (len == s->slen && !strncmp(str, sstr(s), len)) {
   182	            return s;
   183	        }
   184	    }
   185	    s = createstrobj(vm, len, 0);
   186	    if (s) {
   187	        memcpy(cast(char *, sstr(s)), str, len);
   188	        s->extra = 0;
   189	        s->next = cast(void*, *list);
   190	#if BE_USE_STR_HASH_CACHE
   191	        cast(bsstring*, s)->hash = hash;
   192	#endif
   193	        *list = s;
   194	        vm->strtab.count++;
   195	        if (vm->strtab.count > size << 2) {
   196	            resize(vm, size << 1);
   197	        }
   198	    }
   199	    return s;
   200	}
   201	
   202	bstring* be_newlongstr(bvm *vm, const char *str, size_t len)
   203	{
   204	    bstring *s;
   205	    blstring *ls;
   206	    s = createstrobj(vm, len, 1);
   207	    ls = cast(blstring*, s);
   208	    s->extra = 0;
   209	    ls->llen = cast_int(len);
   210	    if (str) { /* if the argument 'str' is NULL, we just allocate space */
   211	        memcpy(cast(char *, lstr(s)), str, len);
   212	    }
   213	    return s;
   214	}
   215	
   216	bstring* be_newstr(bvm *vm, const char *str)
   217	{
   218	    return be_newstrn(vm, str, strlen(str));
   219	}
   220	
   221	bstring *be_newstrn(bvm *vm, const char *str, size_t len)
   222	{
   223	    if (len <= SHORT_STR_MAX_LEN) {
   224	#if BE_USE_PRECOMPILED_OBJECT
   225	        bstring *s = find_conststr(str, len);
   226	        return s ? s : newshortstr(vm, str, len);
   227	#else
   228	        return newshortstr(vm, str, len);
   229	#endif
   230	    }
   231	    return be_newlongstr(vm, str, len); /* long string */
   232	}
   233	
   234	void be_gcstrtab(bvm *vm)
   235	{
   236	    struct bstringtable *tab = &vm->strtab;
   237	    int size = tab->size, i;
   238	    for (i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
   239	        bstring **list = tab->table + i;
   240	        bstring *prev = NULL, *node, *next;
   241	        for (node = *list; node; node = next) {
   242	            next = next(node);
   243	            if (!gc_isfixed(node) && gc_iswhite(node)) {
   244	                free_sstring(vm, node);
   245	                tab->count--;
   246	                if (prev) { /* link list */
   247	                    prev->next = cast(void*, next);
   248	                } else {
   249	                    *list = next;
   250	                }
   251	            } else {
   252	                prev = node;
   253	                gc_setwhite(node);
   254	            }
   255	        }
   256	    }
   257	    if (tab->count < size >> 2 && size > 8) {
   258	        resize(vm, size >> 1);
   259	    }
   260	}

   267	            return cs->hash;

   273	    if (s->slen != 255) {

   106	static bstring* ins2str(bvm *vm, int idx)

   112	    be_incrtop(vm); /* push the obj::tostring to stack */
   113	    if (basetype(type) != BE_FUNCTION) {

   116	        sprintf(sbuf, "<instance: %s()>", str(name));
   117	        be_stackpop(vm, 1); /* pop the obj::tostring */
   118	        s = be_newstr(vm, sbuf);

   120	    } else {
   121	        *vm->top = vm->reg[idx];
   122	        be_dofunc(vm, vm->top - 1, 1);
   123	        be_stackpop(vm, 1); /* pop the obj::tostring */
   124	        if (!var_isstr(vm->top)) { /* check the return value */
   125	            const char *name = str(be_instance_name(obj));

   130	        s = var_tostr(vm->top);

   146	static void pushstr(bvm *vm, const char *s, size_t len)
   147	{
   148	    /* to create a string and then update the top pointer,
   149	     * otherwise the GC may crash due to uninitialized values.
   150	     **/

   156	static const char* concat2(bvm *vm)
   157	{
   158	    bvalue *dst = vm->top - 2;
   159	    bstring *s1 = var_tostr(dst);
   160	    bstring *s2 = var_tostr(dst + 1);
   161	    bstring *s = be_strcat(vm, s1, s2);
   162	    be_assert(var_isstr(vm->top - 2) && var_isstr(vm->top - 1));
   163	    dst = vm->top - 2; /* the stack may change */
   164	    var_setstr(dst, s);
   165	    --vm->top;
   166	    return str(s);
   167	}

   169	const char* be_pushvfstr(bvm *vm, const char *format, va_list arg)
   170	{
   171	    pushstr(vm, "", 0);
   172	    for (;;) {
   173	        const char *p = strchr(format, '%');
   174	        if (p == NULL) {
   175	            break;
   176	        }
   177	        pushstr(vm, format, p - format);
   178	        concat2(vm);
   179	        switch (p[1]) {
   180	        case 's': {
   181	            const char *s = va_arg(arg, char*);
   182	            if (s == NULL) {
   183	                s = "(null)";
   184	            }
   185	            pushstr(vm, s, strlen(s));
   186	            break;
   187	        }
   188	        case 'd': {
   189	            bstring *s;
   190	            bvalue *v = be_incrtop(vm);
   191	            var_setint(v, va_arg(arg, int));
   192	            s = be_num2str(vm, v);
   193	            var_setstr(v, s);
   194	            break;
   195	        }
   196	        case 'f': case 'g': {
   197	            bstring *s;
   198	            bvalue *v = be_incrtop(vm);
   199	            var_setreal(v, cast(breal, va_arg(arg, double)));
   200	            s = be_num2str(vm, v);
   201	            var_setstr(v, s);
   202	            break;
   203	        }
   204	        case 'c': {
   205	            char c = cast(char, va_arg(arg, int));
   206	            pushstr(vm, &c, 1);
   207	            break;
   208	        }
   209	        case '%': {
   210	            pushstr(vm, "%", 1);
   211	            break;
   212	        }
   213	        case 'p': {
   214	            char buf[2 * sizeof(void*) + 4];
   215	            sprintf(buf, "%p", va_arg(arg, void*));
   216	            pushstr(vm, buf, strlen(buf));
   217	            break;
   218	        }
   219	        default:
   220	            pushstr(vm, "(unknow)", 8);
   221	            break;
   222	        }
   223	        concat2(vm);
   224	        format = p + 2;
   225	    }
   226	    pushstr(vm, format, strlen(format));
   227	    return concat2(vm);
   228	}

   230	/*******************************************************************
   231	 * the function be_str2int():
   232	 * >>-+------------+--+-----+----digits----><
   233	 *    '-whitespace-'  +- + -+
   234	 *                    '- - -'
   235	 *******************************************************************/
   236	BERRY_API bint be_str2int(const char *str, const char **endstr)
   237	{
   238	    int c, sign;
   239	    bint sum = 0;
   240	    skip_space(str);
   241	    sign = c = *str++;
   242	    if (c == '+' || c == '-') {
   243	        c = *str++;
   244	    }
   245	    while (is_digit(c)) {
   246	        sum = sum * 10 + c - '0';
   247	        c = *str++;
   248	    }
   249	    if (endstr) {
   250	        *endstr = str - 1;
   251	    }
   252	    return sign == '-' ? -sum : sum;
   253	}
   254	
   255	/*******************************************************************
   256	 * the function be_str2real():
   257	 * >>-+------------+--+-----+--+-digits--+---+--+--------+-+------->
   258	 *    '-whitespace-'  +- + -+  |         '-.-'  '-digits-' |   
   259	 *                    '- - -'  '-.--digits-----------------'   
   260	 * 
   261	 * >--+------------------------+----------------------------------><
   262	 *    '-+-e-+--+-----+--digits-'   
   263	 *      '-E-'  +- + -+             
   264	 *             '- - -'  
   265	 *******************************************************************/
   266	BERRY_API breal be_str2real(const char *str, const char **endstr)
   267	{
   268	    int c, sign;
   269	    breal sum = 0, deci = 0, point = (breal)0.1;
   270	    skip_space(str);
   271	    sign = c = *str++;
   272	    if (c == '+' || c == '-') {
   273	        c = *str++;
   274	    }
   275	    while (is_digit(c)) {
   276	        sum = sum * 10 + c - '0';
   277	        c = *str++;
   278	    }
   279	    if (c == '.') {
   280	        c = *str++;
   281	        while (is_digit(c)) {
   282	            deci = deci + ((breal)c - '0') * point;
   283	            point *= (breal)0.1;
   284	            c = *str++;
   285	        }
   286	    }
   287	    sum = sum + deci;
   288	    if (c == 'e' || c == 'E') {
   289	        int e = 0;
   290	        breal ratio = (c = *str++) == '-' ? (breal)0.1 : 10;
   291	        if (c == '+' || c == '-') {
   292	            c = *str++;
   293	        }
   294	        while (is_digit(c)) {
   295	            e = e * 10 + c - '0';
   296	            c = *str++;
   297	        }
   298	        while (e--) {
   299	            sum *= ratio;
   300	        }
   301	    }
   302	    if (endstr) {
   303	        *endstr = str - 1;
   304	    }
   305	    return sign == '-' ? -sum : sum;
   306	}

   308	/* convert a string to a number (integer or real).
   309	 * 1. skip \s*[\+\-]?\d*
   310	 * 2. matched [.eE]? yes: real, no: integer.
   311	 **/
   312	BERRY_API const char *be_str2num(bvm *vm, const char *str)
   313	{
   314	    const char *sout; 
   315	    bint c, vint = be_str2int(str, &sout);
   316	    c = *sout;
   317	    if (c == '.' || c == 'e' || c == 'E') {
   318	        be_pushreal(vm, be_str2real(str, &sout));
   319	    } else {
   320	        be_pushint(vm, vint);
   321	    }
   322	    return sout;

   351	const char* be_splitpath(const char *path)

   354	    for (p = path - 1; *path != '\0'; ++path) {

   362	const char* be_splitname(const char *path)
   363	{
   364	    const char *p, *q, *end = path + strlen(path);
   365	    for (p = end; *p != '.' && p > path; --p); /* skip [^\.] */
   366	    for (q = p; *q == '.' && q > path; --q); /* skip \. */
   367	    if ((q == path && *q == '.') || *q == '/') {

   372	
   373	static unsigned escape_length(const char *s, int quote)
   374	{
   375	    unsigned c, len = 0, step = quote == '"' ? 5 : 3;
   376	    for (; (c = *s) != '\0'; ++s) {
   377	        switch (c) {
   378	        case '\\': case '\n': case '\r': case '\t':
   379	            len += 1;
   380	            break;
   381	        default:
   382	            if (c < 0x20)
   383	                len += step;
   384	            else if (c == (unsigned)quote)
   385	                len += 1;
   386	            break;
   387	        }
   388	    }
   389	    return len;
   390	}
   391	
   392	static unsigned eschex(unsigned num)
   393	{
   394	    return num <= 9 ? '0' + num : 'a' + num - 10;
   395	}
   396	
   397	/* escape as Berry or JSON */
   398	static char* escape(char *q, unsigned c, int quote)
   399	{
   400	    int json = quote == '"';
   401	    switch (c) {
   402	    case '\\': *q++ = '\\'; *q = '\\'; break;
   403	    case '\n': *q++ = '\\'; *q = 'n'; break;
   404	    case '\r': *q++ = '\\'; *q = 'r'; break;
   405	    case '\t': *q++ = '\\'; *q = 't'; break;
   406	    default:
   407	        if (c < 0x20) { /* other characters are escaped using '\uxxxx' */
   408	            *q++ = '\\';
   409	            if (json) {
   410	                *q++ = 'u'; *q++ = '0'; *q++ = '0';
   411	                *q++ = (char)eschex(c >> 4);
   412	                *q = (char)eschex(c & 0x0f);
   413	            } else {
   414	                *q++ = 'x';
   415	                *q++ = (char)eschex(c >> 4);
   416	                *q = (char)eschex(c & 0x0f);
   417	            }
   418	        } else { /* quotes and unescaped characters */
   419	            if (c == (unsigned)quote)
   420	                *q++ = '\\';
   421	            *q = (char)c;
   422	        }
   423	        break;
   424	    }
   425	    return q;
   426	}
   427	
   428	static void toescape(bvm *vm, int index, int quote)
   429	{
   430	    char *buf, *q;
   431	    const char *p, *s = be_tostring(vm, index);
   432	    size_t len = (size_t)be_strlen(vm, index);
   433	    len += escape_length(s, quote) + 2; /* escape length + quote mark */
   434	    buf = q = be_pushbuffer(vm, len);
   435	    *q++ = (char)quote; /* add first quote */
   436	    /* generate escape string */
   437	    for (p = s; *p != '\0'; ++p, ++q) {
   438	        q = escape(q, *p, quote);
   439	    }
   440	    *q = (char)quote; /* add last quote */
   441	    be_pushnstring(vm, buf, len); /* make escape string from buffer */
   442	    be_moveto(vm, -1, index);
   443	    be_pop(vm, 2); /* remove buffer & top string */
   444	}
   445	
   446	BERRY_API const char* be_toescape(bvm *vm, int index, int mode)
   447	{
   448	    if (be_isstring(vm, index)) {
   449	        index = be_absindex(vm, index);
   450	        toescape(vm, index, mode == 'u' ? '"' : '\'');
   451	    }
   452	    return be_tostring(vm, index);
   453	}

   460	static const char* skip2dig(const char *s)
   461	{
   462	    if (is_digit(*s)) {
   463	        ++s;
   464	    }
   465	    if (is_digit(*s)) {
   466	        ++s;

   471	static const char* get_mode(const char *str, char *buf)
   472	{
   473	    const char *p = str;
   474	    while (*p && strchr(FLAGES, *p)) { /* skip flags */
   475	        ++p;
   476	    }
   477	    p = skip2dig(p); /* skip width (2 digits at most) */
   478	    if (*p == '.') {
   479	        p = skip2dig(++p); /* skip width (2 digits at most) */
   480	    }
   481	    *(buf++) = '%';
   482	    strncpy(buf, str, p - str + 1);
   483	    buf[p - str + 1] = '\0';
   484	    return p;
   485	}

   487	static void mode_fixlen(char *mode, const char *lenmode)
   488	{
   489	    size_t l = strlen(mode), lm = strlen(lenmode);
   490	    char spec = mode[l - 1];
   491	    strcpy(mode + l - 1, lenmode);
   492	    mode[l + lm - 1] = spec;
   493	    mode[l + lm] = '\0';
   494	}

   496	static int str_format(bvm *vm)
   497	{
   498	    int top = be_top(vm);
   499	    if (top > 0 && be_isstring(vm, 1)) {
   500	        int index = 2;
   501	        const char *format = be_tostring(vm, 1);
   502	        pushstr(vm, "", 0);
   503	        for (;;) {
   504	            char mode[MAX_FORMAT_MODE];
   505	            char buf[128];
   506	            const char *p = strchr(format, '%');
   507	            if (p == NULL) {
   508	                break;
   509	            }
   510	            pushstr(vm, format, p - format);
   511	            concat2(vm);
   512	            p = get_mode(p + 1, mode);
   513	            buf[0] = '\0';
   514	            if (index > top) {
   515	                be_raise(vm, "runtime_error", be_pushfstring(vm,
   516	                    "bad argument #%d to 'format': no value", index));
   517	            }
   518	            switch (*p) {
   519	            case 'd': case 'i': case 'o':
   520	            case 'u': case 'x': case 'X':
   521	                if (be_isint(vm, index)) {
   522	                    mode_fixlen(mode, BE_INT_FMTLEN);
   523	                    sprintf(buf, mode, be_toint(vm, index));
   524	                }
   525	                be_pushstring(vm, buf);
   526	                break;
   527	            case 'e': case 'E':
   528	            case 'f': case 'g': case 'G':
   529	                if (be_isnumber(vm, index)) {
   530	                    sprintf(buf, mode, be_toreal(vm, index));
   531	                }
   532	                be_pushstring(vm, buf);
   533	                break;
   534	            case 'c':
   535	                if (be_isint(vm, index)) {
   536	                    sprintf(buf, "%c", (int)be_toint(vm, index));
   537	                }
   538	                be_pushstring(vm, buf);
   539	                break;
   540	            case 's': {
   541	                const char *s = be_tostring(vm, index);
   542	                int len = be_strlen(vm, 2);
   543	                if (len > 100 && strlen(mode) == 2) {
   544	                    be_pushvalue(vm, index);
   545	                } else {
   546	                    sprintf(buf, mode, s);
   547	                    be_pushstring(vm, buf);
   548	                }
   549	                break;
   550	            }
   551	            default: /* error */
   552	                be_raise(vm, "runtime_error", be_pushfstring(vm,
   553	                    "invalid option '%%%c' to 'format'", *p));
   554	                break;
   555	            }
   556	            concat2(vm);
   557	            format = p + 1;
   558	            ++index;
   559	        }
   560	        pushstr(vm, format, strlen(format));
   561	        concat2(vm);
   562	        be_return(vm);
   563	    }
   564	    be_return_nil(vm);
   565	}
   566	
   567	/* string.op(s1, s2, begin=0, end=length(s2)) */
   568	static bint str_operation(bvm *vm, str_opfunc func, bint error)
   569	{
   570	    int top = be_top(vm);
   571	    /* check the number and type of arguments */
   572	    if (top >= 2 && be_isstring(vm, 1) && be_isstring(vm, 2)) {
   573	        /* get the operation string and its length */
   574	        int len1 = be_strlen(vm, 1);
   575	        int len2 = be_strlen(vm, 2);
   576	        const char *s1 = be_tostring(vm, 1);
   577	        const char *s2 = be_tostring(vm, 2);
   578	        /* get begin and end indexes (may use default values) */
   579	        bint begin = top >= 3 && be_isint(vm, 3) ? be_toint(vm, 3) : 0;
   580	        bint end = top >= 4 && be_isint(vm, 4) ? be_toint(vm, 4) : len1;
   581	        /* basic range check:
   582	         * 1. begin position must be greater than 0 and
   583	         *    less than the length of the source string.
   584	         * 2. the length of the pattern string cannot be
   585	         *    less than the matching range (end - begin).
   586	         **/
   587	        if (begin >= 0 && begin <= len1 && end - begin >= len2) {
   588	            /* call the operation function */
   589	            return func(s1, s2, begin, end - len2);
   590	        }
   591	    }
   592	    return error; /* returns the default error value */
   593	}
   594	
   595	static bint _sfind(const char *s1, const char *s2, bint begin, bint end)
   596	{
   597	    const char *res = strstr(s1 + begin, s2);
   598	    if (res) {
   599	        bint pos = (bint)(res - s1);
   600	        return pos <= end ? pos : -1;
   601	    }
   602	    return -1;
   603	}
   604	
   605	static int str_find(bvm *vm)
   606	{
   607	    be_pushint(vm, str_operation(vm, _sfind, -1));
   608	    be_return(vm);
   609	}
   610	
   611	static bint _scount(const char *s1, const char *s2, bint begin, bint end)
   612	{
   613	    bint count = 0;
   614	    const char *res = s1 + begin, *send = s1 + end;
   615	    while ((res = strstr(res, s2)) != NULL && res <= send) {
   616	        count += 1;
   617	        res += 1;
   618	    }
   619	    return count;
   620	}
   621	
   622	static int str_count(bvm *vm)
   623	{
   624	    be_pushint(vm, str_operation(vm, _scount, 0));
   625	    be_return(vm);
   626	}
   627	
   628	static bbool _split_string(bvm *vm, int top)
   629	{
   630	    if (be_isstring(vm, 2)) {
   631	        const char *res;
   632	        int len1 = be_strlen(vm, 1);
   633	        int len2 = be_strlen(vm, 2);
   634	        const char *s1 = be_tostring(vm, 1);
   635	        const char *s2 = be_tostring(vm, 2);
   636	        bint count = len2 /* match when the pattern string is not empty */
   637	            ? top >= 3 && be_isint(vm, 3) ? be_toint(vm, 3) : len1
   638	            : 0; /* cannot match empty pattern string */
   639	        while (count-- && (res = strstr(s1, s2)) != NULL) {
   640	            be_pushnstring(vm, s1, res - s1);
   641	            be_data_push(vm, -2);
   642	            be_pop(vm, 1);
   643	            s1 = res + len2;
   644	        }
   645	        be_pushstring(vm, s1);
   646	        be_data_push(vm, -2);
   647	        be_pop(vm, 1);
   648	        return btrue;
   649	    }
   650	    return bfalse;
   651	}
   652	
   653	static bbool _split_index(bvm *vm)
   654	{
   655	    if (be_isint(vm, 2)) {
   656	        int len = be_strlen(vm, 1), idx = be_toindex(vm, 2);
   657	        const char *s = be_tostring(vm, 1);
   658	        idx = idx > len ? len : idx < -len ? -len : idx;
   659	        if (idx < 0) {
   660	            idx += len;
   661	        }
   662	        be_pushnstring(vm, s, idx);
   663	        be_data_push(vm, -2);
   664	        be_pop(vm, 1);
   665	        be_pushnstring(vm, s + idx, (size_t)len - idx);
   666	        be_data_push(vm, -2);
   667	        be_pop(vm, 1);
   668	        return btrue;
   669	    }
   670	    return bfalse;
   671	}
   672	
   673	static int str_split(bvm *vm)
   674	{
   675	    int top = be_top(vm);
   676	    be_newobject(vm, "list");
   677	    if (top >= 2 && be_isstring(vm, 1)) {
   678	        if (!_split_index(vm))
   679	            _split_string(vm, top);
   680	    }
   681	    be_pop(vm, 1);
   682	    be_return(vm);
   683	}
   684	
   685	static int str_i2hex(bvm *vm)
   686	{
   687	    int top = be_top(vm);
   688	    if (top && be_isint(vm, 1)) {
   689	        bint value = be_toint(vm, 1);
   690	        char fmt[10] = { "%" BE_INT_FMTLEN "X" }, buf[18];
   691	        if (top >= 2 && be_isint(vm, 2)) {
   692	            bint num = be_toint(vm, 2);
   693	            if (num > 0 && num <= 16) {
   694	                sprintf(fmt, "%%.%d" BE_INT_FMTLEN "X", (int)num);
   695	            }
   696	        }
   697	        sprintf(buf, fmt, value);
   698	        be_pushstring(vm, buf);
   699	        be_return(vm);
   700	    }
   701	    be_return_nil(vm);
   702	}
   703	
   704	static int str_byte(bvm *vm)
   705	{
   706	    if (be_top(vm) && be_isstring(vm, 1)) {
   707	        const bbyte *s = (const bbyte *)be_tostring(vm, 1);
   708	        be_pushint(vm, *s);
   709	        be_return(vm);
   710	    }
   711	    be_return_nil(vm);
   712	}
   713	
   714	static int str_char(bvm *vm)
   715	{
   716	    if (be_top(vm) && be_isint(vm, 1)) {
   717	        char c = be_toint(vm, 1) & 0xFF;
   718	        be_pushnstring(vm, &c, 1);
   719	        be_return(vm);
   720	    }
   721	    be_return_nil(vm);
   722	}
   723	
   724	// boolean to select whether we call toupper() or tolower()
   725	static int str_touplower(bvm *vm, bbool up)
   726	{
   727	    if (be_top(vm) && be_isstring(vm, 1)) {
   728	        const char *p, *s = be_tostring(vm, 1);
   729	        size_t len = (size_t)be_strlen(vm, 1);
   730	        char *buf, *q;
   731	        buf = q = be_pushbuffer(vm, len);
   732	        /* convert to lower case */
   733	        for (p = s; *p != '\0'; ++p, ++q) {
   734	            *q = up ? toupper(*p) : tolower(*p);
   735	        }
   736	        be_pushnstring(vm, buf, len); /* make escape string from buffer */
   737	        be_remove(vm, 2); /* remove buffer */
   738	        be_return(vm);
   739	    }
   740	    be_return_nil(vm);
   741	}
   742	
   743	static int str_tolower(bvm *vm) {
   744	    return str_touplower(vm, bfalse);
   745	}
   746	
   747	static int str_toupper(bvm *vm) {
   748	    return str_touplower(vm, btrue);
   749	}

    39	extern BERRY_LOCAL const bntvmodule* const be_module_table[];

    41	static bmodule* native_module(bvm *vm, const bntvmodule *nm, bvalue *dst);
    42	
    43	static const bntvmodule* find_native(bstring *path)
    44	{
    45	    const bntvmodule *module;
    46	    const bntvmodule* const *node = be_module_table;
    47	    for (; (module = *node) != NULL; ++node) {
    48	        if (!strcmp(module->name, str(path))) {
    49	            return module;
    50	        }
    51	    }
    52	    return NULL;
    53	}
    54	
    55	static void insert_attrs(bvm *vm, bmap *table, const bntvmodule *nm)
    56	{
    57	    size_t i;
    58	    for (i = 0; i < nm->size; ++i) {
    59	        const bntvmodobj *node = nm->attrs + i;
    60	        bstring *name = be_newstr(vm, node->name);
    61	        bvalue *v = be_map_insertstr(vm, table, name, NULL);
    62	        be_assert(node->type <= BE_CMODULE);
    63	        switch (node->type) {
    64	        case BE_CNIL:
    65	            var_setnil(v);
    66	            break;
    67	        case BE_CINT:
    68	            var_setint(v, node->u.i);
    69	            break;
    70	        case BE_CREAL:
    71	            var_setreal(v, node->u.r);
    72	            break;
    73	        case BE_CBOOL:
    74	            var_setbool(v, node->u.b);
    75	            break;
    76	        case BE_CFUNCTION:
    77	            var_setntvfunc(v, node->u.f);
    78	            break;
    79	        case BE_CSTRING:
    80	            var_setstr(v, be_newstr(vm, node->u.s));
    81	            break;
    82	        case BE_CMODULE:
    83	            native_module(vm, node->u.o, v);
    84	            break;
    85	        default: /* error */
    86	            break;
    87	        }
    88	    }
    89	}
    90	
    91	static bmodule* new_module(bvm *vm, const bntvmodule *nm)
    92	{
    93	    bgcobject *gco = be_gcnew(vm, BE_MODULE, bmodule);
    94	    bmodule *obj = cast_module(gco);
    95	    if (obj) {
    96	        var_setmodule(vm->top, obj);
    97	        be_incrtop(vm);
    98	        obj->info.native = nm;
    99	        obj->table = NULL; /* gc protection */
   100	        obj->table = be_map_new(vm);
   101	        insert_attrs(vm, obj->table, nm);
   102	        be_map_release(vm, obj->table); /* clear space */
   103	        be_stackpop(vm, 1);
   104	    }
   105	    return obj;
   106	}
   107	
   108	static bmodule* native_module(bvm *vm, const bntvmodule *nm, bvalue *dst)
   109	{
   110	    if (nm) {
   111	        bmodule *obj;
   112	        if (nm->module) {
   113	            obj = (bmodule *)nm->module;
   114	        } else { /* new module */
   115	            obj = new_module(vm, nm);
   116	        }
   117	        if (obj && dst) {
   118	            var_setmodule(dst, obj);
   119	        }
   120	        return obj;
   121	    }
   122	    return NULL;
   123	}

   125	static char* fixpath(bvm *vm, bstring *path, size_t *size)
   126	{
   127	    char *buffer;
   128	    const char *split, *base;
   129	    bvalue *func = vm->cf->func;
   130	    bclosure *cl = var_toobj(func);
   131	    be_assert(var_isclosure(func));
   132	    base = str(cl->proto->source); /* get the source file path */
   133	    split = be_splitpath(base);
   134	    *size = split - base + (size_t)str_len(path) + SUFFIX_LEN;
   135	    buffer = be_malloc(vm, *size);
   136	    strncpy(buffer, base, split - base);
   137	    strcpy(buffer + (split - base), str(path));
   138	    return buffer;
   139	}
   140	
   141	static char* conpath(bvm *vm, bstring *path1, bstring *path2, size_t *size)
   142	{
   143	    char *buffer;
   144	    int len1 = str_len(path1);
   145	    *size = (size_t)len1 + (size_t)str_len(path2) + 1 + SUFFIX_LEN;
   146	    buffer = be_malloc(vm, *size);
   147	    strcpy(buffer, str(path1));
   148	    buffer[len1] = '/';
   149	    strcpy(buffer + len1 + 1, str(path2));
   150	    return buffer;
   151	}

   153	static int open_script(bvm *vm, char *path)
   154	{
   155	    int res = be_loadmodule(vm, path);
   156	    if (res == BE_OK)
   157	        be_call(vm, 0);
   158	    return res;
   159	}
   160	
   161	#if BE_USE_SHARED_LIB
   162	static int open_dllib(bvm *vm, char *path)
   163	{
   164	    int res = be_loadlib(vm, path);
   165	    if (res == BE_OK)
   166	        be_call(vm, 0);
   167	    return res;
   168	}
   169	#endif
   170	
   171	static int open_libfile(bvm *vm, char *path, size_t size)
   172	{
   173	    int res, idx = 0;
   174	    const char *sfxs[] = { "", ".bec", ".be" };
   175	    do {
   176	        strcpy(path + size - SUFFIX_LEN, sfxs[idx]);
   177	        res = open_script(vm, path);
   178	    } while (idx++ < 2 && res == BE_IO_ERROR);
   179	    if (res == BE_IO_ERROR) {
   180	#if BE_USE_SHARED_LIB
   181	        strcpy(path + size - SUFFIX_LEN, DLL_SUFFIX);
   182	        res = open_dllib(vm, path);
   183	#endif
   184	    }
   185	    be_free(vm, path, size);
   186	    return res;
   187	}
   188	
   189	static int load_path(bvm *vm, bstring *path, bstring *mod)
   190	{
   191	    size_t size;
   192	    char *fullpath = conpath(vm, path, mod, &size);
   193	    return open_libfile(vm, fullpath, size);
   194	}
   195	
   196	static int load_cwd(bvm *vm, bstring *path)
   197	{
   198	    size_t size;
   199	    char *fullpath = fixpath(vm, path, &size);
   200	    return open_libfile(vm, fullpath, size);
   201	}
   202	
   203	static int load_package(bvm *vm, bstring *path)
   204	{
   205	    int res = load_cwd(vm, path); /* load from current directory */
   206	    if (res == BE_IO_ERROR && vm->module.path) {
   207	        blist *list = vm->module.path;
   208	        bvalue *v = be_list_end(list) - 1;
   209	        bvalue *first = be_list_data(list);
   210	        for (; res == BE_IO_ERROR && v >= first; v--) {
   211	            if (var_isstr(v)) {
   212	                res = load_path(vm, var_tostr(v), path);
   213	            }
   214	        }
   215	    }
   216	    return res;
   217	}

   219	static int load_native(bvm *vm, bstring *path)
   220	{
   221	    const bntvmodule *nm = find_native(path);
   222	    bmodule *mod = native_module(vm, nm, NULL);
   223	    if (mod != NULL) {
   224	        /* the pointer vm->top may be changed */
   225	        var_setmodule(vm->top, mod);
   226	        be_incrtop(vm);
   227	        return BE_OK;
   228	    }
   229	    return BE_IO_ERROR;
   230	}

   232	static bvalue* load_cached(bvm *vm, bstring *path)
   233	{
   234	    bvalue *v = NULL;
   235	    if (vm->module.loaded) {
   236	        v = be_map_findstr(vm, vm->module.loaded, path);
   237	        if (v) {
   238	            *vm->top = *v;
   239	            be_incrtop(vm);
   240	        }
   241	    }
   242	    return v;
   243	}
   244	
   245	static void cache_module(bvm *vm, bstring *name)
   246	{
   247	    bvalue *v;
   248	    if (vm->module.loaded == NULL) {
   249	        vm->module.loaded = be_map_new(vm);
   250	    }
   251	    v = be_map_insertstr(vm, vm->module.loaded, name, NULL);
   252	    *v = vm->top[-1];
   253	}
   254	
   255	/* load module to vm->top */
   256	int be_module_load(bvm *vm, bstring *path)
   257	{
   258	    int res = BE_OK;
   259	    if (!load_cached(vm, path)) {
   260	        res = load_native(vm, path);
   261	        if (res == BE_IO_ERROR)
   262	            res = load_package(vm, path);
   263	        if (res == BE_OK)
   264	            cache_module(vm, path);
   265	    }
   266	    return res;
   267	}

   269	bmodule* be_module_new(bvm *vm)
   270	{
   271	    bgcobject *gco = be_gcnew(vm, BE_MODULE, bmodule);
   272	    bmodule *obj = cast_module(gco);
   273	    if (obj) {
   274	        var_setmodule(vm->top, obj);
   275	        be_incrtop(vm);
   276	        obj->info.native = NULL;

   322	{

   368	BERRY_API int be_loadlib(bvm *vm, const char *path)
   369	{
